summary_bullets.innovation: 以多同位素和橄榄石指标联合约束中国西秦岭碱性超基性岩成因。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解碱性岩浆成因及壳幔相互作用提供新的地球化学证据。

works.title: Early Carboniferous backarc basin in the Bidz ophiolitic terrane, Mongolia: Geochemical and geochronological constraints and tectonic implications
works.abstract: The tectonic relationship between the Chinese-Mongolian Altai domain and the East Junggar−Trans-Altai domain in the Mongolian collage remains debated, largely due to the poorly constrained nature of intervening oceanic basins. To address this, the Bidz ophiolitic terrane located at their junction was investigated by using integrated geological, geochemical, and geochronological approaches. The terrane comprises gabbro, basalt, and andesite units embedded in a chert-sandstone-tuff matrix. Gabbro can be roughly classified into high- and low-Mg# subgroups, where the former shows transitional mid-ocean-ridge basalt and island-arc basalt geochemical affinities, while the latter exhibits overall arc-like geochemical signatures. Basalt displays comparable geochemistry with respect to the high-Mg# gabbro, and both of them resemble backarc basin basalt. In contrast, andesite shows calc-alkaline arc geochemical characteristics. Zircon U-Pb dating of gabbro samples yields formation ages of ca. 350 Ma. These findings suggest that the Bidz terrane represents a fragment of an early Carboniferous backarc basin. Regional synthesis suggests that this basin, together with its western counterpart (the Erqis backarc) and the southerly East Junggar−Trans-Altai arc domains, formed a Devonian−Carboniferous marginal sea−island-arc system to the south of the Altai domain, driven by southward (present-day coordinates) subduction retreat. Our data also indicate that opening of the Erqis-Bidz backarc coincided with eastward-propagating crustal extension in the Altai domain, reflecting gradual eastward rollback of the subduction system, analogous to the geodynamic evolution of the modern Southwest Pacific oceanic domain.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 蒙古 Bidz 蛇绿岩地体中的早石炭世弧后盆地：地球化学与年代学约束及其构造意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在厘清蒙古拼贴体中Bidz蛇绿岩地体的性质及其与阿尔泰、东准噶尔—外阿尔泰域的构造关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究结合地质调查、岩石地球化学分析与辉长岩锆石U-Pb年代学进行综合约束。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Bidz地体为约350Ma形成的早石炭世弧后盆地残片，记录俯冲后撤控制的边缘海—岛弧系统。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统用地球化学和年代学证实Bidz为弧后盆地，并提出其与Erqis盆地的统一演化模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为中亚造山带古洋盆重建、俯冲后撤机制及陆壳伸展时空演化提供关键证据。

works.title: The geochemical and isotopic composition of the Miocene Vestfirðir basalts, Northwest Iceland: Tracking the evolution of the Iceland mantle plume
works.abstract: The Miocene basalts of Vestfirðir, northwest Iceland, provide a record of the Iceland mantle plume shortly after its arrival beneath the mid-Atlantic ridge. We present new trace element and Sr-Nd-Pb-He isotope data from a comprehensive collection of 16–8 Ma basalts to investigate the temporal and compositional evolution of the plume. Basalts erupted before a volcanic hiatus at ∼14.9 Ma include both depleted, negative ΔNb lavas that resemble N-MORB and enriched, plume-derived basalts with positive ΔNb that resemble E -MORB. Basalts erupted after the hiatus all have positive ΔNb, they are manifestly more enriched than the pre-hiatus lavas and have high 3 He/ 4 He (up to 42 R a ), consistent with the presence of plume mantle beneath the relocated rift. The plume-derived basalts record contributions from two distinct enriched components (NWE1 and NWE2) and a depleted component (NWD1), which show geochemical signatures similar to those recorded in modern Icelandic basalts. Both the enriched mantle components have high 3 He/ 4 He ratios, and the depleted high- 3 He/ 4 He mantle component that dominates the proto-Iceland plume sampled by Baffin Island and West Greenland lavas is not evident in the Miocene sequence. The absence of 3 He/ 4 He correlations with trace elements or radiogenic isotopes suggests the high- 3 He/ 4 He source does not have a unique geochemical composition.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 冰岛西北部Vestfirðir地区中新世玄武岩的地球化学与同位素组成：追踪冰岛地幔柱的演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究Vestfirðir中新世玄武岩如何记录冰岛地幔柱的时序与成分演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析16–8 Ma玄武岩的微量元素及Sr-Nd-Pb-He同位素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 停喷后熔岩更富集且高3He/4He，反映裂谷迁移后地幔柱主导供源。
summary_bullets.innovation: 识别两类富集源和一类亏损源，并揭示高3He/4He无独特地球化学指纹。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解冰岛地幔柱—洋中脊相互作用及地幔不均一性提供关键约束。

works.title: Radiogenic 182W and 142Nd anomalies in a 2.7 Ga old basaltic lava flow indicate long-term preservation of early mantle heterogeneities
works.abstract: Understanding the origin and preservation of early mantle heterogeneities is essential for reconstructing Earth’s accretion and early differentiation history. This can be investigated using the short-lived 146 Sm– 142 Nd and 182 Hf– 182 W isotope systems, which provide insights into large-scale differentiation processes through 142 Nd and 182 W anomalies in Earth’s oldest rocks. In this study, we present 182 W data for Theo’s Flow, a thick, differentiated, mafic–ultramafic flow of tholeiitic affinity, as well as 147 Sm– 143 Nd, 176 Lu– 176 Hf, and 187 Re– 187 Os isotope data and trace element concentrations, including highly siderophile elements, for Theo’s Flow and closely spatially and temporally associated Pyke Hill komatiites, both from the ∼ 2.7 Ga old Kidd-Munro Assemblage of the Abitibi greenstone belt, Ontario, Canada. Theo’s Flow samples are characterized by an average µ 182 W value of + 6.7 ± 2.7, which, together with the previously reported positive µ 142 Nd anomaly of + 6.8 ± 2.5, indicate long-term survival of mantle domains resulting from magmatic differentiation early in Earth’s history. If it is assumed that the bulk silicate Earth evolved with a suprachondritic Sm/Nd ratio, anomalies for both elements can be explained by a single silicate differentiation event at ∼ 4.54 Ga. Alternatively, if the bulk silicate Earth evolved with a chondritic Sm/Nd ratio, a model fractionation age of ∼ 4.45 Ga is obtained. In this case, due to extinction of 182 Hf by that time, the 182 W anomaly would have to have been generated by another process, such as derivation from a mantle source characterized by a deficit in late accreted materials. Regardless of the timing of the early silicate differentiation, the preservation of both 182 W and 142 Nd anomalies in the 2.7 Ga old rocks highlights the survival of early-formed mantle domains for nearly 1.8 Gyr after Earth’s formation. Comparison of isotopic and chemical data for Theo’s Flow with those for the Pyke Hill and Boston Creek komatiites, which were argued to have all been derived from melting in a single mantle plume, provides evidence for the survival of early mantle heterogeneities on a plume scale
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 一条27亿年前玄武质熔岩流中的放射成因182W和142Nd异常表明早期地幔非均一性的长期保存

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究2.7Ga玄武岩中的W-Nd异常是否记录早期地幔非均一体长期保存。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定Theo's Flow及相关科马提岩的182W、Nd-Hf-Os同位素与微量元素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Theo's Flow具正182W与142Nd异常，表明早期分异地幔域保存近18亿年。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合182W与142Nd证据，提出地幔柱尺度早期非均一体长期存续。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建地球增生、早期分异及古老地幔源区演化提供关键同位素约束。

works.title: Progressive sub-arc mantle oxidation modulated by sediment melt
works.abstract: The redox state of the sub-arc mantle beneath volcanic arcs is typically oxidized but exhibits substantial variability. Previous studies proposed that the incorporation of slab components alters both arc magma compositions and sub-arc mantle redox state, whereas the dominant component remains debated. Here, by compiling global Cenozoic primitive arc basalt and olivine-hosted melt inclusion data, we show that sediment melt dominated by terrigenous origin plays the controlling role. Progressive influx of sediment melts into the sub-arc mantle results in gradual enrichment of potassium oxide and most incompatible elements in arc magmas. Increases in potassium oxide content in primitive magmas also correlates with rising oxygen fugacity ( f o 2 ) values, highlighting the strong oxidizing potential of sediment melt. The high–potassium oxide, high- f o 2 arc magmas spatially correlate with the distribution of Cenozoic porphyry copper-gold deposits, showing that the sediment melt influx not only elevates the sub-arc mantle f o 2 but also enhances the metallogenetic potential for porphyry deposits.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 沉积物熔体调控的弧下地幔渐进氧化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究俯冲带弧下地幔氧化态差异由何种板片组分主控。
summary_bullets.methodology: 汇编全球新生代原始弧玄武岩与橄榄石熔体包裹体数据进行对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 陆源沉积物熔体持续加入会提高岩浆钾含量、逸氧度及斑岩成矿潜力。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在全球尺度将沉积物熔体确定为调控弧下地幔氧化的主导因素。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解弧岩浆氧化机制及斑岩铜金矿预测提供了关键依据。

works.title: The fate of molybdenum in subducted oceanic crust: Dehydration-controlled fractionation and cycling
works.abstract: Molybdenum (Mo) isotopes are powerful tracers of subduction-zone material cycling, yet their fractionation mechanisms and transport pathways during slab dehydration remain poorly constrained. This study integrates Mo concentrations and isotopic compositions from multiple global reservoirs with thermodynamics and numerical simulations, aiming to clarify Mo isotopic fractionation behavior and develop a Mo cycling model for subduction zones. Mass‑balance calculations yield mean δ 98 Mo values of 0.22 ± 0.04‰ (2σ) for sediments, −0.15 ± 0.04‰ (2σ) for the underlying altered mafic oceanic crust (AMOC), and 0.15 ± 0.04‰ (2σ) for the bulk altered oceanic crust (AOC). Isotope fractionation modeling indicates that upon complete dehydration, residual sediment δ 98 Mo can be reduced to −1.79‰ (α = 1.0015) and −1.88‰ (α = 1.002), while AMOC may decrease to −0.32‰ (α = 1.0015) and −0.38‰ (α = 1.002). The contribution from residual slabs after dehydration can explain pronounced negative δ 98 Mo observed in some arc lavas. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that slab residues retain substantial Mo after extreme subduction dehydration, with 33.9 % retention in sediments and 85.3 % in AMOC, highlighting their important contribution to Mo enrichment in deep subduction settings. Magmatic mixing models further indicate that subduction-modified, high-δ 98 Mo mid‑upper mantle can yield enriched mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORBs), while the deeper mantle metasomatized by low-δ 98 Mo dehydrated slabs can source ocean island basalts (OIBs). High-δ 98 Mo arc magmas in hot arcs form through fluid- or AOC-melt-dominated metasomatism, while cold subduction zones favor fluid-dominated metasomatism. Conversely, low-δ 98 Mo back-arc magmas mainly originate from dehydrated AOC melts. These results demonstrate that pre-melting slab dehydration controls Mo isotope fractionation and recycling in subduction systems.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 俯冲洋壳中钼的归趋：脱水控制的分馏与循环

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲洋壳脱水过程中Mo同位素分馏机制及其循环路径。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合全球储库Mo数据，结合质量平衡、热力学与数值及蒙特卡洛模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 板片脱水主控Mo同位素分馏，残余板片仍富Mo并可解释弧岩浆的高低δ98Mo。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立了俯冲带Mo循环模型，量化沉积物与蚀变洋壳脱水后的同位素演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为示踪俯冲物质循环及解释MORB、OIB和弧岩浆Mo异常提供新框架。

works.title: Trace element partitioning during water-saturated eclogite melting at 3 GPa under variable oxygen fugacity – Implications for subduction zone magmatism
works.abstract: To shed light on the composition of partial melts of subducted oceanic crust potentially produced at subarc depths and constrain the contribution of this particular melting process to arc magmatism, we performed melting experiments of an eclogite source at relevant conditions (3 GPa, 800–950 °C and oxygen fugacity from ∼FMQ + 3 to FMQ-3) and produced new partition coefficients (D) for many trace elements between eclogite minerals and hydrous rhyolitic melts. Our results show that lattice strain control on partitioning is significant, as evidenced by a near-parabolic dependence of log D to the ionic radius for trivalent cations entering the large sites of both garnet and clinopyroxene. The partition coefficients of some trace elements also display significant dependences on temperature and oxygen fugacity. D Sc , D Y , D Hf , D Zr , D Th and D Ce decrease with increasing temperature for both garnet-melt and clinopyroxene-melt partitioning. With increasing temperature, D Grt-Liq REE tends to decrease, while D Cpx-Liq Ba and D Cpx-Liq Sr increase. We also observed a strong increase in D V with decreasing fO 2 for garnet-, clinopyroxene- and rutile-melt partitioning, while D Eu shows the opposite trend. With increasing fO 2 from FMQ-3 to FMQ + 3, D Grt-Liq Eu increases by more than an order of magnitude and D Cpx-Liq Eu increases by a factor of 3. Our new data allow us to model the trace element composition of primary adakitic melts produced by melting of subducted oceanic crust at typical subarc depths of about 100 km. These melts are characterized by (i) a progressive enrichment in the most incompatible elements from about 0.1 (Sc) to 10 (Rb) times MORB values, (ii) strong Nb-Ta negative anomalies, (iii) Sr positive anomalies and (iv) a significant depletion in HREE and Y. Stronger Nb-Ta anomaly and lowers Ti, Hf and Zr contents are observed if more rutile is present in the source. Meanwhile, the contents of the most incompatible elements (Rb, Ba, U, Th), the positive Sr anomaly and Sr/Y and La/Yb ratios decrease with increasing degree of melting. We show that the calculated primary adakitic melts can evolve to form high-silica adakites following assimilation-fractional crystallization processes in the mantle wedge and crust. However, to preserve the positive Sr anomaly of high-silica adakites, plagioclase fractionation and sediment melting should remain moderate. Oxybarometry based on V/M ratios (M = Eu, Sc, Yb, Ti) indicates relatively reducing conditions (below FMQ-1) for the generation of parental melts of modern high-silica adakites and Archean high-pressure TTGs. Finally, the Sr/Y ratio of modern primitive arc lavas suggest that hybridization of primitive mantle wedge magmas with adakitic magmas is a significant process for relatively warm subduction zones, where subarc surface slab temperatures reach about 900 °C. We estimate that, in such cases, melting of subducted oceanic crust could contribute up to 30% of the arc magma budget.

works.translated_title: 不同氧逸度条件下 3 GPa 水饱和榴辉岩熔融过程中的微量元素分配——对俯冲带岩浆作用的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲洋壳榴辉岩在不同氧逸度下熔融如何影响弧岩浆成分。
summary_bullets.methodology: 在3 GPa、800–950℃及FMQ+3至FMQ-3条件下开展含水榴辉岩熔融实验并测定分配系数。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 温度与氧逸度显著控制微量元素分配，板片熔体具高Sr/Y、低HREE和Nb-Ta负异常特征。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统给出可变氧逸度下榴辉岩矿物-含水流纹质熔体多种微量元素分配系数。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释埃达克岩、TTG成因及温暖俯冲带中板片熔融对弧岩浆贡献提供定量约束。

works.title: Tin isotope fractionation in arc magmas controlled by degassing and slab input
works.abstract: As a redox-sensitive and volatile-chalcophile tracer, Sn isotopes provide unique insights into the origin and transport mechanisms of Sn at convergent margins, yet the drivers of their fractionation remains poorly understood due to a lack of integrated spatial and process-oriented studies. We present high-precision Sn isotopic compositions of lavas (pumices) and hydrothermal products and clinopyroxene-inferred H 2 O concentrations from Whakaari (arc-front) and Taranaki (rear-arc) in the Kermadec- Hikurangi subduction system.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 弧岩浆中锡同位素分馏受脱气作用和板片输入控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨俯冲带弧岩浆中锡同位素分馏受脱气与板片输入如何共同控制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定Kermadec-Hikurangi两火山浮岩与热液产物高精度锡同位素，并用单斜辉石反演H2O。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 前弧与后弧锡同位素差异表明，岩浆脱气和板片流体输入共同主导锡迁移与分馏。
summary_bullets.innovation: 整合空间对比、过程示踪及水含量约束，系统揭示俯冲带锡同位素分馏机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带挥发分循环、氧化还原演化及锡成矿物质来源提供关键地球化学约束。

works.title: Molybdenum isotopes in metamorphic and magmatic rocks may record substantial fluid activity in continental subduction zones
works.abstract: Fluids play a critical role in crust-mantle interaction and geochemical recycling in subduction zones. However, fluid activity in continental subduction zones remains poorly constrained. Molybdenum (Mo) isotopes exhibit significant fractionation during subduction zone processes, providing a powerful tool for tracing fluid activity. Here we report the Mo isotopic compositions of paired metamorphic rocks (eclogites and gneisses) and magmatic rocks (gabbroic diorites and monzodiorites) from the Dabie-Sulu continental collision zone. The metamorphic rocks have δ 98 Mo values of −0.51‰ to 0.12‰, which are variably lower than the previously estimated continental crust value of 0.12‰ ± 0.05‰ and the more recent estimate of −0.12‰ ± 0.01‰. Their light Mo isotopic features, together with low Mo/Ce ratios and depleted fluid-mobile element contents, suggest that these rocks represent fragments of subducted continental crust that experienced substantial dehydration during subduction. The magmatic rocks have low δ 98 Mo values of −0.24‰ to −0.05‰, low Mo/Ce ratios, and low fluid-mobile element contents comparable to those of the metamorphic rocks, indicating the subsequent incorporation of isotopically light Mo from the dehydrated crust into the mantle wedge. Collectively, the light Mo isotopic features of the metamorphic and magmatic rocks point to significant Mo isotopic fractionation during continental subduction. Metamorphic dehydration of the subducted continental crust generated high-δ 98 Mo fluids, leaving the residual dehydrated crust with light Mo isotopes, as recorded by low-δ 98 Mo metamorphic rocks. Subsequently, melting of this dehydrated crust produced melts that metasomatized the overlying mantle wedge, generating the source of low-δ 98 Mo magmatism in the continental collision zone. Therefore, the Mo isotope systematics of metamorphic and magmatic rocks provide a powerful means of revealing potential significant fluid activity in continental subduction zones.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 变质岩和岩浆岩中的钼同位素可能记录大陆俯冲带中显著的流体活动

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究大陆俯冲带中流体活动的强度及其Mo同位素记录机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定大别—苏鲁变质岩与岩浆岩的Mo同位素及Mo/Ce和流体活动元素特征。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 变质脱水使俯冲陆壳残留轻Mo，同位素轻的熔体交代地幔并形成低δ98Mo岩浆。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统联合变质岩与岩浆岩Mo同位素示踪大陆俯冲流体活动。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别大陆俯冲中壳幔相互作用、流体迁移和地球化学循环提供新指标。

works.title: Controls on the cadmium isotopic compositions of marine sediments in the oligotrophic Western Pacific
works.abstract: The oceanic biogeochemical cycle of cadmium (Cd) is classically interpreted through its nutrient-like distribution, yet major sinks balancing its isotopic budget remain debated. While Cd sequestration in sub-oxic/anoxic margin sediments has been emphasized, the role of vast expanses of oxic sediments is poorly constrained. This study presents Cd concentrations and stable isotope compositions ( δ 114/110 Cd) of surface sediments from the oligotrophic Western Pacific (CJ09), spanning water depths of 2,100–5,580 m, to identify Cd hosts and assess their significance in the global Cd cycle. Results show significant enrichment of non-detrital Cd, primarily hosted in carbonate minerals, organic matter, and Mn oxides, with their relative proportions shifting systematically with depth. Specifically, near-complete loss of carbonate-derived Cd is observed during carbonate dissolution at depth, with limited re-adsorption by other phases. The bulk sedimentary Cd isotopic composition decreases from +0.14 ± 0.06‰ in shallow sediments (2,100–2,700 m) to +0.05 ±0.04‰ in intermediate sediments (4,700–5,580 m), and further to 0.00 ± 0.06‰ in deep sediments. Although Mn oxides dominate non-detrital Cd at deep sediments, the constrained δ 114/110 Cd of Mn oxides (+0.13 ± 0.05‰) is significantly higher than bulk δ 114/110 Cd values. Mass balance calculations further reveal an exceptionally light Cd isotopic composition ( δ 114/110 Cd δ 114/110 Cd values of deep sediments. This light isotope signature likely originates from the combined effects of rapid export via zooplankton fecal pellets, preferential adsorption of light Cd isotopes onto organic matter, and the delivery of a refractory, isotopically light subsurface particulate Cd pool to the seafloor in the oligotrophic Western Pacific. A first-order flux estimation suggests that Cd burial in these oxic, pelagic clays represents a non-negligible sink (∼2–18% of total input), which is characterized by isotopically lighter Cd compared to deepwater. This finding highlights that oxic sediments in the open ocean constitute a significant light isotopic sink, which must be incorporated into models to fully resolve the marine Cd isotopic mass balance.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 寡营养西太平洋海洋沉积物镉同位素组成的控制因素

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究寡营养西太平洋氧化沉积物如何控制海洋Cd同位素收支。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定2100—5580米表层沉积物Cd含量与δ114/110Cd并进行质量平衡分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 深海氧化远洋黏土埋藏较轻Cd同位素，约占海洋Cd输入的2%—18%。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统量化开放大洋氧化沉积物作为轻Cd同位素汇的作用与机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为完善海洋Cd生物地球化学与同位素质量平衡模型提供关键约束。

works.title: Cadmium isotope systematics in seep carbonates: Constraints on depth-dependent partitioning and paleoenvironmental implications
works.abstract: Cadmium (Cd) isotopes are emerging tracers of marine biogeochemical cycling, but their incorporation into seep carbonates—abundant yet underutilized archives in the sedimentary record—remains poorly constrained. Here we report Cd contents and δ 114/110 Cd values of seep carbonates from the South China Sea and the Gulf of Mexico. Sequential extraction experiments demonstrate that Cd is predominantly hosted in carbonate minerals rather than in sulfides, organic matter, or Fe Mn oxides. Distinct δ 114/110 Cd signatures are observed across carbonate mineral types, indicating that formation depth rather than mineralogy primarily controls Cd isotope partitioning in seep carbonates. Specifically, aragonite is isotopically lighter than or similar to bottom seawater, high-Mg calcite (HMC) exhibits δ 114/110 Cd values consistent with bottom seawater, whereas dolomite exhibits lower values than co-occurring HMC. This distribution pattern is primarily controlled by the depth of the sulfate-methane transition zone rather than carbonate mineral facies. Because aragonite and HMC form at shallow seafloor depths while dolomite precipitates at greater depths, the δ 114/110 Cd values of seep carbonates provide valuable records of pore-water conditions during carbonate formation. Compared with inorganic precipitation experiments, seep carbonates show a reduced magnitude of Cd isotopic fractionation, implying stronger controls from pore-water processes in natural settings. These results indicate that aragonite- and HMC-dominated seep carbonates can archive bottom seawater Cd isotopes, whereas dolomite preferentially records deeper pore-water signals. Seep carbonates thus provide a complementary archive for reconstructing Cd cycling and bottom seawater–pore-water gradients in early diagenetic environments.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 渗漏碳酸盐中的镉同位素体系：对深度依赖性分配的约束及其古环境意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究渗漏成岩碳酸盐中Cd同位素如何分配，并受形成深度或矿物类型控制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析南海和墨西哥湾样品的Cd含量与δ114/110Cd，并进行连续提取实验。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Cd主要赋存于碳酸盐；同位素分配主要受形成深度控制，浅部记录海水、深部白云石记录孔隙水。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统建立渗漏碳酸盐Cd同位素—形成深度关系，区分海水与深部孔隙水信号。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建海洋Cd循环及早期成岩环境中的海水—孔隙水梯度提供新代用指标。

works.title: Zinc isotope evidence for extensive carbonate recycling in the Arctic asthenosphere
works.abstract: Carbon in the asthenosphere is unevenly distributed, reflecting interactions between the depleted mantle and materials added by plumes or subducting slabs. Nevertheless, mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORB) from the Arctic Gakkel Ridge, far from any existent hotspots and subduction zones, are unusually carbon-rich. Here we show that the MORB along the Gakkel Ridge display systematically elevated Zn isotopes (δ66Zn = 0.27‰–0.41‰) relative to typical global MORB (0.26 ± 0.03‰). Their heavy δ66Zn ratios correlate with indicators for mantle source carbon enrichment. We attribute this signature to result from recycled surficial carbonates stored in deep upper mantle under the Arctic Ocean. These carbonate components were likely delivered by ancient oceanic subduction and subsequently entrained into the mantle upwelling feeding the Gakkel Ridge. Our results demonstrate that vestiges of past subduction can dominate carbon budgets beneath plume‑unaffected ridges, and act as a principal driver of large‑scale carbon heterogeneity in the upper mantle. Zinc isotopes in basalts along a 1,100-km transect of the Gakkel Ridge record widespread mantle recycling of surface carbonates via ancient oceanic subduction, explaining the unusually carbon-rich nature of the Arctic asthenosphere.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 锌同位素证据表明北极软流圈中存在广泛的碳酸盐再循环

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究北极Gakkel洋脊MORB异常富碳的地幔来源与成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 沿1100公里洋脊测定MORB锌同位素，并结合碳富集地球化学指标分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Gakkel洋脊MORB具偏重锌同位素，指示深部上地幔广泛存在再循环表生碳酸盐。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以锌同位素系统追踪无热点、无现今俯冲洋脊下的古老碳酸盐再循环。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释上地幔碳不均一性及古俯冲对洋脊碳预算的长期影响提供关键证据。

works.title: Hydrous multi-stage mantle melting controls gold enrichment in mafic Kermadec arc magmas
works.abstract: Abstract Many exceptionally Au-rich deposits are associated with subduction zones and Au-rich magmas. However, the origin of Au enrichment in arc magmas remains controversial. Here, we present a new high-precision geochemical dataset on 66 submarine glasses from the length of the oceanic Kermadec arc and Havre Trough back-arc system. The combined systematics of Au with other chalcophile elements (Ag, Cu, Se, Pt) shows that hydrous melting in the Kermadec subarc mantle occurs predominantely at relatively high temperatures above the sulfide liquidus and produces magmas with mantle-like Ag/Cu values. The highest Au (up to 6 ng/g) and Au/Cu (up to 0.06 × 10 -3 ) exceeds that in fertile mantle and primitive MORB by far, requiring remelting of previously depleted mantle. We demonstrate that high-degree multiple-stage melting of hydrous and oxidized subarc mantle are major drivers of Au enrichment of parental magmas in intra-oceanic island arcs, such as the Kermadec arc.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 基性克马德克岛弧岩浆中的金富集受富水多阶段地幔熔融控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲带弧岩浆中金异常富集的来源与控制机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析66件Kermadec弧及弧后海底玻璃的高精度地球化学数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 富水氧化地幔的多阶段高程度熔融可显著提高母岩浆金含量。
summary_bullets.innovation: 用金与Ag、Cu、Se、Pt协同约束，提出多阶段重熔致金富集模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解岛弧成矿与富金岩浆成因提供了新的地球化学依据。

works.title: Recycled oceanic crust into Paleo-Tethys plume source: Insights from Changning-Menglian orogenic belt
works.abstract: Plate-tectonic mechanisms drive the recycling of oceanic crust into Earth’s mantle, generating chemical and lithological heterogeneities that are believed to significantly influence plume-related magmatism on a global scale. Here, we present new constraints on the interaction between mantle plumes and recycled oceanic crust, based on integrated Os-Hf-O-Mg isotopes and whole-rock geochemical data (major and trace elements and platinum group elements [PGEs]). These analyses were performed on late Paleozoic picrites with mid-ocean-ridge basalt (MORB) affinity and picrites/basalts with oceanic-island basalt (OIB) affinity from the Changning-Menglian belt in southwestern China. Both MORB- and OIB-type picrites have Zn/Fe ratios <12 and 187Os/188Os ratios (0.113−0.131) similar to typical mantle values, suggesting a predominantly peridotite mantle source. In contrast, over half of the OIB-type basalts show elevated Zn/Fe ratios (>12) and 187Os/188Os ratios (up to 0.513) that deviate from typical mantle values, indicating a contribution from pyroxenite-derived melts. Zircons from these OIB-type basalts exhibit mantle-like εHf(t) values (+1.4 to +7.9) but crust-like δ18O values (+3.2‰ to +5.2‰), supporting the involvement of high-temperature altered oceanic crust in their source. These basalts also exhibit atypical PGE signatures marked by strong depletions in Pd and Ru relative to Ir, consistent with the incorporation of residual oceanic crust that previously experienced release of oxidizing fluids during plate subduction. Notably, the OIB-type basalts record systematically lower δ26Mg values (−0.57‰ to −0.31‰) compared to mantle peridotite (−0.25‰ ± 0.04‰). This light Mg isotope signature, coupled with elevated Hf/Sm ratios, indicates metasomatism of the mantle source by dolomitic melts derived from recycled carbonate-bearing oceanic crust. Thermal modeling yields anomalously high and overlapping mantle melting temperatures for MORB-type (1433−1542 °C) and OIB-type (1434−1678 °C) samples, supporting a cogenetic, plume-driven melting regime. Our results demonstrate that recycled oceanic crust was entrained by an ascending plume beneath the Paleo-Tethys Ocean, revealing a slab-plume interaction mechanism that contributes to the chemical and isotopic diversity observed in mantle sources. These findings enhance current understanding of deep Earth material cycling and the role of Paleo-Tethys evolution in supercontinent cycles.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 再循环洋壳进入古特提斯地幔柱源区：来自昌宁—孟连造山带的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究古特提斯地幔柱是否卷入再循环洋壳并造成源区不均一。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合Os-Hf-O-Mg同位素、全岩主微量/PGE地球化学及热模拟分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: OIB型玄武岩源区含再循环洋壳、辉石岩熔体及碳酸盐交代，且与MORB型同属地幔柱成因。
summary_bullets.innovation: 多同位素与PGE协同约束板片-地幔柱相互作用及再循环洋壳来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解深部物质循环、地幔源区多样性及古特提斯演化提供关键证据。

works.title: The stable K and Rb isotope composition of Icelandic basalts: Implications for mantle heterogeneity
works.abstract: Basalts erupted in Iceland show varying contributions from the depleted, recycled and primordial components present in the underlying heterogeneous mantle plume. While many Icelandic basalts have a substantial contribution from recycled mantle components, some do not, preserving instead magmas derived from depleted and primordial mantle components. Iceland provides an opportunity for characterising the compositions of different mantle domains and, in particular, to deconvolve the contributions of recycled and primordial components. In order to characterise the stable K and Rb isotope compositions in different mantle domains, we present K and Rb stable isotope data for 31 basaltic glasses, tholeiitic through transitional to alkalic in composition, sampled from Iceland's active neovolcanic zones. Our results show that δ 41 K values vary between −0.299 ± 0.025‰ and − 0.499 ± 0.021‰ (2SD) and δ 87 Rb values vary from −0.15 ± 0.04‰ to 0.02 ± 0.06‰ (2SD), in Icelandic basalts, extending outside of the range previously identified for the bulk silicate Earth (BSE, −0.42 ± 0.07‰ 2SD and − 0.13 ± 0.06‰ 2SD, respectively). While the δ 41 K values demonstrate no mantle-derived variation, the δ 87 Rb values show correlations with conventional mantle source proxies (e.g., radiogenic isotopes) indicating a mantle source control. The highest δ 87 Rb values, those furthest removed from BSE, are from two primitive glasses from southwest Iceland whose radiogenic and noble gas isotope ratios indicate minimal contributions from recycled material, but significant contributions from primordial material. These high δ 87 Rb values may represent δ 87 Rb values of the primordial component sampled by the mantle plume beneath Iceland, and therefore a vestige of Earth's earliest mantle.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 冰岛玄武岩中稳定 K 和 Rb 同位素组成：对地幔不均一性的意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究冰岛玄武岩K、Rb稳定同位素能否示踪地幔不均一性及原始/再循环组分。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定31个冰岛玄武岩玻璃的δ41K、δ87Rb，并结合放射性与稀有气体同位素对比。
summary_bullets.key_findings: δ41K未见明显地幔源变化，δ87Rb与地幔源指标相关，原始地幔组分可能更高。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统区分冰岛地幔柱中K与Rb稳定同位素对再循环和原始组分的不同响应。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别地幔源区组成及追踪地球早期原始地幔残余提供新的同位素约束。

works.title: Constraints on Noble Gas Variability in OIB and MORB From Non‐Equilibrium Magmatic Degassing Models
works.abstract: Abstract Noble gas concentrations in ocean island basalts (OIB) and mid‐ocean ridge basalts (MORB) are affected by degassing processes, obscuring their pre‐eruptive characteristics. Degassing corrections commonly assume near‐equilibrium partitioning of noble gases between melt and vapor. However, kinetic disequilibrium has been proposed as a mechanism capable of modifying noble gas ratios. For example, kinetic effects may allow OIBs to exhibit lower 3 He contents than MORBs, even if OIB plumes sample a low 4 He/ 3 He “undegassed” primordial lower mantle—the so‐called “Helium Paradox” (Gonnermann & Mukhopadhyay, 2007, https://doi.org/10.1038/nature06240 ). It has also been suggested that kinetic effects allow OIB and MORB to share a homogeneous pre‐degassing 3 He/ 22 Ne ratio. Despite this, inferred mantle compositions may not require the presence of an “undegassed” reservoir, and there is evidence that OIB and MORB sources exhibit heterogenous 3 He/ 22 Ne ratios. Here, we model the kinetics of and noble gas exchange between bubbles and melt within a three‐stage framework for magmatic ascent to evaluate the magnitude of non‐equilibrium fractionation. The first and third stages treat the kinetics of bubble growth during closed‐system decompression, whilst the second treats gas exchange between ascending bubbles and a melt at rest within a shallow, open‐system, sub‐volcanic reservoir. Across plausible ranges of ascent rate, bubble populations, and noble gas diffusivity, our results indicate that disequilibrium cannot produce variations in 3 He contents and 3 He/ 22 Ne ratios sufficient to reproduce the range observed in OIB and MORB. Therefore, OIB and MORB sources cannot share a homogenous 3 He/ 22 Ne ratio, and disequilibrium does not resolve the “Helium Paradox.”
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 基于非平衡岩浆脱气模型对 OIB 和 MORB 中稀有气体变异性的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究岩浆脱气非平衡动力学能否解释OIB与MORB稀有气体差异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 构建三阶段岩浆上升脱气模型，模拟气泡生长与熔体—气泡稀有气体交换。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 非平衡分馏幅度不足以再现观测到的3He含量和3He/22Ne差异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将封闭与开放体系脱气过程整合，系统约束非平衡效应的上限。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地幔源区是否均一及“氦悖论”提供定量检验，改进稀有气体示踪解释。

works.title: Phanerozoic seawater Mg/Ca variations driven by supercontinent cycles
works.abstract: Seawater Mg/Ca has oscillated markedly over the Phanerozoic, closely associated with secular variations in sedimentation, icehouse-greenhouse fluctuations, and the evolution of calcifying invertebrates. However, the drivers of these long-term oscillations remain unresolved. Here, we develop an inverse model that couples seawater Mg concentration and Mg isotope composition variations. By exploiting the contrasting Mg isotopic fractionation associated with Mg-silicate formation and dolomitization, this model quantifies the major marine Mg sinks. Model results show that increases in seawater Mg/Ca during supercontinent assembly were explained by reduced rates of silicate alteration and dolomitization. In contrast, decreases in seawater Mg/Ca during periods of supercontinent stasis and early breakup were driven by intensified Mg-silicate formation and dolomitization. Variations in marine Mg-silicate and dolomite formation were further regulated by seafloor spreading, continental configuration, and climate throughout the supercontinent cycle. Together, our results identify the supercontinent cycle as a first-order regulator of Phanerozoic seawater Mg/Ca through its control on marine Mg-silicate and dolomite fluxes. An element-isotope coupled inverse model quantifies marine Mg removal rates via silicate and dolomite formation, linking Phanerozoic seawater Mg/Ca oscillations to supercontinent-driven tectonic and climatic changes.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 显生宙海水 Mg/Ca 变化受超大陆旋回驱动

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究显生宙海水Mg/Ca长期振荡的主控机制是什么。
summary_bullets.methodology: 构建耦合海水镁浓度与镁同位素的逆模型，定量约束海洋镁汇。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 超大陆聚合期Mg/Ca升高，稳定与早裂解期则因镁硅酸盐和白云岩形成增强而降低。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次结合元素与同位素逆模型区分并量化两类主要海洋镁去除通量。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究将海水化学演化与构造气候循环联系起来，为古海洋与地球化学研究提供框架。

works.title: Modelling reveals redox budget transfer in Mariana-type subduction systems
works.abstract: Subduction transfers redox budgets from the surface into the mantle. Quantitative modelling of a Mariana-type subduction system shows that mantle oxidation is dominated by sulfur-rich fluids and Fe3+-rich melts at sub-arc and back-arc depths, respectively. Most of the redox budget is ultimately transported into the deep mantle with the subducting slab.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 建模揭示马里亚纳型俯冲系统中的氧化还原收支转移

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲带如何将地表氧化还原预算转移至地幔。
summary_bullets.methodology: 构建并定量模拟马里亚纳型俯冲系统的氧化还原收支。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 弧下以富硫流体致氧化，弧后以富Fe3+熔体主导，且多数预算随板片入深地幔。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次定量区分不同深度氧化介质对地幔氧化的相对贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地幔氧化状态、挥发分循环与弧岩浆成因提供关键约束。

works.title: Tropical mafic rock weathering, riverine lithium isotopes, and the evolution of Cenozoic seawater chemistry
works.abstract: The terrestrial dissolved riverine lithium isotope (δ 7 Li diss ) flux can provide valuable information on silicate weathering processes, which are directly tied to the long-term carbon cycle, at various spatiotemporal scales. However, a limited understanding of how bedrock lithological composition impacts δ 7 Li diss values hinders the utility of the Li proxy for deep-time weathering reconstructions. Accordingly, we investigated tropical rivers in the Philippines and Mariana Islands that drain either distinctly ultramafic-to-mafic or silicic bedrock. We find that mafic lithologies produce markedly heavier δ 7 Li diss than those draining silicic lithologies, potentially due to preferential formation of Mg-rich clays during incongruent weathering. Furthermore, we observe that known tectonically driven changes in Earth’s global ophiolitic-collisional suture length correlate with the marine δ 7 Li record over the past ∼60 million years. This observation, supported by mass-balance modelling, indicates that variations in mafic bedrock weathering could have been an important influence on Cenozoic seawater chemistry.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 热带镁铁质岩石风化、河流锂同位素与新生代海水化学演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨基岩岩性如何影响河流溶解态锂同位素及新生代海水化学演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采样菲律宾和马里亚纳热带河流，对比镁铁质与硅质流域锂同位素并结合质量平衡建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 镁铁质岩流域产生更高δ7Li，且蛇绿岩缝合带长度变化与海洋δ7Li记录相关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统连接热带镁铁质风化、河流锂同位素与约六千万年海水化学变化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究提升锂同位素作为深时硅酸盐风化与长期碳循环代用指标的可靠性。

works.title: Theoretical evaluation of kinetic triple oxygen isotope fractionation during phosphoric acid digestion of carbonates
works.abstract: Triple-oxygen isotope compositions (Δ ’17 O) in carbonates serve as valuable proxies for reconstructing past environments, with applications ranging from humidity to hydrological cycles and diagenetic history. High-precision Δ ’17 O measurements are essential to validate these applications, with the measurement of Δ ’17 O on CO 2 extracted through phosphoric acid digestion of carbonates being a common practice. However, since this process does not achieve 100% oxygen extraction, kinetic isotope fractionation factors, i.e. 1000ln 18 α CO2/carb and θ CO2/carb ( ln 17 α CO2/carb /ln 18 α CO2/carb ), are critical for accurately translating the measured Δ ’17 O to that of the associated carbonate samples. Notably, a significant discrepancy exists between theoretically predicted θ CO2/carb values (e.g. 0.525–0.529) and experimental observations (e.g. 0.5170–0.5230), even though the 1000ln 18 α CO2/carb values align between the two approaches. We propose that this discrepancy stems from an incomplete treatment of solvation effects in previous theoretical studies. To test this hypothesis, we conducted quantum mechanical calculations that explicitly incorporate phosphoric acid molecules as solvent species.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碳酸盐磷酸消解过程中动力学三氧同位素分馏的理论评估

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究碳酸盐磷酸消解中三氧同位素动力学分馏参数偏差成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用显式加入磷酸分子的量子力学计算评估分馏因子。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 理论与实验θ值差异主要源于以往理论对溶剂化效应处理不足。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将磷酸分子显式作为溶剂纳入该过程的理论分馏计算。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助于更准确换算碳酸盐Δ’17O并提升古环境重建可靠性。

works.title: Geochemical characteristics of lithium in geothermal waters and its impact on riverine Li in the southeastern Tibetan Plateau
works.abstract: Variations in seawater lithium isotopes (δ 7 Li) are commonly linked to changes in continental silicate weathering fluxes. However, the influence of geothermal fluid input on riverine lithium, particularly in tectonically active regions, remains poorly constrained. Here, samples from hot springs along the Lancang River (LCR) in the southeastern Tibetan Plateau (TP) were collected for analysis of hydrochemistry, Li isotope composition (δ 7 Li) and water-rock interactions to study the geochemical characteristics of Li in geothermal waters and corresponding impact on riverine Li. Geothermal waters exhibit high Li concentrations (Li geo , 0.04–2.1 mg/L) and low Li isotope ratios (δ 7 Li geo , −0.56 to +12.3‰). High reservoir temperatures along the LCR (93–176 °C) facilitate water-rock interaction and leach more Li from surrounding rocks into geothermal waters. The Li geo and δ 7 Li geo are influenced by fluid residence time and the dissolution-precipitation balance. Geothermal waters with longer residence time have higher Li geo concentrations, whereas secondary mineral formation preferentially sequesters light Li, resulting in the enrichment of isotopically heavy Li in the residual geothermal fluid. The LCR exhibits elevated mean Li concentration (Li diss ) and depressed mean Li isotope ratio (δ 7 Li diss ) relative to global river averages, with both parameters tracking downstream variations in geothermal inputs. The mixing model estimates that the contribution of geothermal waters decreases downstream. The concomitant downstream increase in δ 7 Li diss may reflect either declining geothermal contribution or increased secondary mineral formation. Our study provides evidence for the significant impact of geothermal water on riverine Li, and therefore potentially linked to changes in seawater δ 7 Li records through Earth's history.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 青藏高原东南部地热水中锂的地球化学特征及其对河流水体锂的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究东南青藏高原地热流体如何影响河流锂含量与锂同位素组成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采集澜沧江温泉样品，分析水化学、锂同位素及水岩相互作用，并用混合模型评估贡献。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地热水富锂且δ7Li偏低，显著抬升河流锂浓度并压低锂同位素，且影响沿程递减。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将地热水停留时间、次生矿物形成与河流锂同位素变化联系起来，定量约束地热贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于正确解读河流至海水锂同位素记录及大陆风化强度变化。

works.title: Neodymium stable isotope fractionation in minerals: Implications for Earth’s differentiation, and planetary formation
works.abstract: The application of rare Earth element stable isotope compositions has become of increasing interest in geochemistry. Recently, studies have begun exploring variations in the stable 146 Nd /144 Nd isotope ratio in geological samples, with limited isotope fractionation observed in igneous rocks but significantly larger fractionations seen in low temperature systems. Experimental and theoretical studies on the equilibrium isotope fractionation of Nd are widely missing which can support understanding the fractionation of Nd isotopes among Earth’s major reservoirs. Here, we have modelled the isotope fractionation factors for 15 common rock forming and accessory minerals to help understand equilibrium stable isotope fractionation during medium to high temperature processes.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 矿物中钕稳定同位素分馏：对地球分异与行星形成的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究Nd稳定同位素在常见矿物中的平衡分馏及其地球化学意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过理论建模计算15种常见造岩与副矿物的Nd同位素分馏因子。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 中高温过程Nd分馏总体有限，但不同矿物间存在可量化的平衡分馏差异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 填补Nd平衡同位素分馏实验与理论研究不足，建立矿物分馏预测框架。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释地球分异与行星形成中Nd同位素变化提供关键理论约束。

works.title: The impact of forearc serpentinization on the composition of subduction-zone fluids revealed by Mg–Fe isotopes in jadeitites
works.abstract: Subduction-zone fluids play a critical role in mass transfer and crust-mantle evolution at convergent plate margins, yet their exact sources and fluid-rock interaction processes remain debated. Jadeitites in forearc serpentinite mélanges serve as unique archives for these fluids. Here, we present high-precision Mg–Fe isotopic data for jadeitites and jadeite-rich rocks from the Rio San Juan Complex (RSJC), Dominican Republic and integrate data from worldwide jadeitites to constrain fluid sources and geochemical evolution in the forearc mantle wedge. RSJC jadeitites exhibit low δ 26 Mg values (from −0.92‰ to −0.16‰, average = −0.48 ± 0.32‰, 2SD, n = 21) that lack correlations with carbonate indicators, precluding a significant carbonate contribution. Instead, the coupling of light Mg isotopes with enriched Ni and Cr contents, together with systematic negative correlations among δ 26 Mg, Na 2 O/TiO 2 , MgO and Ni, fingerprints a substantial contribution from serpentinizing fluids at forearc depths. In contrast to the light Fe isotope signatures of Myanmar jadeitites, RSJC jadeitites display relatively high δ 56 Fe values (−0.08‰ to 0.29‰, average = 0.15 ± 0.16‰, 2SD, n = 20). Systematic covariations between δ 56 Fe values, TFe 2 O 3 contents and redox-sensitive proxies (V/Sc, U/Th, Ce anomalies and Sb/As) in jadeitites from the RSJC and Myanmar indicate that Fe isotope heterogeneity is primarily controlled by the redox state of the fluids. By integrating petrological and geochemical constraints, we propose that forearc serpentinization acts as a critical redox filter that governs the coupled Mg–Fe isotope heterogeneity of jadeitites. Olivine-dominated serpentinization generates reducing conditions and promotes Fe isotope fractionation, producing light Fe isotopic signatures as recorded by Myanmar jadeitites. In contrast, serpentinization involving orthopyroxene buffers the system under relatively oxidizing conditions, preserving high δ 56 Fe values in RSJC jadeitites. Jadeitite-forming fluids are best explained as mixtures of AOC-derived and serpentinizing fluid components, which either directly precipitate P-type jadeitites or metasomatize igneous protoliths to form R-type jadeitites. The subduction and melting of these rocks may transfer light Mg and heterogeneous Fe isotopic signatures to the mantle wedge and related arc magmas. Forearc serpentinization thus exerts critical control on the redox state and chemical evolution of subduction-zone fluids, with important implications for the chemical heterogeneity of the mantle wedge.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 前弧蛇纹岩化对俯冲带流体组成的影响：来自硬玉岩中镁-铁同位素的揭示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨前弧蛇纹岩化如何影响俯冲带流体来源、氧化还原状态及Mg-Fe同位素组成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过测定多米尼加RSJC硬玉岩Mg-Fe同位素，并结合全球样品岩石学与地球化学对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: RSJC硬玉岩流体主要含蛇纹岩化成分，Fe同位素差异主要受流体氧化还原状态控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统用耦合Mg-Fe同位素揭示前弧蛇纹岩化对硬玉岩成因与流体演化的控制作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于理解俯冲带物质迁移、地幔楔化学不均一性及弧岩浆源区演化机制。

works.title: Stable neodymium isotopic fractionation during plate subduction: insights from back-arc basin basalts
works.abstract: Plate subduction transports surface materials into the mantle, altering its chemical and isotopic composition. As an emerging geochemical proxy, stable neodymium (Nd) isotopes hold great potential for tracing recycled subducted materials; however, their isotopic fractionation behavior during subduction remains poorly constrained. Back-arc basin basalts (BABB), which range compositionally from MORB- to arc-like due to variable contributions of subducted fluids and sediments, provide an ideal natural laboratory to investigate the behavior of stable Nd isotopes in subduction zones. In this study, we present high-precision stable Nd isotopic composition ( δ 146/144 Nd) of twenty-one fresh basaltic glasses from the Woodlark Basin, Vate Trough, and Lau Basin in the southwestern Pacific. Our results reveal that samples exhibit narrow variations in δ 146/144 Nd ranging from −0.048‰ to −0.005‰ with an average of −0.022 ± 0.018‰ (2SD, n = 21), similar to that of the Bulk Silicate Earth (BSE, −0.024 ± 0.031‰, 2SD) and global mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORB) reported in literature (−0.025 ± 0.013‰, 2SD). δ 146/144 Nd exhibited no correlation with indices of magma differentiation (MgO, CaO/Al 2 O 3 , Sr/Nd, Eu/Eu*) or partial melting (Nb/Yb, Sm N /Yb N ), indicating that magmatic processes exert a negligible influence on Nd isotopic fractionation. Additionally, δ 146/144 Nd showed no resolvable correlations with subduction indicators (e.g., Ce/Pb, Nb/U, Ba/La, and Th/Yb). However, for BABB from the Lau Basin, weak but resolvable correlations were observed between δ 146/144 Nd and 87 Sr/ 86 Sr (r 2 = 0.40) and 143 Nd/ 144 Nd (r 2 = 0.41). The binary mixing model demonstrates that this relationship cannot be solely explained by the addition of recycled sediments. Instead, fluids derived from the altered oceanic crust (AOC) play a key role in generating the subtle Nd isotopic variations observed in the Lau Basin BABB. Our model suggests that less than 10% contribution of an AOC-sediment mixture (95–100% AOC) to the mantle source can explain the stable Nd isotopic variation of BABB. Therefore, we conclude that both AOC and sediments significantly influence the Nd isotopic composition of BABB, demonstrating that stable Nd isotopes have the potential to trace subduction components.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 板块俯冲过程中稳定钕同位素分馏：来自弧后盆地玄武岩的认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲过程中稳定Nd同位素是否分馏及其对再循环物质的示踪能力。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定西南太平洋三处21件BABB玻璃的高精度δ146/144Nd并结合相关性与混合建模分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: BABB的δ146/144Nd接近BSE和MORB，岩浆过程影响很小，微弱变化主要受AOC流体输入控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统利用BABB约束俯冲带稳定Nd同位素行为并量化AOC-沉积物混合贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别俯冲再循环组分提供新同位素示踪工具，提升对地幔化学演化的认识。

works.title: Tracing the origin of mantle heterogeneities with the Fe isotopic composition of Southwest Indian Ridge Basalts
works.abstract: The peculiar Sr–Nd–Pb–Hf isotopic compositions of Southwest Indian Ridge (SWIR) basalts, referred to as the DUPAL anomaly, have been attributed to the recycling of Lower Continental Crust (LCC) mafic lithologies. Iron stable isotope represents a promising proxy for providing further insight into the lithological nature of the DUPAL anomaly. We report Fe isotope and Rare Earth Element (REE) data for 27 basaltic glasses along the SWIR axis between 49° and 69°E longitude. The δ 56 Fe values (deviation in 56 Fe/ 54 Fe from the IRMM-014 standard, expressed in parts per thousand) of SWIR basalts range from +0.06‰ to +0.16‰, falling within the typical range of Mid-Oceanic Ridge basalts (MORB). Variations in δ 56 Fe can only be partially explained by fractional crystallization. In particular, the easternmost SWIR basalts (Zone A) display the full range of δ 56 Fe variation at nearly constant MgO. When corrected for the effects of fractional crystallization, Zone A basalts exhibit positive correlations among δ 56 Fe, Na 2 O, and Light REE enrichment. These trends can be accounted for by mixing of melts derived from depleted peridotite and enriched pyroxenite sources. Furthermore, the linear and negative Fe–Pb isotopic array defined by Zone A basalts provides key constraints on the origin of the heavy δ 56 Fe pyroxenitic component. In particular, the involvement of an ancient low degree (Low-F) melt metasomatic source or recycled DUPAL-like LCC can be excluded. We infer that the heavy δ 56 Fe and unradiogenic Pb signatures of SWIR basalts are consistent with a contribution from ancient, recycled, sulfide-bearing pyroxenites.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 利用西南印度洋中脊玄武岩的Fe同位素组成追踪地幔非均一性的来源

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究SWIR玄武岩DUPAL异常的地幔非均一体来源与岩性性质。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定49°–69°E段27个玻璃样品的Fe同位素与REE，并结合分异校正和同位素相关分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Zone A玄武岩的重Fe同位素与富集特征表明其源区为亏损橄榄岩与古老含硫辉石岩混合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以Fe稳定同位素联合Pb等指标有效排除LCC回收与低度熔体交代源解释。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别洋中脊地幔异质性及再循环地壳物质类型提供了新的地球化学约束。

works.title: Melt-depleted plume mantle sourced the oldest Atlantic Ocean crust
works.abstract: Mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORBs) are known to sample the heterogeneous uppermost mantle, providing insights into the mantle’s evolution. Early oceanic crust may have documented information about the nature of convecting mantle during the breakup of continent and the opening of ocean. This study examined MORBs from various Deep Sea Drilling Project sites at the Central Atlantic, spanning ages from 160 to 80 Ma. Systematic differences in chemical compositions emerge between the oldest (>140 Ma) and younger (<140 Ma) basalts. The oldest Atlantic crust demonstrate pronounced reduction in rare earth element abundances, yet are anomalously enriched in Sr, as well as more enriched Sr–Nd–Hf isotope compositions relative to the younger, more normal-MORB-like crust. Geochemical and isotopic data from the oldest Atlantic crust indicate the presence of plume materials emplaced beneath the young Atlantic Ridge. These plume materials have undergone a complex evolution, involving ancient melt extraction likely related to the magmatism of Central Atlantic Magmatic Province, subsequent re-enrichment by percolating melts, and then remelting at Mid-Atlantic Ridge. The results demonstrate that the compositions of the oldest Atlantic MORBs reflect dynamic mantle processes rather than simple binary mixing between homogeneous depleted and enriched end-members. Our findings highlight the role of melt-depleted lithology played in mid-ocean ridge magmatism and shaping the compositional heterogeneity in the convecting mantle throughout geological time.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 最古老大西洋洋壳的物质来源于熔体亏损的地幔柱地幔

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究最古老大西洋洋壳MORB成因及其揭示的地幔演化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析中大西洋DSDP站位160–80Ma MORB的地球化学与Sr-Nd-Hf同位素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 140Ma前洋壳源于熔体亏损的地幔柱物质，而非简单端元混合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出最老大西洋MORB记录了亏损地幔柱经再富集后在洋脊重熔。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为大陆裂解、洋盆初开及对流地幔非均一性研究提供关键约束。

works.title: Tracking high-field-strength-element enrichment pathways in alkaline granites: Insights from potassium and barium isotopes
works.abstract: High-field-strength-element (HFSE)-enriched alkaline granites serve as critical repositories for metals such as Zr, Nb, and the rare earth elements (REEs). However, the extent to which HFSE enrichment in alkaline granites reflects magmatic differentiation versus hydrothermal overprint remains debated. Here, we employ potassium (K) and barium (Ba) isotope systematics from the Baerzhe peralkaline granite pluton in NE China, which hosts a world-class Zr-Nb-Be-REE deposit, to distinguish the respective roles of magmatic and hydrothermal processes in HFSE enrichment. Whole-rock major and trace element determinations, Nd isotope measurements, and high-precision K and Ba isotope analyses were conducted on barren and ore-related granite samples. The ore-related granites are markedly Ba-depleted (8.02–42.1 ppm) with highly variable δ 138/134 Ba (−0.35 to + 0.15 ‰), whereas the barren granites retain high Ba contents (910–1454 ppm) and homogeneous δ 138/134 Ba (−0.05 to +0.04 ‰). Likewise, ore-related samples record a broader range of isotopically lower δ 41 K values (down to − 0.62 ‰), in contrast to the narrow, near-crustal δ 41 K range of barren granites (–0.49 to –0.35 ‰). These geochemical and isotopic disparities reflect distinct evolutionary paths. Our results reveal that extensive fractional crystallization plays a pivotal role in HFSE pre-concentration. Prolonged crystallization of alkali feldspar preferentially sequesters heavy K isotopes, yielding an isotopically lighter residual melt that formed the HFSE-rich granites. Barren granites, with limited feldspar removal, preserve crust-like δ 41 K signatures. In contrast, Ba isotopes are highly sensitive to post-magmatic fluids. Instead of trending towards heavier Ba isotope compositions under K-feldspar-dominated closed-system fractional crystallization, the Baerzhe ore-related granites show lower and more variable δ 138/134 Ba due to late-stage Na- and F-rich hydrothermal metasomatism that remobilized HFSEs and induced Ba isotopic exchange. This is reflected by the correlation between δ 138/134 Ba values and the concentrations of these elements. Notably, this fluid overprint altered Ba isotopic compositions without measurably shifting δ 41 K, which remained governed by its magmatic history. Our study demonstrates that K isotopes reliably record magmatic differentiation, whereas Ba isotopes serve as sensitive monitors of subsequent hydrothermal processes. The complementary use of these isotopic systems provides a robust framework for disentangling the complex interplay between magmatic and hydrothermal processes in alkaline granite-hosted HFSE ore systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碱性花岗岩中高场强元素富集路径追踪：来自钾和钡同位素的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究碱性花岗岩中HFSE富集主要受岩浆分异还是热液改造控制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对拜尔哲矿体相关与贫矿花岗岩开展主微量元素、Nd及高精度K-Ba同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: K同位素记录长时间分离结晶致HFSE预富集，Ba同位素指示晚期富Na-F热液重活化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合K与Ba同位素解耦碱性花岗岩中岩浆过程与热液过程的贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为判别HFSE成矿机制与矿化指示标志提供可推广的同位素框架。

works.title: Mo isotopes in Aleutian sediments: serpentinite-eclogite-sediment mixing and slab depth controls in arc magmas
works.abstract: Sediments are considered important sources of Mo for arc magmatism, yet Mo isotope analyses of sediments outboard arc trenches are scarce. We report Mo isotopes ( δ 98/95 Mo) and Mo concentrations for sediments (n = 48) on the Pacific plate, outboard the Aleutian arc from drill cores ODP 886C (n = 19), DSDP 183 (n = 10), IODP 1417 (n = 9) and DSDP 178 (n = 10), and sulfur concentrations in the IODP 1417 samples. With this data, we estimate the mean weighted Mo isotope composition of Aleutian sediments and sediment-derived Mo fluxes along the arc. Additionally, we report Mo isotope systematics on Aleutian lavas from Recheshnoi (n = 3), Makushin (n = 5), Akutan (n = 2), Shishaldin (n = 5) and Frosty Peak (n = 4) to better constrain the Mo systematics in areas east of the Amlia Fracture Zone (AFZ). Aleutian sediments show a wide range of δ 98/95 Mo (–2.0‰ to + 1.2‰) and Mo concentrations (0.2–1121 µg/g) but predominantly low, MORB-like mean weighted δ 98/95 Mo: –0.32‰ (ODP 886C), –0.31‰ (DSDP 183), –0.21‰ (DSDP 178), and + 0.10‰ (IODP 1417). Pelagic sediments with Fe-Mn oxyhydroxides have extremely high Mo concentrations (up to 1121 µg/g), and light δ 98/95 Mo values (–0.46 to –0.19‰). Turbidites with high sulfur concentrations (5000 – 11214 µg/g) have lower Mo concentrations (1.1 – 4.2 µg/g) and heavier Mo isotopes ( δ 98/95 Mo = 0.0 to + 0.32‰), reflecting pyrite precipitation under localized reducing conditions. Aleutian sediments contribute high Mo fluxes (∼200–500 g/(m*yr)) with low δ 98/95 Mo (–0.29‰ to –0.26‰) in the western/central arc and lower fluxes (∼65 g/(m*yr)) with higher δ 98/95 Mo (–0.02‰ to –0.01‰) in the eastern arc. Eastern Aleutian lavas have low δ 98/95 Mo (–0.54‰ to 0.00‰) that further show that high δ 98/95 Mo values (>0‰) are restricted to lavas near the AFZ. Importantly, no bulk sediment can account for these high δ 98/95 Mo values. Instead, from Mo and radiogenic isotopes and trace elements, as well as slab depth observations, the Mo isotope systematics of Aleutian lavas are best explained by a mixture of serpentinite, eclogite and sediments (likely in a mélange style). At the AFZ, the high δ 98/95 Mo can be explained with a higher proportion of the serpentinite component derived from the subduction of the AFZ and shallower slab depths, while in eastern/western lavas with low δ 98/95 Mo partial melting of the subducting plate in eclogitic facies and sediment sources (as well ambient depleted mantle) play a bigger role. Our study shows that Mo isotopes provide a powerful tool to identify source components and the mechanisms of their incorporation into arc magmas.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 阿留申沉积物中的钼同位素：蛇纹岩-榴辉岩-沉积物混合及板片深度对弧岩浆的控制作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究阿留申俯冲带沉积物Mo同位素如何控制弧岩浆来源与深度效应。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定多钻孔沉积物与多火山熔岩的Mo同位素、Mo/S含量并估算沿弧通量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高δ98/95Mo熔岩仅见AFZ附近，最佳解释为蛇纹岩-榴辉岩-沉积物混合及板片深度差异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统约束阿留申海沟外沉积物Mo同位素通量并联结弧熔岩源区混合模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明Mo同位素可有效示踪俯冲输入组分及其进入弧岩浆的机制。

works.title: Fluid assimilation-fractional crystallization drives heavy zinc isotope enrichment in Himalayan leucogranites
works.abstract: Abstract The Himalayan leucogranites represent typical high-silica (SiO2 > 70 wt.%) granite in continental collisional orogens. Their petrogenesis commonly involves crustal anatexis, fractional crystallization, and magmatic-hydrothermal processes, and is thus crucial for understanding the formation and evolution of the upper continental crust. Recent advances in multiple non-traditional stable isotopes have revealed extreme fractionation in these leucogranites. However, the role of magmatic-hydrothermal processes in shaping such isotopic signatures remains controversial, particularly for fluid-mobile elements like Zn. Here, we characterize the geochemical and Zn isotope signatures of highly evolved Kampa and Qianjingou leucogranites in the Himalayan orogen. These leucogranites exhibit significantly elevated δ66Zn values (0.29‰ to 0.91‰) compared to the average value of upper continental crust, which cannot be attributed to chemical weathering, source heterogeneity, or partial melting. Quantitative modeling shows that the Zn elemental and isotope characteristics of the Himalayan leucogranites also cannot be reproduced by fractional crystallization alone. We propose that a fluid assimilation-fractional crystallization (FAFC) process can well explain the heavy Zn isotope enrichment in the Himalayan leucogranites. Specifically, with the addition of magmatic fluids exsolved from underlying magma reservoirs, the Zn-depletion caused by fractional crystallization is partially compensated, and heavy Zn isotopes are preferentially introduced. This model is supported by the covariation between δ66Zn and both δ138/134Ba and δ87Rb within the Kampa samples, because deep magmatic fluids are simultaneously enriched in light Ba isotopes and heavy Rb isotopes. Analysis of major rock-forming minerals suggests that mica and tourmaline control the main Zn budget in the Himalayan leucogranites. These volatile-rich minerals exhibit δ66Zn values higher than those of coexisting plagioclase, which contradicts theoretically predicted inter-mineral Zn isotope fractionation trends. This phenomenon likely reflects the modification of shallow magma compositions by deep magmatic fluids as well. Meanwhile, ascending magmatic fluids can efficiently scavenge fluid-mobile fluxing components and rare metals to shallow levels of the magmatic system, thereby promoting crystal-melt separation and rare-metal enrichment in highly evolved granites. Therefore, the FAFC process should have made an important contribution to the formation of rare-metal mineralization and the extreme differentiation of the upper continental crust.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 流体混染—分离结晶作用驱动喜马拉雅淡色花岗岩中重锌同位素富集

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究喜马拉雅淡色花岗岩重锌同位素富集的成因机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合地球化学、锌同位素分析、定量模型及矿物组成对比研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 单纯分离结晶无法解释数据，FAFC过程可导致重锌同位素显著富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出深部岩浆流体混染—分离结晶联合控制锌同位素的新模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为高硅花岗岩演化、稀有金属成矿及上地壳分异提供新约束。

works.title: Two‐Stage Dolomite Formation in Carbonate Platforms Revealed by Carbonate Clumped Isotope Thermometry
works.abstract: Abstract The “dolomite problem” refers to the scarcity of dolomite in Cenozoic marine environments compared with its abundance in earlier strata. This discrepancy has been attributed to changes in marine environments or to insufficient thermal maturity required for dolomite formation. We measured carbon, oxygen, and clumped isotope compositions of carbonate rocks from the Albian Nahal Me'arot reef complex (north Israel), where dolomite is confined to back‐reef lagoon facies and associated with reflux‐brine dolomitization, a process thought responsible for large volumes of dolomite in Phanerozoic rocks. Results show a negative trend between TΔ 47 (29–54°C) and δ 18 O dolomite (−3.25 to −1.35 ‰VPDB), consistent with burial alteration, and support a two‐stage process: (a) proto‐dolomite formation near the lagoon floor, and (b) recrystallization during burial. Together with compilations of Mg/Ca ratios in Cenozoic marine carbonates predicting more dolomite than observed directly, our results suggest that insufficient thermal maturity has limited dolomite formation in Cenozoic strata.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碳酸盐团簇同位素测温揭示碳酸盐台地中白云石的两阶段形成

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究为何新生代海相白云岩稀少，而早期地层却广泛富集。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定以色列礁相碳酸盐的碳氧及团簇同位素，并结合相带与Mg/Ca资料分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 白云岩经历泻湖底原白云石形成与埋藏期重结晶两阶段，温度不足限制新生代形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 用团簇同位素温度计直接识别白云岩两阶段形成与后期埋藏改造过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为解释白云岩难题及重建古海洋成岩环境提供了新的定量约束。

works.title: Iron mobility and redox transfer in the oceanic lithosphere during nascent subduction of Neotethys Ocean
works.abstract: Hydration of oceanic crust and mantle peridotite is a critical process for fluid-rock interaction and element exchange within the oceanic lithosphere. Iron, a key redox-sensitive element, is an important tracer for investigating the redox transfer during this process. However, the mobility of iron and its isotopic composition in serpentinite-related fluids remain poorly known. Rodingites, generally formed through the metasomatic replacement of gabbro by Ca-rich fluids, are typically associated with serpentinites. They provide an excellent medium for studying the composition of serpentinizing and deserpentinization fluids and associated redox transfer. In this study, we report the Fe 3+ /ΣFe ratios, S contents and Fe isotopic compositions of rodingites and gabbros from the Xigaze ophiolite (southern Tibet), in order to assess Fe mobility and redox transfer during oceanic Ca-metasomatism. Based on mineralogical features and formation temperatures, we classified the rodingites into three types: prehnite rodingites (type I, prehnite-rich and garnet-absent, 3+ /ΣFe ratio of rodingites (0.19–0.85) is higher than that of gabbro protoliths (0.17–0.22). However, the δ 56 Fe value of rodingites (−0.19‰–0.12‰) is lower than that of gabbros (0.05‰–0.12‰, in the range of MORB). Isocon analysis of Fe content reveals that prehnite rodingites exhibit only a slight decrease in Fe content. Such rodingites have slightly higher Fe 3+ /ΣFe ratios but lower δ 56 Fe values than the gabbro protolith. These observations suggest that early serpentinizing fluids contain little Fe at relatively reducing conditions. In contrast, garnet rodingites, which formed at elevated P–T conditions, exhibit significantly higher Fe 3+ /ΣFe ratios and S contents but much lower δ 56 Fe values than the gabbro protolith. These results suggest that fluids with light Fe isotopes were released from serpentinite dehydration, most likely in the form of Fe 2+ –SO x complexes, which play a crucial role in the high P–T rodingitization. Compared with prehnite and prehnite–garnet rodingites, such fluids increased the Fe 3+ /ΣFe ratios but decreased the δ 56 Fe values during the formation of garnet rodingite. This study provides important insights into the Fe mobility and redox transfer in the oceanic lithosphere during nascent subduction of Neotethys Ocean, which has great bearing on the redox heterogeneity in subduction zones
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 新生新特提斯洋俯冲过程中大洋岩石圈中的铁迁移与氧化还原传递

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究洋壳初始俯冲中铁的迁移、同位素分馏与氧化还原传递机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定西藏日喀则蛇纹岩伴生异剥辉长岩的Fe3+/ΣFe、硫含量与铁同位素，并结合矿物学分型和等浓线分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早期蛇纹石化流体贫铁且偏还原；高温高压脱蛇纹石流体携轻铁同位素，提升氧化度并降低δ56Fe。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用异剥岩系统联合铁价态、硫和铁同位素约束新特提斯初始俯冲期铁迁移与氧化还原转移。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带流体成分、氧化还原非均一性及元素循环提供关键地球化学证据。

works.title: A common mantle source for strongly silica-undersaturated magmas: Insights from Zn-Fe isotopes in kimberlites
works.abstract: Kimberlites contain distinct asthenospheric and lithospheric mantle components. Disentangling their relative contributions is a challenging yet important goal to constrain the kimberlite sources. We analyzed the Zn-Fe isotope compositions of 55 globally distributed kimberlites. The Zn-Fe isotopes of kimberlites define a strong positive correlation from isotopically light compositions akin to cratonic peridotites to heavy compositions that are similar to those of melilitites and nephelinites globally. This covariation can be explained by mixing between cratonic mantle peridotites and isotopically similar uncontaminated kimberlite melts, with the observed heavy Zn-Fe isotopic signatures potentially originating from low-degree partial melting of asthenospheric sources. The similarities of trace elements and isotopes between uncontaminated kimberlite melts, nephelinites and melilitites reveal that these strongly silica-undersaturated magmas tap similar mantle sources in the convective mantle. Partial melting of this common source under different melting conditions can produce the spectrum of mantle melts from kimberlitic to silica-undersaturated basaltic melts without necessarily invoking compositional variations in the mantle source.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 强烈富硅不饱和岩浆的共同地幔源区：来自金伯利岩Zn-Fe同位素的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究金伯利岩中软流圈与岩石圈地幔来源的相对贡献及其共同源区。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定55件全球金伯利岩的Zn-Fe同位素组成，并结合微量元素与同位素对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 金伯利岩Zn-Fe同位素呈正相关，指示其由克拉通橄榄岩与未污染熔体混合形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用全球尺度Zn-Fe同位素证据揭示金伯利岩、霞石岩和黑榴岩的共同地幔源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于统一解释强烈贫硅岩浆成因，并约束深部地幔熔融过程与源区性质。

works.title: Do magmatic sill intrusions simply liberate the sulphur of the sedimentary reservoirs?
works.abstract: Sedimentary basins are at the interface between deep (lithosphere) and superficial (hydrosphere, atmosphere and biosphere) reservoirs, with the capacity to trap large quantities of volatile elements (e.g. S, C, H, Cl, F) over time through sedimentation and diagenesis. These volatiles can be released abruptly due to contact metamorphism associated to the emplacement of magmatic intrusions in the sediments, further disturbing the geochemical cycles in the atmosphere and biosphere. The interactions between magma and sediments during sill emplacement are complex and include contact metamorphism and contamination processes, but also the assimilation of sediments into the sill. In this study, we examine the impact of magma-sediment interactions on the sulphur cycle. The Ringvent sill in the Guaymas Basin drilled during Expedition IODP 385, is a funnel-shaped sill that emplaced in soft sediments at the subseafloor, representing an exceptional in-situ natural laboratory for studying magma-sediment interactions. The petrological and geochemical study of the sediments, magmatic rocks and magma-sediment mixtures reveals a high concentration of pyrite at the magma-sediment interfaces. Multiple types of pyrite indicate different sulphur-trapping processes occurring during the emplacement of the sill. Trace elements and isotopic (δ 34 S) analyses were used to identify the different sources of sulphur and to better constrain the processes. We demonstrate that the assimilation of sediment and the contamination of porewater in the Ringvent sill enables the formation of these different pyrite types from the time of sill emplacement until to late hydrothermal circulations, which remain still active. Such processes enable the storage of a minimum of 700,000 tonnes of sulphur within the sill, while there is minimal evidence of the release of volatiles in the surrounding area, indicating that, under certain conditions, these systems can function as a significant sulphur sink.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 岩浆岩床侵入是否仅仅释放了沉积储库中的硫？

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究岩浆岩床侵入时，沉积储层中的硫究竟被释放还是被固定。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、地球化学、微量元素与硫同位素分析岩床及界面样品。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩床与沉积物相互作用生成多类黄铁矿，并至少封存70万吨硫而非大量逸散。
summary_bullets.innovation: 基于Guaymas盆地Ringvent原位岩床，系统揭示侵位到晚期热液的硫捕集机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究改写岩床必致挥发分释放的认识，助力理解硫循环与环境效应评估。

works.title: HF(aq) thermodynamics in hydrothermal fluids and implications for metal transport
works.abstract: Fluoride is commonly found in geofluids and is thought to enhance metal transport through fluoride complex formation. However, its strong tendency to associate with hydrogen to form HF (aq) may limit the availability of free fluoride. Due to the lack of investigation into the dissociation behavior of HF (aq) in hydrothermal fluids, its role in metal transportation remains poorly understood. To address this gap, we developed a Density Functional Theory based deep-potential (DP) model for the HF-H 2 O system using the SCAN functional. This model, along with enhanced sampling techniques, allowed extensive simulations of HF (aq) dissociation at temperatures up to 1000 °C and pressures of 100 kbar, generating the first dataset on HF (aq) dissociation constants at high temperature and pressure. The water self-ionization constants (p K w) were also calculated with the DP model, showing overall agreement with previously published data. Our DP molecular dynamics (DPMD) calculated HF (aq) dissociation constants (log K d ) at ambient and high-temperature vapor pressures closely align with previously reported experimental values. Our findings indicate that HF (aq) dissociation is more pronounced in high-density fluids than previously recognized, with free fluoride ions remaining stable across a wider pH range. Using tungsten as an example, we demonstrate that the increased availability of free fluoride ions may potentially enhance metal transport in hydrothermal fluids by forming metal-fluoride complexes. Similar results can also be applied to other metal elements. These findings may advance our understanding of deep-earth geochemical processes by clarifying how fluoride complexes dictate element mobility in the high-pressure hydrothermal fluids of subduction zones.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 热液流体中 HF(aq) 的热力学及其对金属迁移的意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究HF(aq)在高温高压热液中的解离及其对金属迁移的影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于SCAN泛函构建DP模型，并结合增强采样模拟HF-H2O体系。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高密度流体中HF解离强于预期，自由F-在更宽pH范围内稳定并促进金属络合迁移。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次获得高温高压下HF(aq)解离常数数据，并验证DP模型可可靠预测pKw与logKd。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲带深部地球化学与热液成矿中元素迁移机制提供关键热力学依据。

works.title: High-pressure experimental constraints of carbonates + pyrite ± water interactions: implications for coupled C-H-O-S cycling in subduction zones
works.abstract: Carbonates, alongside pyrite and hydrous minerals, are the primary carriers of volatile elements (i.e., carbon-hydrogen-oxygen-sulfur) on sediments and altered oceanic crusts. Their interactions under high-pressure, high-temperature conditions in subducting zones are essential to understanding the coupled volatiles cycle. In this study, we investigated the interactions between different carbonates (e.g., calcite/aragonite, magnesite, and dolomite) and pyrite under both dry and hydrous conditions at pressures ranging from 3.5 to 5 GPa and temperatures from 1000 to 1500 °C using a large volume press. Combined with related thermodynamic modeling, we found that under dry conditions, sulfidation of Ca 2+ -carbonate and Fe 2+ -carbonate generates oldhamite (CaS) and pyrrhotite (FeS), respectively, along with CO 2 and O 2 . The limited thermodynamic stability fields of oldhamite and niningerite (MgS) make pyrrhotite the main sulfidation product on Earth. In contrast, under hydrous conditions, the stability of pyrite is significantly decreased by water (H 2 O), resulting in the formation of reduced pyrrhotite, H 2 S, and oxidized S-bearing species (e.g., SO 4 2- ) simultaneously. Furthermore, some reduced carbon species (e.g., graphite and hydrocarbons) are abiotically produced from the reduction of carbonates and/or water by the above H 2 S. Therefore, we propose: (1) sulfidation of carbonates by pyrite can cause release of oxidized fluids from subducting slabs, further driving local oxidation of the mantle wedge; (2) the carbonates-pyrite - water reaction is a new mechanism for the formation of abiotic graphite and hydrocarbons (HCs) in subduction zones.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 碳酸盐 + 黄铁矿 ± 水相互作用的高压实验约束：对俯冲带 C-H-O-S 耦合循环的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲带高压下碳酸盐、黄铁矿与水如何耦合控制C-H-O-S循环。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用3.5–5 GPa、1000–1500°C大体积压机实验结合热力学模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 干态硫化产生FeS/CaS并释放CO2、O2；含水时生成H2S、硫酸根及非生物石墨和烃。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示水显著降低黄铁矿稳定性，并提出碳酸盐-黄铁矿-水成烃新机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带氧化还原、挥发分迁移及地幔楔氧化提供实验约束。

works.title: Role of serpentinization in platinum group element (PGE) mobilization—Evidence from experiments
works.abstract: Reducing conditions are typical of incipient serpentinization in which sulfides and alloys break down to form secondary phases. Sulfides and alloys are the main hosts of platinum group elements (PGEs) in serpentinites, and the role of serpentinization in the remobilization of these elements is controversial. Here, we replicated early serpentinization using cold-seal pressure vessels, reacting a mixture of olivine, synthetic laurite, and water at 50 MPa and temperatures of 250−350 °C for durations of 1−4 d. Olivine reacts partially to form serpentine and brucite. Laurite breaks down to form RuSx with variable Ru:S ratios plus euhedral FeS grains. There are no systematic relationships among temperature, time, water content, and the composition of the Ru phase. No neoformed Ru phases were identified, consistent with limited Ru mobility during serpentinization. Silicate mineral assemblages and breakdown of primary laurite are consistent with observations in natural and experimental systems where incipient serpentinization occurred at highly reducing conditions. The results are consistent with decoupling of Ir group PGEs and Pd group PGEs during serpentinization and suggest that serpentinization may affect PGEs differently in different geodynamic settings, with consequences for global PGE cycling.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 蛇纹石化在铂族元素（PGE）迁移中的作用——来自实验的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨蛇纹石化早期是否会导致铂族元素，尤其Ru，发生再活化与迁移。
summary_bullets.methodology: 用冷封压反应釜在50 MPa、250–350℃下进行橄榄石-月桂矿-水反应实验。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 橄榄石部分蛇纹石化，月桂矿分解为RuSx和FeS，Ru迁移性整体有限。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以可控实验直接模拟早期强还原蛇纹石化，检验铂族元素迁移机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助解释不同地球动力环境下铂族元素循环与分异过程。

works.title: Silicified seafloor contribution to TTG formation: insights from zircon O and Si isotopes
