works.abstract: Tracing the input of altered seafloor lithologies to primary melts of tonalite-trondhjemite-granodiorite suites (TTGs) is critical for understanding Archean geodynamic processes that transported these lithologies towards melting regions. Zircon oxygen and silicon isotopic compositions in TTGs are particularly useful for this end, but their interpretation remains challenged by scarce quantitative constrains on isotopic compositions reflecting partial melting of specific Archean lithologies. Here, we combine oxygen and silicon isotope measurements in 3.45 and 3.22 Ga Barberton TTGs and their zircons with numerical models simulating partial melting of different source lithologies, which predict the isotope signatures of zircons and their host melts. Measured whole rock and zircon O and Si isotope compositions reflect the presence of up to 30 wt. % of hydrothermally silicified mafic rocks derived from the seafloor in the Barberton TTG source region. Considering the regional geological context, we propose subduction-like processes to explain the burial of the silicified seafloor into the TTG source. These results imply that subduction-like processes operated at least locally on Earth during the Paleoarchean.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 硅化海底对 TTG 形成的贡献：来自锆石 O 和 Si 同位素的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究TTG原始熔体是否掺入海底热液硅化基性岩及其构造意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定Barberton TTG及锆石O-Si同位素，并结合源岩部分熔融数值模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: TTG源区含最多约30 wt.%海底热液硅化基性岩，指示局部类俯冲埋藏。
summary_bullets.innovation: 定量耦合锆石与全岩氧硅同位素及熔融模型，约束太古代特定源岩贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为判别TTG成因与早期地球类俯冲过程提供新的定量地球化学证据。

works.title: Geochemical behavior of rare earth elements in pore fluids of turbidite sediments from South Taiwan
works.abstract: Major and rare earth elements (REEs) concentrations in sediment pore fluids are crucial for tracking biogeochemical processes during early diagenesis. However, the low concentrations and volumes typically sampled, particularly from long sedimentary sequences, limit our understanding of the REE behaviors in pore fluids. Here, major and trace elements have been analyzed on pore fluids from nine cores collected along the Penghu and Gaoping submarine canyons (SE Taiwan), in order to constrain diagenesis processes in sediments characterized by turbidite deposits and to determine their potential influence on the REE behavior in pore fluids. The ΣREE decrease from 600 to 200 pM in the upper 500 cm, with the maximum value attributed to the dissolution of Mn oxides in the redox transition zone. A decrease with depth of Ca and Mg concentrations are most probably associated with the formation of authigenic carbonate during the sulfate reduction process. This process absorbs REE from pore fluids without the REE fractionations. At deeper depth, an HREE enriched pattern is observed in core along the Penghu Canyon and might be linked to the degradation of organic matter in the methanogenesis zone. For cores located along the Gaoping Canyon, super-chondritic Y/Ho ratios comparable to seawater suggest a pronounced mixing of pore fluids with seawater and stronger scavenging of detrital sediments in the turbidity system. Overall, our results indicate that the REE concentrations in the pore fluids are relatively low and partitioning at deep depth in South Taiwan, REE distributions of pore fluids from turbidites sequences show a non-steady state variations in the high energy depositional setting.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 台湾南部浊积沉积物孔隙流体中稀土元素的地球化学行为

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究南台湾浊积沉积孔隙流体中稀土元素的成岩行为及其控制机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析澎湖与高屏海底峡谷9个岩芯孔隙流体的主量与微量稀土元素分布。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 上部稀土总量因锰氧化物溶解升高，深部受碳酸盐形成、产甲烷和海水混合控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 在长序列浊积沉积中系统刻画低浓度孔隙流体稀土变化及非稳态分配特征。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为早期成岩、海底峡谷物质循环及稀土示踪解释提供新的地球化学约束。

works.title: Mantle oxidation influenced by reduction-oxidation budget of Mariana-type subduction zones
works.abstract: Subduction transports oxidized material into Earth’s interior. The Mariana subduction zone is a representative example of modern plate tectonic regimes and provides a comprehensive set of geological, geochemical and geodynamical data. Here we use thermomechanical–thermodynamic numerical methods to simulate redox dynamics and fluid-melt release along a Mariana-type subduction setting in two dimensions, allowing comparison between our model and long-term oxidation events in the Mariana arc. Our findings demonstrate two main mechanisms of subduction-related mantle oxidation. First, sulfide oxidation during subduction enables fluids to carry substantial redox budgets into the sub-arc mantle. Partially hydrated mantle emerges as the primary fluid contributor, followed by altered oceanic crust. Secondly, oxidized iron-rich (Fe3+) partial melts extracted from slab-top sediments and altered oceanic crust exert a dominant influence on back-arc mantle oxidation. The majority of oxidized material is carried into the deeper mantle with subducted slabs. Our work demonstrates that with the advent of modern plate tectonics and efficient lithospheric recycling, oxidized material carried by Mariana-type subduction zones has had a global impact on Earth’s mantle redox evolution and our planet’s oxygenation. Mariana-type subduction redox is controlled by sulfide oxidation that enables fluids to carry redox budgets from the slab to the mantle wedge, and iron-rich slab sediment melts that oxidize the back-arc mantle, according to a 2D thermomechanical–thermodynamic model.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 地幔氧化受马里亚纳型俯冲带还原—氧化预算的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 马里亚纳型俯冲如何氧化地幔并控制红氧收支？
summary_bullets.methodology: 建立二维热-力-热力学耦合数值模型模拟红氧与流体熔体释放。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫化物氧化使流体输送氧化力，富Fe3+熔体主导背弧氧化，多数氧化物下沉入深地幔。
summary_bullets.innovation: 定量耦合俯冲动力学与热力学红氧预算，区分流体与熔体两类氧化机制来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 阐明板块回收对地幔氧化与地球增氧的作用，为弧-背弧岩浆氧化度提供约束。

works.title: Isotopic constraints on the origin and nature of sulfur components within the ancient sub-continental lithospheric mantle
works.abstract: Estimating the sulfur isotope composition of Earth’s fertile mantle can provide insight into Earth’s constitution and the processes associated with establishing its highly siderophile element abundances. There is currently a disagreement in sulfur isotopic compositions between Ocean Island Basalts (OIB) (δ 34 S = 0) and Mid-Ocean Ridge Basalts (MORB) (δ 34 S ≈ −1) implying that their mantle sources are different. MORBs and OIBs are young, so it remains unknown whether sulfur isotopic composition differences stem from relatively ancient, perhaps primordial compositions inherited from Earth’s accretion and differentiation or, if they reflect the effects of constant recycling of crust to the convective upper mantle. Subcontinental lithospheric mantle (SCLM) keels represent Earth’s only ancient mantle reservoirs that have been preserved from mantle convection affecting MORBs and OIBs, and as such may retain important clues about the origin and evolution of its sulfur isotopic compositions.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 古老大陆下岩石圈地幔中硫组分起源与性质的同位素约束

summary_bullets.research_question: SCLM硫同位素能否判别MORB/OIB差异源于原始组成或再循环？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对古老SCLM样品进行硫同位素（δ34S）高精度测定与对比。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 以SCLM保存的古老硫同位素信号约束地幔端元及其演化来源。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将免受对流改造的SCLM视作古地幔档案来追踪硫来源与过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助厘清地幔组成、地球吸积分异及地壳再循环对硫与HSE的影响。

works.title: Neodymium, Hf, Os, and U Pb isotope study of Permian Komatiites from Mashhad, Iran
works.abstract: We present new Sm Nd, Lu Hf, Re Os, and U Pb zircon isotopic and highly siderophile element (HSE: Os, Ir, Ru, Pt, Pd, Re) abundance data for komatiites from the Mashhad–Fariman region in Iran, and use these data to constrain their petrogenesis and the compositions of their mantle source. A new, robust Re Os isochron age of 270.4 ± 2.1 Ma (Permian) confirms their status as one of only two occurrences of post-Precambrian komatiites with olivine spinifex textures. The Re Os emplacement age is identical to the U Pb zircon age of 274 ± 4 Ma obtained in this study for the gabbro layer from a differentiated komatiite lava flow. Based on their lithophile trace element systematics, Mobasheri et al. (2025) divided the komatiites into two groups: D-type (light REE-depleted) and E-type (light REE-enriched). The initial εNd (+6.4 to +11.1) and εHf (+12.1 to +18.2) values are all positive in both groups. The D-type samples plot on the terrestrial DMM (depleted MORB mantle) evolution curve, whereas the E-type samples are isotopically less depleted and plot below the DMM curve. Combined, these observations suggest long-term heterogeneity in the trace element composition of the Mashhad komatiite mantle source. The initial γ 187 Os value of −0.92 ± 0.05 derived from the Re Os isochron is within the range of Os isotopic compositions of chondritic meteorites at the time of the Mashhad komatiite magma emplacement. This indicates derivation of these magmas from the mantle source that evolved with a time-integrated near-chondritic Re/Os ratio, further confirming the decoupling of the Nd Hf and Os isotope systematics reported for many Archean komatiites. The HSE concentrations and CI chondrite-normalized HSE patterns of the Mashhad komatiites are broadly similar to those of late Archean komatiites. Collectively, the data support formation of the Mashhad komatiites by moderate degrees of partial melting in a heterogenous mantle plume containing components with variable extents of long-term depletion in incompatible lithophile trace elements.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 伊朗马什哈德二叠纪科马提岩的 Nd、Hf、Os 和 U-Pb 同位素研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘定马什哈德二叠纪科马提岩成因、年龄与幔源组成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定Sm-Nd、Lu-Hf、Re-Os、锆石U-Pb同位素及HSE含量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 270Ma定年；Nd-Hf正ε而Os近球粒陨石，指示异质幔柱中等熔融。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以稳健Re-Os等时线联用多同位素与HSE共同约束其幔源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示幔源不均一与Nd-Hf/Os解耦，支撑幔柱演化及与太古代样品对比。

works.title: Carbonated mantle peridotites represent a hidden sink for subducted CO2
works.abstract: Abstract Subduction of carbon rich sediments and crust at convergent plate boundaries exerts a crucial control on Earth’s mantle chemistry and surface habitability. Recent attention has focused on exposures of fully-carbonated mantle rocks as these may attest to an overlooked sink for subducted carbon not sampled by arc volcanism. However, even in the best-studied example, the Semail Ophiolite, Oman, the setting for carbonation remains highly contentious, with conflicting inferences from geochemistry and geochronology. We approach this problem by combining microanalysis of halogens and detailed petrography to fingerprint the origins of carbonating fluids. Fluids were derived from both sedimentary pore fluid expulsion and deep slab decarbonation reactions in a subduction zone setting. Through mass balance modelling we show that CO 2 fluxes into the forearc from deep decarbonation (1.7–3.4 × 10 13 gyr −1 C) could represent up to 90% of the global flux entering subduction zones, indicating that carbonated mantle peridotites likely represent a major sink for subducted CO 2 which may have varied through geological time.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 碳酸化的地幔橄榄岩是俯冲CO2的隐藏汇/储库

summary_bullets.research_question: 碳酸化地幔橄榄岩是否为俯冲CO2隐藏汇及其流体来源？
summary_bullets.methodology: 卤素微区分析结合岩相学，并用质量平衡计算CO2通量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 孔隙水与深部脱碳供流体，前弧固碳通量或占全球俯冲输入90%。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以卤素地球化学指纹判别碳化流体并约束前弧固碳规模。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲带碳预算、地幔化学演化与地球宜居性提供新约束。

works.title: Lithium isotope fractionation in LCT pegmatite systems: a density functional theory study
works.abstract: Lithium is a fluid-mobile and incompatible element, that is enriched in highly differentiated felsic systems, particularly in lithium-cesium-tantalum (LCT) pegmatites. While Li isotope fractionation has often been considered negligible at magmatic temperatures, recent studies reveal variations of Li isotope (δ 7 Li) exceeding 10‰ in pegmatites, highlighting the need for a quantitative understanding of the controlling mechanisms. A key limitation lies in the absence of reliable fractionation factors for silicate melts, likely due to the complexities in melt structures, composition, and dynamics. To address this knowledge gap, ab initio molecular dynamics and density functional theory calculation were used to compute equilibrium lithium isotope fractionation factors among Li-bearing minerals, hydrothermal fluids, and felsic melts. The results show that the composition, water content, and halogen (F/Cl) significantly influence Li isotope partitioning by modifying Li‒O bond length, coordination environments, and polyhedral structure. At the deposit scale, compilation of δ 7 Li data from LCT pegmatites and granites worldwide shows that the largest isotope fractionation occurs prior to lithium mineralization. To investigate the underlying mechanisms, we developed numerical models incorporating fractional crystallization, fluid exsolution, melt-melt immiscibility, and further kinetic isotope effects associated with rapid crystal growth and diffusion. The results demonstrate that fractional crystallization and melt-melt immiscibility induce δ 7 Li variations of up to ∼ 3‰, whereas fluid exsolution can drive δ 7 Li shifts exceeding 10‰ in residual melts at magmatic temperatures. Additionally, kinetic induced isotope fractionation further contributes to shifts in δ 7 Li up to 15‰. These findings suggest that the pronounced Li isotope variations (>10‰) observed in pegmatite deposits, such as Jiajika, Tin Mountain, and Qinghe, are dominantly controlled by fluid exsolution and kinetic effects, providing new insights into the lithium isotopic evolution during petrogenesis and mineralization of pegmatite systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: LCT伟晶岩体系中的锂同位素分馏：一项密度泛函理论研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 定量解释LCT伟晶岩中>10‰锂同位素分馏机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 用AIMD+DFT计算分馏因子并结合数值成矿演化模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 流体析出与动力学效应主控δ7Li大幅变化，结晶/不混溶仅~3‰。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次给出熔体-矿物-流体体系可靠分馏因子并耦合多过程建模。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为用δ7Li追踪伟晶岩岩浆-流体演化与找矿提供定量框架。

works.title: Petrogenesis of the volcanic glass from the Central Lau Basin: Insight into the nature of underlying upper mantle
works.abstract: The Lau Basin, a rapidly opening back-arc basin in the southwest Pacific, is a critical region for investigating the the extent of the Indian-type mantle domain and its geodynamic evolution relative to the Pacific domain. To determine the nature of the upper mantle source feeding this basin, we present comprehensive major-trace element compositions and in situ Pb isotopic ratios for 27 volcanic glass samples from the Central Lau Spreading Center (CLSC) and Eastern Lau Spreading Center (ELSC). The samples are subalkaline tholeiites exhibiting N-MORB-like trace element patterns, indicative of a predominant depleted mantle source modified by minor fractional crystallization. Critically, the Pb isotopic compositions ( 208 Pb/ 204 Pb = 37.8–44.3; 207 Pb/ 204 Pb = 15.53–17.25) are distinctly higher than those of Pacific MORB and plot unequivocally within the Indian Ocean MORB field, revealing a clear Dupal anomaly. This definitive Pb isotopic signature, consistent with existing regional Sr-Nd data, identifies the ambient mantle beneath the central Lau Basin as belonging to the Indian-type (Dupal) geochemical domain, not the Pacific type. Our results confirm that large-scale, southward mantle flow driven by Tonga slab rollback, has supplied Indian-type mantle to the basin, displacing prior Pacific mantle. This study provides crucial constraints on the local distribution of Indian-type mantle and highlights the dynamic interplay between deep mantle reservoirs and shallow tectonic processes in back-arc settings.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中部劳盆地火山玻璃的岩石成因：对下伏上地幔性质的深入认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 判定中央劳盆地下伏上地幔性质及印度型地幔入侵机制
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析27件火山玻璃主微量元素与原位Pb同位素并对比MORB端元
summary_bullets.key_findings: 样品呈N-MORB样拉斑；Pb同位素入印度洋域具Dupal异常，指示印度型地幔取代太平洋源
summary_bullets.innovation: 以原位Pb同位素直接锁定中央劳盆地印度型地幔分布并约束板片回撤驱动的南向地幔流
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为后弧盆地地幔流动、地球化学域边界迁移及俯冲—扩张耦合提供关键证据

works.title: Raman spectroscopic investigation of sulfur speciation in aqueous fluids with multiple solutes
works.abstract: Understanding sulfur speciation in aqueous fluids is essential for elucidating sulfur partitioning, recycling, and isotope fractionation in fluid-mediated geological processes. However, the effects of redox state, fluid acidity, and different solutes on sulfur speciation in aqueous fluids under high-pressure ( P )-Temperature ( T ) conditions are not totally clear. In this study, in situ Raman spectroscopy was used to determine sulfur speciation in S-H 2 O ± HCl/Na 3 AlSi 5 O 13 and Na 2 S 2 O 3 -H 2 O ± Na 3 AlSi 5 O 13 systems in a hydrothermal diamond anvil cell at up to 800 °C and 2 GPa. Experimental results show that in the S-H 2 O system, the predominantly detected sulfur species were S 3 − , H 2 S, and SO 2 , and the proportion of S 3 − decreased with increasing temperature. Elevated acidity in the presence of HCl boosted the concentration of SO 2 and polymeric S 8 molecules at the expense of S 3 − . In contrast, in the Na 2 S 2 O 3 -H 2 O ± Na 3 AlSi 5 O 13 system, the predominantly detected sulfur species were S 3 − , HS − , and SO 4 2− , and the proportion of S 3 − increased with increasing temperature. Furthermore, the presence of dissolved silicate boosted S 3 − in the S-H 2 O system but depressed S 3 − in the Na 2 S 2 O 3 -H 2 O system. These results are generally consistent with the predictions of sulfur speciation in aqueous fluids by the Deep Earth Water (DEW) model, with the thermodynamic properties of S 3 − adopted from Pokrovski and Dubessy (2015). We inferred that slab-derived fluid at forearc depths can contain a substantial sulfur fraction in the form of S 3 − (up to 20%) under typical redox and acidity conditions (ΔFMQ = 0–2, ΔpH = 1–2).
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 多种溶质水溶液中硫形态的拉曼光谱研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 高温高压下氧化还原、酸度与溶质如何控制水溶液硫物种分布？
summary_bullets.methodology: 在水热金刚石对顶砧中原位拉曼测定多溶质体系硫物种至800℃、2GPa。
summary_bullets.key_findings: S-H2O以S3−/H2S/SO2为主且S3−随T降；硫代硫酸盐体系S3−随T升，酸与硅酸盐显著调控。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统对比酸度与溶解硅酸盐对两类硫体系物种的高PT原位拉曼约束，并检验DEW模型对S3−预测。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲流体硫迁移与同位素分馏提供定量物种约束，指示前弧流体可含高达约20% S3−。

works.title: Stable cerium isotope fractionation during basalt-rhyolite magmatic differentiation
works.abstract: Cerium (Ce) is an incompatible and redox-sensitive element, and stable Ce isotopes are emerging geochemical proxies for tracing Earth’s surface redox evolution that is complementary to traditional elemental ratios (e.g., Ce/Ce*). However, the robust application of this proxy requires a fundamental understanding of its behavior during high-temperature processes, which remains poorly constrained. To address this issue, we present Ce isotope compositions for a well-characterized suite of volcanic rocks from Hekla, Iceland, which spans a compositional range from basalt to rhyolite that were considered to have formed via fractional crystallization and/or mixing of cogenetic melts. Twenty-three samples yield a relatively uniform δ 142 Ce ranging from −0.007‰ to 0.070‰, with an average of 0.032 ± 0.045‰ (2 S.D.). The average δ 142 Ce of each lithology is 0.031 ± 0.032‰ for basalt, 0.019 ± 0.035‰ for basaltic andesite, 0.040 ± 0.045‰ for andesite, 0.064 ± 0.011‰ for dacite, and 0.009 ± 0.027‰ for rhyolite, respectively. Although a subtle δ 142 Ce variations in the evolved rocks is observed, the total Ce isotope fractionation (Δ 142 Ce = ∼0.07‰) is barely beyond the current analytical uncertainty, implying that the Ce isotope fractionation during magmatic differentiation at Hekla is limited. This is supported by the strongly incompatible behavior of Ce and near-constant oxygen fugacity throughout the Hekla differentiation sequence, indicating that the crystallizing phases remove only negligible amounts of Ce from the melt and therefore that significant fractionation of Ce isotopes is unlikely. Furthermore, mantle melting degree or melting depth have no effect on the Ce isotopes. Our findings demonstrate that high-temperature igneous processes are unlikely to significantly overprint primary Ce isotope signatures. Consequently, Ce isotopes may provide a robust tracer for investigating deep sediment recycling.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 玄武岩-流纹岩岩浆分异过程中的稳定铈同位素分馏

summary_bullets.research_question: 稳定Ce同位素在高温岩浆分异中是否会明显分馏，从而影响其氧化还原示踪解释？
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定冰岛Hekla玄武岩至流纹岩系列δ142Ce并结合分异、混合与氧逸度约束分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: δ142Ce总体仅变动约0.07‰且近于测量误差，指示岩浆分异导致的Ce同位素分馏极有限。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在成因明确的全岩浆序列中系统量化Ce同位素分馏并评估氧逸度与不相容性控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 表明火成高温过程难以改写Ce同位素初始信号，增强其用于深部沉积回收与红氧演化研究的可靠性。

works.title: Mantle plume activity in the Mirovoi ocean: evidence from accreted oceanic slices in North Wales
works.abstract: The composition of the Earth's mantle is influenced by plate tectonic processes, and one of the ways to study the geochemical evolution of the mantle and test plate tectonic and geodynamic models is to investigate the composition of ancient mantle-derived rocks. In this work, we study the Neoproterozoic oceanic basalts that occur as fragments in an olistostromal mélange in the Llŷn Peninsula of North Wales. Based on field, petrographic, and geochemical evidence, we argue that these rocks represent pieces of seamounts. Petrogenetic modelling shows that the basalts can be linked to the same source, with geochemical variations being explained by intraplate plume-related melting under variably thickened lithosphere and differing degrees of fractional crystallisation. The Nd–Hf isotopic data indicate a depleted mantle source, with mean ε Nd(t) and ε Hf(t) of 7.0 and 9.4, respectively. The depleted Nd and Hf signatures associated with elevated Pb isotopic ratios suggests that the mantle source tapped by this plume was dominated by a component similar to modern-day PREMA. Monte Carlo simulations utilising constraints on the age of accretion to an active margin and lithospheric thickness at the time of plume impingement yield results that show plume activity between 655–590 Ma. The Late Neoproterozoic timing of accretion of these rocks to the active margin might also help explain the exhumation of blueschists in North Wales. Paleogeographic and geochronological constraints show that, rather than being derived from the Iapetus Ocean, the seamounts preserved in North Wales likely originated in the shrinking circum-Rodinia Mirovoi super-ocean. Records of preserved seamounts elsewhere in the world show that Neoproterozoic plume activity must have been common in the Mirovoi ocean. The isotopic characteristics of the plume-related basalts in this study show that the PREMA component was present in the mantle sources of magmatism in the Mirovoi superocean and support the hypothesis of the longevity of this component. This study shows how a multidisciplinary approach integrating geochemistry and plate reconstruction can help tracking mantle evolution in response to plate tectonics.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Mirovoi洋的地幔柱活动：来自北威尔士增生洋壳碎片的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在通过研究北威尔士新元古代洋壳玄武岩的组成，揭示米罗沃伊洋地幔柱活动及其地幔源区演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用野外、岩石学、地球化学（Nd-Hf-Pb同位素）、岩石成因模型和蒙特卡洛模拟等方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 北威尔士玄武岩是米罗沃伊洋海山碎片，源于贫化地幔（类似PREMA），地幔柱活动发生于655-590 Ma。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性地结合地球化学和板块重建，揭示了米罗沃伊超洋中PREMA组分的存在及其在地幔演化中的持久性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为新元古代米罗沃伊洋的地幔柱活动、地幔演化和板块构造提供了新证据，并支持PREMA组分的长期存在。

works.title: Osmium and lead isotope insights into the magmatic evolution and mantle source characteristics of the Laacher See Tephra, Germany
works.abstract: Owing to the chalcophile nature of Os, its low abundances in highly differentiated magmas, the Os isotopes in recently erupted alkaline lavas can potentially reveal complex magmatic processes. In comparison, high concentrations of Pb in alkaline lavas make them relatively immune to continental crustal contamination and can help constrain mantle source(s). We report Os- and Pb -isotopes for the phonolitic Laacher See Tephra (LST), a tephrite and a basanite, which has been interpreted to be akin to the parental melt of Laacher See magma. The Os concentrations of LST vary from 1.3 pg/g to 24 pg/g with 187 Os/ 188 Os ratios ranging from 0.328 to 0.538 and displaying no clear relationship between the three stages of the LST eruption. In comparison, the Pb-isotope ratios are quite uniform across the three stages (average 206 Pb/ 204 Pb = 18.993 ± 0.015, n = 9). A single sample of phonolite mixed with more primitive melt and coming from the deepest level of the LST plumbing system, shows somewhat less radiogenic 187 Os/ 188 Os (= 0.295) and 206 Pb/ 204 Pb (=18.962) ratios. However, Os entombed within the silicates and recovered through HF-HBr digestion of three different aliquots of basanite exhibit highly variable 187 Os/ 188 Os ratios (= 0.210, 0.306, and 0.521) that span the entire range of LST, likely reflecting mixing between evolved melts and more mafic basanitic recharge. Linear regression of these aliquots in 1/Os- 187 Os/ 188 Os space gives a 187 Os/ 188 Os ratio of parental melt to be 0.131± 0.035 (2SE). The estimated κ ¯ Pb " role="presentation"> κ ¯ Pb κ ¯ Pb for the LST along with other lavas from East Eifel Volcanic Field is 4.02 ± 0.01 (n = 34). We conclude that the LST magmatism resulted from melting of EM-II type enriched mantle and that even the most pristine basanite melts were contaminated with respect to the Os-isotope composition during transport from source to surface. This study showcases our sequential dissolution procedure, which allows a full exploration of Os depleted lavas.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 锇和铅同位素揭示德国 Laacher See Tephra 的岩浆演化和地幔源区特征

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文利用Os和Pb同位素研究德国拉赫湖火山灰（LST）的岩浆演化和地幔源区特征。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究对LST、粗面玄武岩和碱性玄武岩样品进行了Os和Pb同位素分析，并采用了Os的顺序溶解程序。
summary_bullets.key_findings: LST的Os同位素变化大，Pb同位素均匀；原始岩浆Os比值为0.131±0.035；LST岩浆源于EM-II型富集地幔，且在运移中被Os同位素污染。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文展示了一种顺序溶解程序，能够全面探索Os贫乏的熔岩，是其方法学创新。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究利用Os和Pb同位素，为理解复杂的岩浆过程、地幔源区特征和地壳混染提供了重要见解。

works.title: Impact of diagenesis and acidic alteration on microbial fabrics and trace element distributions in fossilised siliceous hot spring deposits
works.abstract: Siliceous hot spring deposits, or sinters, are important targets in the search for evidence of early life on Earth and possibly Mars, as organic material may be preserved with high fidelity by rapid silicification. Despite a high preservation potential in terrestrial environments, sinters undergo numerous physical, mineralogical, and chemical changes over time, leading to alteration and potential destruction of microfossils and other evidence of past life. In the absence of definitive preservation of organics, trace metals have been suggested as potential biosignatures to support inferences of past biological influence in sinters. However, it is unclear how these trace metals are preserved or modified by diagenesis in the ‘deep time’ geologic record. This study utilises optical, scanning electron and synchrotron x-ray fluorescence microscopy, and electron probe microanalysis to investigate the relationship between trace metals and changes in preservation state of microbial fabrics from the Subrecent fossilised Ohakuri hydrothermal system, Taupō Volcanic Zone, New Zealand. Our results show that trace metals record a complex association with variably preserved microbial fabrics, resulting from multiple diagenetic and hydrothermal alteration overprinting events. Gallium exemplifies this complexity, with distinct spatial correlations to primary microbial fabrics, while also being tied to multiple, late-stage overprinting processes, thereby complicating its utility as a biosignature. Overall, our results suggest that Ga may provide new insights into silicification processes in sinter-forming hydrothermal systems. Understanding the behaviour of Ga in these settings aids in unravelling site specific, hydrothermal fluid histories and interpreting silicification processes. Therefore, Ga may potentially play a limited role in the search for past life in Earth’s earliest rocks or in future returned samples from Mars
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 成岩作用和酸性蚀变对化石硅质热泉沉积物中微生物组构和微量元素分布的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探究成岩作用和酸性蚀变如何影响化石硅质热泉沉积物中微量金属的保存及其与微生物结构的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用光学、扫描电镜、同步辐射X射线荧光显微镜和电子探针微分析技术。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 微量金属与微生物结构存在复杂关联，受多重成岩和热液蚀变叠加；镓的复杂行为限制了其作为生物标志物的效用。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次详细揭示了成岩和酸性蚀变对热泉沉积物中微量金属与微生物结构保存的影响，并深入分析了镓的复杂行为。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究对理解热泉沉积物中微量金属的生物标志物潜力、硅化过程及地外生命探测具有重要意义。

works.title: Magnesium isotopic systematics of carbonate
works.abstract: Carbonate is the key archive of the ocean geochemical compositions, and carbonate-based geochemical proxies have been extensively developed and applied in paleoenvironmental reconstructions. Understanding the carbonate formation and diagenesis is the prerequisite for the proper interpretation of geochemical data. Magnesium (Mg) is a key constituent in carbonate minerals (e.g., aragonite, calcite, and dolomite), and Mg isotopes could serve as a potent tool for tracking the carbonate deposition and diagenesis. Over the past two decades, high-precision analyses of Mg isotope ratios have generated abundant isotope data for both limestone ( δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim ) and dolostone ( δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol ). Notably, δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol data are systematically higher than δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim data, yet neither could be fully resolved by the isotope fractionations in carbonate mineral precipitation as determined by laboratory synthesis experiments. In this study, we develop numerical models to simulate Mg isotope fractionation in Ca-carbonate mineral precipitation, diagenetic dissolution-reprecipitation reactions, dolomitization and dedolomitization, so as to interpret the δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim and δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol data. The Mg isotopic composition of Ca-carbonate precipitation in a solution is determined by the isotopic compositions of seawater and fractionation in precipitation, while the dissolution-reprecipitation reactions modify the primary mineral composition, explaining the lower δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim values. In contrast, δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol of penecontemporaneous dolomite is significantly affected by Mg diffusion from seawater to porewater, leading to a smaller isotopic difference between dolomite and seawater Mg as compared with isotope fractionation in dolomite formation. On the other hand, for dolomite derived from advective flow dolomitization, δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol is controlled by the flow rate and dolomite precipitation rate, demonstrating a clear reservoir effect in dolomite formation. This could explain the higher δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol data. Furthermore, it is noted that dolomite with different crystal size and morphology have identical δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol values, arguing against the traditional identification or classification of the stages of dolomitization event by using dolomite crystal size and morphology. Finally, we proposed that all the reported δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim and δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol data reflect the difference between seawater Mg isotopic composition and ‘apparent fractionation’ in carbonate precipitation, recording both the seawater composition and the processes of carbonate formation. It is highly recommended to combine the detailed petrographic analyses and numerical simulation of carbonate mineral precipitation to interpret the carbonate Mg isotope data.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 碳酸盐的镁同位素体系学

summary_bullets.research_question: 论文旨在解释石灰岩和白云岩镁同位素值（δ²⁶Mg_lim和δ²⁶Mg_dol）的系统性差异，这是实验室实验未能完全解决的问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用数值模型模拟碳酸钙矿物沉淀、成岩溶解-再沉淀、白云石化和反白云石化过程中的镁同位素分馏。
summary_bullets.key_findings: δ²⁶Mg_lim受溶解-再沉淀作用降低，δ²⁶Mg_dol受海水镁扩散和流速/沉淀速率影响而升高，且白云石晶体大小与δ²⁶Mg_dol无关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过数值模型解释了石灰岩和白云岩镁同位素的系统性差异，并指出白云石晶体形态不能用于识别白云石化阶段。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为正确解释碳酸盐镁同位素数据提供了新的理论框架和方法，对古环境重建和地球化学研究具有重要价值。

works.title: Heavy iron isotopes in arc rocks reveal anoxic sediment recycling in subduction zones
works.abstract: The formation mechanism of arc mafic rocks with heavy iron isotope signature remains enigmatic. Here we report Fe-Mo-Sr-Nd-Hf isotope data of arc rocks from Northeast China. The studied arc rocks have δ56Fe values (0.08‰ to 0.23‰) comparable to or higher than those of mid-oceanic-ridge basalts, and enriched Sr-Nd-Hf isotope compositions. Combined with the published data of global arc mafic rocks, we find there is a correlation between the δ56Fe values and radiogenic Sr-Nd isotopes, indicating that sediment recycling may have affected the iron isotope of arc rocks. Notably, the positive correlation between the δ56Fe and δ98Mo values further suggests that the metasomatism of mantle wedge peridotite by anoxic sediment-derived melts may be the first-order control for the heavy iron isotopes of arc mafic rocks. Therefore, the arc rocks with heavy iron isotopes can be explained by the addition of anoxic sediments to their mantle sources. The recycled anoxic sediments play an important role in determining the heavy iron isotope composition of arc magmas, according to Fe-Mo-Sr-Nd-Hf isotope analyses of Northeast China arc rocks and global data correlations.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 弧岩中的重铁同位素揭示俯冲带的缺氧沉积物再循环

summary_bullets.research_question: 阐明弧区基性岩中重铁同位素特征的形成机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析了中国东北弧区岩石的Fe-Mo-Sr-Nd-Hf同位素数据，并结合全球弧区基性岩的已发表数据进行对比。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 弧区岩石具有重铁同位素特征，且δ56Fe与δ98Mo及放射性Sr-Nd同位素呈正相关，表明缺氧沉积物再循环是其重铁同位素的主要控制因素。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过Fe-Mo同位素耦合揭示了地幔楔橄榄岩被缺氧沉积物熔体交代是弧区基性岩重铁同位素的主要控制机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解俯冲带中缺氧沉积物再循环对弧岩浆铁同位素组成的影响提供了新的见解。

works.title: Rubidium isotopic evidence for sedimentary input to the mantle source of Martinique lavas from the Lesser Antilles arc
works.abstract: The recycling of crustal material through subduction is considered a key driver of chemical heterogeneity in the mantle. Rubidium (Rb) is a highly incompatible element with substantial fluid mobility. Its significant enrichment in the crust relative to the mantle, along with the inherent isotope variability among crustal materials, makes Rb isotopes a promising tracer of crustal recycling. However, the limited current understanding of Rb isotope behavior during subduction-related processes hinders their effective application. Here, we present Rb isotope compositions in a set of Martinique lavas from the Lesser Antilles arc, as well as sediments from DSDP Sites 144 and 543 located in front of the Lesser Antilles trench. Sediments from both sites exhibit Rb isotope compositions similar to continental crust or mantle. In contrast, the δ 87 Rb of the studied arc lavas vary from a mantle-like value at −0.08 ± 0.03‰ to variably lower values (down to −0.49 ± 0.05‰). Strong correlations are observed between their δ 87 Rb values and radiogenic isotopic compositions (e.g., 87 Sr/ 86 Sr, 143 Nd/ 144 Nd, 206 Pb/ 204 Pb, and 176 Hf/ 177 Hf). The Rb isotope variations cannot be explained by post-eruption alteration, mantle partial melting, magmatic differentiation or crustal assimilation during magma ascent. Instead, they reflect a binary mixing between the sub-arc mantle and isotopically light sediment melts. Because Rb isotope signatures of subducting sediments are largely unaffected by prograde metamorphism in cold subduction zones, their mantle-like pre-subduction δ 87 Rb values imply that Rb isotope fractionation may occur during sediment partial melting, with the light Rb isotope preferentially migrating with melts. Overall, this study provides compelling evidence for the addition of isotopically light sediment melts to the mantle wedge, demonstrating that Rb isotopes can serve as a tracer of crustal recycling in the sub-arc mantle.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 小安的列斯群岛弧马提尼克岛熔岩地幔源区沉积物输入的铷同位素证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探究Rb同位素在俯冲带过程中的行为及其作为地壳再循环示踪剂的有效性。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究测量了小安的列斯群岛马提尼克岛火山岩和DSDP钻孔沉积物的Rb同位素组成（δ87Rb）。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 马提尼克岛火山岩的δ87Rb值从地幔样值到显著更低，并与其他放射性同位素强相关，表明地幔楔中存在同位素轻的沉积物熔体输入。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究首次提供了Rb同位素作为俯冲带地壳再循环示踪剂的有力证据，并揭示了沉积物部分熔融过程中Rb同位素分馏。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解地幔化学不均一性和地壳再循环过程提供了一种新的Rb同位素示踪工具。

works.title: Control of early diagenesis on rare earth element cycling and enrichment in pelagic hydrothermal-influenced sediments
works.abstract: Hydrothermal plumes impact oceanic rare earth element and yttrium (REE + Y) cycling through Fe-Mn particle scavenging. However, REE + Y cycling and enrichment mechanisms in hydrothermal-influenced sediments remain poorly constrained. Here, we present geochemical data for seawater, pore water, and bioapatite from a hydrothermal-influenced region in the eastern South Pacific Ocean. Our results reveal that hydrothermal Fe-Mn oxides scavenge REE + Y from the water column (Nd burial flux: ∼206 pmol cm−2 yr−1) and then act as a source of benthic flux (Nd: 24 pmol cm−2 yr−1) during early diagenesis. Early diagenetic REE + Y release in metalliferous sediments mainly occurs at the sediment-seawater interface, with deep burial environments showing only sporadic and low-magnitude mobilization. This diagenetic flux dominates REE + Y enrichment in bioapatite, and radiogenic εNd signatures of bioapatite at the sediment-water interface provide direct evidence of pore-water processes.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 早期成岩作用对远洋热液影响沉积物中稀土元素循环与富集的控制作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明热液影响沉积物中稀土元素和钇（REE+Y）的循环和富集机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了对东南太平洋热液影响区域的海水、孔隙水和生物磷灰石进行地球化学数据分析的方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 热液铁锰氧化物从水柱中清除REE+Y，并在早期成岩作用中作为底栖通量来源，主要在沉积物-海水界面释放并富集生物磷灰石。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示了早期成岩作用对热液影响沉积物中REE+Y循环和富集的主导作用，并利用生物磷灰石εNd特征提供直接证据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究通过揭示热液影响沉积物中REE+Y的循环和富集机制，深化了对海洋地球化学和元素生物地球化学过程的理解。

works.title: Sediment-derived deep forearc fluid caused coupled sulfur-Fe3+-enrichment in eclogite from the subducted Farallon plate
works.abstract: Sulfur is a key element in geochemical cycles and ore formation, but where, how and in which speciation it is mobilised in subduction zones remains unclear. Here, we investigate the petrography, geochemistry and Sr-Nd-S-O isotopic composition of pyrite-bearing eclogite and omphacitite xenoliths from the Navajo Volcanic Field, which likely sample the oceanic crust of the Cretaceous Farallon Plate at sub-arc depths inaccessible to tectonically exhumed eclogites. After eclogitisation (∼2.4–3.3 GPa, 400- 500- 3.5 GPa, >550 °C). This provides the exceptional opportunity to study the behaviour of sulfur during multi-stage metasomatism in deep subduction zones. High-MgO garnet rims, with mantle-like δ 18 O values (down to +5.62‰) that contrast with higher δ 18 O values in the garnet cores (up to +9.63‰), have distinctly lower Fe 3+ /ΣFe than the cores and are devoid of sulphide inclusions, documenting reduction – rather than oxidation – by serpentinite-derived fluid. Omphacitites have crustal Sr-Nd isotopic compositions, and pyrite is significantly co-enriched with omphacite, both showing marked oscillatory zoning. Supra-mid-ocean ridge basalt sulfur isotopic compositions in four pyrite grains (δ 34 S V-CDT = +0.62±0.05 to +9.03±0.09‰) and highly variable δ 34 S V-CDT (-5.60 to +5.86‰) in another grain indicate some incorporation of sulphate-derived sulfur in omphacitites, which also have higher bulk Fe 3+ /ΣFe than their precursor eclogites. In the absence of carbon-bearing minerals, the distinct enrichment of fluid-immobile Fe 3+ in omphacitites combined with isotopically heavy S in pyrite are ascribed to iron-sulfur redox interactions via ingress of metasediment-derived fluid. The average fraction oxidised S needed to explain the Fe 3+ enrichment in the omphacitites is lower than the total S that was added (corresponding to S 6+ /Σ S = 0.30±0.27, n = 15), adding to increasing evidence for substantial mobility of both reduced and oxidised S within subducted oceanic crust. The subduction-modified Farallon oceanic crust may become an oxygen source upon recycling into more reduced mantle regions and impart an 87 Sr- 34 S-enriched signature without the direct involvement of metasedimentary components.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 沉积物来源的深部弧前流体导致俯冲法拉隆板块榴辉岩中耦合的硫-Fe3+富集

summary_bullets.research_question: This study investigates the unclear mobilization pathways, speciation, and locations of sulfur in subduction zones, a key element in geochemical cycles and ore formation.
summary_bullets.methodology: The study employs petrography, geochemistry, and Sr-Nd-S-O isotopic analysis of pyrite-bearing eclogite and omphacitite xenoliths from the Navajo Volcanic Field.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Sediment-derived deep forearc fluid caused coupled sulfur and Fe3+ enrichment in eclogite, indicating substantial mobility of both reduced and oxidized sulfur within subducted oceanic crust.
summary_bullets.innovation: The study utilizes xenoliths from sub-arc depths, providing a unique opportunity to examine sulfur behavior during multi-stage metasomatism in deep subduction zones.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: The findings suggest subduction-modified oceanic crust can act as an oxygen source and impart distinct isotopic signatures to the mantle, impacting mantle geochemistry.

works.title: Depth variations in multi-stage hydrogen generation associated with serpentinization in the lower crust and mantle sections of the Oman Ophiolite
works.abstract: Oxidation of ferrous Fe in Fe-bearing minerals during serpentinization has a key role in the production of H 2 , which is an energy source for microbial communities within the oceanic lithosphere. Serpentinization of the oceanic lithosphere occurs at various stages and temperatures, and in a range of rock types. However, the temporal and spatial variations in H 2 generation during alteration of the oceanic lithosphere are poorly constrained. In this study, we investigated Fe partitioning and H 2 generation in the oceanic lithosphere using samples of drillcore recovered from the lower crust and upper mantle sections at the Oman Drilling Project CM site, based on bulk-rock chemistry, thermogravimetric analyses, magnetic analyses, and bulk-rock and two-dimensional imaging using Fe K-edge X-ray absorption near edge structure spectroscopy.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Oman Ophiolite 下地壳和地幔段蛇纹石化作用伴生的多阶段氢气生成的深度变化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明大洋岩石圈蚀变过程中H2生成的时间和空间变化，特别关注蛇纹石化作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用阿曼蛇绿岩钻孔岩心样本，结合全岩化学、热重分析、磁性分析及Fe K-边X射线吸收近边结构光谱等方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 论文揭示了阿曼蛇绿岩下地壳和地幔段蛇纹石化过程中H2生成的多阶段深度变化及铁的分配特征。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究通过多尺度分析和先进光谱技术，首次系统地约束了大洋岩石圈H2生成的时间和空间变化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究对于理解大洋岩石圈中微生物群落的能量来源以及蛇纹石化过程中的H2生成机制至关重要。

works.title: Carbonic anhydrase traced by cadmium isotope fractionations in Archean to Holocene stromatolitic carbonates
works.abstract: Stromatolites record interactions of the biosphere, atmosphere, and hydrosphere. The evolution of C-fixation via diverse metabolisms is linked to metal availability for enzymes such as carbonic anhydrase. Stable Cd isotopes fractionation during uptake into carbonic anhydrase by modern phototrophs is readily recorded in authigenic carbonates. Here we test whether this proxy can be expanded to trace carbonic anhydrase in the microbial rock record. We analyzed Cd isotopic compositions in stromatolite occurrences of Western Australia, spanning from the Archean ( ~ 3.35 Ga Strelley Pool and ~2.72 Ga Tumbiana formations) to the Holocene Hamelin Pool. We record fractionated Cd isotopic compositions correlating with macro and micro-nutrients P, Cd and Zn, suggesting enzymatic metal-cycling in the Paleoarchean. Meanwhile, Rayleigh-type Cd isotope fractionation indicates its use as a co-factor in carbonic anhydrase from the Meso- to Neoarchean onwards. Our study offers new insights into the evolution of the metallome and its role facilitating early microbial metabolisms. Strong cadmium isotope fractionation in stromatolites from the Tumbiana Formation in Western Australia at ~2.72 represents the earliest evidence of carbonic anhydrase, according to cadmium isotope analysis to trace deep-time enzymatic activity and microbial metabolism.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 通过镉同位素分馏示踪太古宙至全新世叠层石碳酸盐岩中的碳酸酐酶

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在检验镉同位素分馏能否作为示踪剂，用于追溯古老叠层石中碳酸酐酶的活性。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过分析西澳大利亚州从太古宙（约3.35亿年前）到全新世叠层石的镉同位素组成来追踪碳酸酐酶。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 研究发现，约2.72亿年前Tumbiana组叠层石中强烈的镉同位素分馏是碳酸酐酶存在的最早证据，且分馏与营养物质相关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性地利用镉同位素分馏作为新代理，首次在约2.72亿年前的叠层石中提供了碳酸酐酶活动的最早证据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为理解金属组的演化及其在早期微生物代谢中的作用提供了新见解，对生命与地球共同演化研究有价值。

works.title: Sulfur speciation in silicate melts at high pressure
works.abstract: We have determined the pressure dependence of the ratio S 6+ /(S 2- +S 6+ ) in silicate melts by measuring the effects of pressure on the concentrations of sulfide (S 2- ) and sulfate (SO 4 2- ) species at known fugacities of sulfur and oxygen. For S 2- we controlled f (S 2 ) using mixtures of Ag and Ag 2 S with oxygen fugacity held at the CCO buffer. For S 6+ we measured molten CaSO 4 solubility as a function of pressure. We define sulfide capacity C S 2 - " role="presentation"> C S 2 - C S 2 - and sulfate capacity C S 6 + " role="presentation"> C S 6 + C S 6 + from the S 2- and S 6+ contents of the melt as (Fincham and Richardson, 1954): log C S 2 - = log S melt 2 - + 1 2 l o g fO 2 fS 2 " role="presentation"> log C S 2 - = log S melt 2 - + 1 2 l o g fO 2 fS 2 log C S 2 - = log S melt 2 - + 1 2 l o g fO 2 fS 2 and log C S 6 + = log S melt 6 + - 3 2 l o g ( fO 2 ) - 1 2 l o g ( f S 2 ) " role="presentation"> log C S 6 + = log S melt 6 + - 3 2 l o g ( fO 2 ) - 1 2 l o g ( f S 2 ) log C S 6 + = log S melt 6 + - 3 2 l o g ( fO 2 ) - 1 2 l o g ( f S 2 ) .
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 高压下硅酸盐熔体中硫的赋存形态

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在确定硅酸盐熔体中硫的价态比 S 6+ /(S 2- +S 6+ ) 对压力的依赖性。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过测量已知硫和氧逸度下硫化物和硫酸盐浓度随压力的变化，并利用Ag/Ag2S混合物和CaSO4溶解度进行控制和测量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成功确定了硅酸盐熔体中硫的价态比 S 6+ /(S 2- +S 6+ ) 对压力的依赖性，并定义了硫化物和硫酸盐容量。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在高压条件下系统性地测量了硅酸盐熔体中硫化物和硫酸盐物种的浓度，以确定硫价态的压力依赖性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究对于理解地球深部硫循环、岩浆过程以及矿床形成机制具有重要意义。

works.title: Lithium enrichment in pegmatites driven by magmatic fluids: evidence from Rb stable isotopes
works.abstract: The mechanism of lithium (Li) enrichment in pegmatites remains debated between fractional crystallization and magmatic fluid involvement. Here we investigate the world-class Jiajika Li deposit, the largest hard-rock Li deposit in Asia, using high-precision Rb isotope data from a 3000-m scientific drill core covering Li-rich pegmatites, Li-poor pegmatites, aplites, granites, and metasedimentary rocks. The results reveal systematic Rb isotope fractionation, with Li-rich pegmatites showing the highest δ⁸⁷Rb values (up to + 0.63‰) and Li contents (up to 6011 µg/g), significantly exceeding both wall rocks (-1.24‰ to + 0.29‰) and the average upper continental crust (-0.14‰). These patterns cannot be explained by post mineralization alteration, wall-rock assimilation, or fractional crystallization. In contrast, melt-hydrothermal fluid mixing models reproduce the observed Rb isotope data and Li-Rb co-enrichment, demonstrating that magmatic fluids exsolved during phase separation efficiently transported and concentrated rare metals, driving Li enrichment by up to 15-fold. Integration of Rb isotopes with Li and Ba isotopes reveals a coherent magmatic-fluid signature, establishing a novel multi-isotope approach to trace fluid-mediated ore-forming processes. We conclude that δ⁸⁷Rb values primarily reflect fluid flux and interaction intensity, whereas Li concentrations record precipitation efficiency. This refined framework underscores the indispensable role of magmatic fluids in the mobilization, transport, and deposition of Li in pegmatite systems, advancing genetic models and guiding exploration for rare-metal resources.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 岩浆流体驱动的伟晶岩中锂富集：来自Rb稳定同位素的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决锂辉石中锂富集是由分步结晶还是岩浆流体作用驱动的争议。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用高精度Rb同位素数据，分析了甲加卡锂矿3000米科学钻孔中的多种岩石样本。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 研究发现，岩浆流体而非分步结晶，有效输运并富集稀有金属，使锂富集高达15倍。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文建立了一种新颖的多同位素（Rb、Li、Ba）方法，用于追踪流体介导的成矿过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究推进了锂富集的成因模型，并为稀有金属资源勘探提供了指导。

works.title: Diamond evidence for limited subduction of phosphorus into the lower mantle
works.abstract: The cycling of phosphorus, a life-essential element, is fundamental to Earth’s biogeochemical system. While crustal-level phosphorus cycling is well constrained, mantle-level recycling, particularly the efficiency of phosphorus transport into the deep mantle, remains poorly constrained. Here, we report ferropericlase, calcite (retrogressed aragonite), and tuite (high-pressure phosphate) inclusions in a diamond from Juína, Brazil. The geochemistry of these inclusions combined with thermodynamic modeling indicates that their source rock was subducted altered oceanic crust (AOC) residing at lower-mantle depths. These inclusions provide mineralogical confirmation that phosphorus is transported into Earth’s lower mantle as tuite. Formation of this diamond and its inclusions requires the subducting slab to have followed the coldest end member of recognized slab geotherms among modern subduction systems. The Ca-rich nature of the protolith allows this type of AOC to remain subsolidus, retaining phosphate that would otherwise dissolve during partial melting and move into the shallow mantle. The requirements of both a very cold slab geotherm and a Ca-rich composition for the AOC to transport phosphorus to the lower mantle are stringent conditions that effectively minimize deep recycling. This limiting effect would have been even more pronounced prior to the Paleoproterozoic, when the surface temperatures of AOC would have been higher, leading to enhanced melting. Consequently, phosphorus is dominantly retained in the crust through shallow mantle recycling, now and especially in the ancient past, maintaining an accessible surface phosphorus reservoir critical for nutrient availability and the origin of life.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 金刚石证据揭示磷向下地幔俯冲的有限性

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明磷元素向地球深部地幔输送的效率及其机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过分析巴西Juína金刚石中的包裹体（铁方镁石、方解石、磷灰石）地球化学成分，并结合热力学模型进行研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 磷以磷灰石形式进入下地幔，但仅在极冷俯冲板片和富钙洋壳条件下发生，表明深部循环受限，磷主要保留在地壳中。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过金刚石包裹体提供了磷以磷灰石形式进入下地幔的矿物学证据，并揭示了深部磷循环的严格限制条件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究解释了地球表面磷元素的持续可利用性，对理解地球生物地球化学循环和生命起源至关重要。

works.title: Clinopyroxene In-Situ Sr Isotopic Evidence for Crustal Assimilation of Potassic–Ultrapotassic Mafic Magmas in the Southeastern Tibetan Plateau
works.abstract: Abstract Potassic–ultrapotassic magmas in continental collision zones have attracted much attention due to their genetic association with magmatic–hydrothermal Cu–Au ore formation and lithospheric mantle evolution. Although these magmas are typically modified by crustal assimilation during ascent, key aspects of this process, especially the type and amount of assimilated material and the consequent effects on magma composition, remain poorly constrained, hindering a full understanding of their petrogenesis. Clinopyroxene (Cpx) serves as an ideal archive for deciphering crustal assimilation in such magmatic systems, as it crystallizes over a wide range of melt compositions and is relatively rich in elements that can be used as isotopic tracers (such as Sr). Here, we conduct detailed petrographic studies and in-situ elemental and Sr isotopic analyses along core-to-rim traverses of Cpx from a suite of coeval potassic–ultrapotassic mafic lavas and dikes sampled at six locations of the southeastern Tibetan Plateau. Two populations of Cpx are identified: phenocrysts and green cores interpreted as recycled crystals from differentiated progenitor magmas related to the host magmas. The phenocryst cores are characterized by high Mg# (up to 90) and elevated Ni and Cr contents, consistent with derivation from primitive mantle-derived melts. Their similarly high initial 87Sr/86Sr ratios, combined with trace-element systematics, suggest that the primitive melts were derived from a common, slightly enriched lithospheric mantle source metasomatized by carbonate melt-dominated agents. Cpx-based thermobarometry indicates that these magmas ascended through the crust and crystallized at depths corresponding to ~0.2–1.0 GPa, defining a transcrustal plumbing system. Normal core-to-rim zoning in Cpx phenocrysts, as shown by decreasing Mg# and Ni and Cr contents, and increasing incompatible element concentrations (e.g. rare earth elements and Zr), reflects fractional crystallization of Cpx, olivine, and/or phlogopite in the magma plumbing system. Concurrently, systematic increases in initial 87Sr/86Sr ratios from core to rim (up to 0.004) record progressive assimilation of crustal materials with high Sr isotopic ratios. The presence of Neoproterozoic zircon xenocrysts, along with Sr content and isotopic data from regional crustal rocks, identifies Neoproterozoic granitic gneiss as the most likely assimilant. Quantitative models support this interpretation and indicate assimilated wall-rock melt masses of <0.2. Our in-situ micro-analytical data demonstrate that even crustal assimilation to this limited extent can markedly control the isotopic signature of potassic–ultrapotassic mafic magmas in the southeastern Tibetan Plateau. Given that such magmas significantly contribute to crustal growth by differentiating into voluminous granitoids, this study provides critical insights into how assimilation modulates the isotopic composition of the post-collisional newly-formed crust.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 青藏高原东南部钾质-超钾质基性岩浆地壳同化的单斜辉石原位Sr同位素证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨大陆碰撞带钾质-超钾质基性岩浆地壳同化的类型、数量及其对岩浆成分的影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用岩相学、斜方辉石（Cpx）原位元素和Sr同位素核-边分析，研究钾质-超钾质基性岩浆。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Cpx核-边Sr同位素比值升高记录了地壳物质的渐进同化，新元古代花岗片麻岩是主要同化物质，少量同化也显著影响岩浆同位素特征。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用斜方辉石（Cpx）原位Sr同位素核-边分析，量化并揭示了少量地壳同化对钾质-超钾质岩浆同位素特征的显著影响。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解大陆碰撞后新生地壳的同位素组成如何受岩浆同化作用调控，以及地壳生长过程提供了关键见解。

works.title: Average benchmark compositions of intraplate basalts with continental and ocean island provenance
works.abstract: Substantial uncertainty remains regarding the petrogenetic and tectono-magmatic processes that influence IPB compositional heterogeneity. This study distinguishes young ( 2 O/TiO 2 -Hf/Th- 208 Pb/ 206 Pb) normalized to the WLD composition provides a useful integrated discriminator between the groups. The locations of overlapping regions between the CIB and OIBo groups suggest that the dynamics between continental crust and underlying mantle processes is complex and variable. A speculative petrogenetic model is proposed to distinguish CIB, OIBc, and OIBo compositions. It involves distinctive contributions from variably metasomatized lithospheric mantle, moderated by contributions from asthenosphere outflow, and ancient subducted crustal materials residing in the large low shear velocity provinces of deep mantle and the mantle transition zone. Bulk crustal contamination also variably impacts CIB and OIBc regions.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 具有大陆和洋岛物源的板内玄武岩的平均基准成分

summary_bullets.research_question: 本研究旨在解决影响板内玄武岩（IPB）成分异质性的岩石成因和构造-岩浆过程的不确定性。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过区分不同来源和年龄的板内玄武岩，并利用多元素比值图进行判别和平均成分分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 多元素比值图能有效区分不同玄武岩组，CIB和OIBo重叠区表明陆壳与地幔动力学复杂，并提出了岩石成因模型。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出了一个基于多元素比值图的综合判别方法，并构建了新的岩石成因模型解释板内玄武岩成分来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究通过提供新的判别工具和岩石成因模型，有助于深入理解板内玄武岩的成因和地幔源区。

works.title: Primary Na contents of kimberlite melts from experimentally determined olivine/melt partition coefficients
works.abstract: Kimberlite rocks are rich in Ca, yet almost Na-free (<0.3 wt% Na2O), raising the question of whether they tap a unique Na-poor but clinopyroxene-saturated mantle source or whether Na is lost en route to the surface. To reconstruct primary Na contents of kimberlitic melts, we quantified Na partitioning between olivine and volatile-rich kimberlitic melts (Note: abstract contains math symbols that cannot be translated here; see PDF). Applying this calibration to magmatic olivine from 22 kimberlites yields reconstructed Na2Omelt of 1.9−8.6 wt% (typically ±0.25 wt%) at 1 GPa, showing that magmatic Na contents are much higher than indicated by bulk rock measurements. The lower range of these reconstructed Na2O values aligns with the predicted 3.5 ± 0.5 wt% of asthenospheric carbonated silicate melts generated from typical lherzolitic mantle at 7 GPa. The higher values correspond to the same 3.5 ± 0.5 wt% if recalculated for olivine crystallization at 2−4 GPa. Because Na2O loss through fluid exsolution during kimberlite ascent cannot exceed 0.5 wt%, the extreme Na loss leading to the observed low bulk-kimberlite values must occur upon solidification when copious amounts of Na-rich fluids are expelled. These findings suggest that kimberlitic melts do not require a peculiar mantle source, but rather carbon-bearing fertile lherzolites that melt at adiabatic conditions, placing kimberlites into a broad continuum with primitive alkaline ocean island melts.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 通过实验确定的橄榄石/熔体分配系数得到的金伯利岩熔体初生钠含量

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨了金伯利岩贫钠的原因，是源区特殊还是钠在上升或固化过程中流失。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过实验量化了橄榄石与富挥发性金伯利岩熔体之间的钠分配，并将其应用于22个金伯利岩中的岩浆橄榄石。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 重建的金伯利岩熔体初级Na2O含量远高于块体岩石，为1.9-8.6 wt%，与典型二辉橄榄岩地幔熔体一致；极端钠损失发生在固化过程中。
summary_bullets.innovation: 研究表明金伯利岩熔体不需要独特的贫钠地幔源，挑战了其源区特殊性的传统观点。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究将金伯利岩置于与原始碱性洋岛熔体相同的连续体中，对地幔熔融模型具有重要意义。

works.title: Solubility and speciation of niobium in HF-bearing aqueous solutions at elevated temperature and pressure: New insights from hydrothermal experiments and geochemical modeling
works.abstract: Fluoride-rich fluids dramatically enhance niobium (Nb) solubility; however, the existence of solubility limits and alternative Nb species during dissolution remains poorly constrained. This study systematically investigated Nb 2 O 5 solubility and Nb speciation in 0.1 to 4.5 mol/kg HF solutions at temperatures of 150–350 °C under vapor-saturated pressures. Experimental results reveal that Nb 2 O 5 solubility increases significantly with rising HF concentration from 0.1 to 2.0 mol/kg, reaching up to ~10,000 ppm dissolved Nb. Beyond 2.0 mol/kg, however, the dissolved Nb concentration does not rise persistently, but fluctuates around a mean value of 15,200 ± 6300 ppm. This trend most likely results from decreased HF dissociation and enhanced solvation effects at elevated temperatures and pressures. Solubility data analysis identifies Nb(OH) 3 F 3 − as a newly recognized dominant species, stable across a pH range of 0.4–3.2 and fluoride concentrations of 0.1–4.5 mol/kg. The formation constants (log K ) for this species vary from −5.47 ± 0.56 at 150 °C to −7.61 ± 0.20 at 350 °C. Geochemical modeling confirms that the stability of Nb species is highly dependent on pH and, in particular, fluoride concentration, accounting for the enhanced hydrothermal mobility of Nb in acidic, high-F hydrothermal environments. These findings support the possible role of high-F hydrothermal fluids in dissolving and transporting Nb, and also demonstrate that Nb hydrothermal transport in crustal F-bearing hydrothermal fluids is most likely governed by complexes with a low number of F − ligands (≤3).
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 高温高压下含HF水溶液中铌的溶解度和形态：来自热液实验和地球化学模拟的新认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 铌在富氟流体中的溶解度限制和物种形态在高温高压下尚不明确。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用水热实验和地球化学模拟，研究了150-350°C下HF溶液中Nb2O5的溶解度和Nb的物种形态。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Nb2O5溶解度随HF浓度先增后稳，并识别出Nb(OH)3F3−为主要物种，其形成常数随温度升高而变化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次识别出Nb(OH)3F3−为高温高压富氟流体中铌的主要物种，并确定了其形成常数。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地壳富氟热液中铌的溶解、迁移机制及其在酸性高氟环境中的地球化学行为提供了重要依据。

works.title: The solubility of ErPO4 and Er speciation in hydrothermal fluids at varying pH and salinity between 350 and 450 °C
works.abstract: The rare earth elements (REE) are important for the green-energy transition and can be incorporated into the REE phosphates, such as xenotime-(Y), which also hosts heavy REE (Tb–Lu). Xenotime-(Y) is a common accessory mineral in metamorphic rocks and a range of mineral deposits where it controls the mobility of heavy REE, however, the impact of high temperature aqueous fluids on the behavior of heavy REE is largely unknown. Thermodynamic modeling can be utilized as a tool to predict the mobility of REE in hydrothermal aqueous fluids, but must be supported by accurate experimental data. Here, we measured the solubility of endmember synthetic xenotime-structured ErPO 4 in NaCl-HCl-NaOH-bearing aqueous solutions at 350 °C and water vapor saturation pressure, at 400 and at 450 °C and 500 bar using batch-type Inconel reactors. Erbium speciation was investigated as a function of pH from 2.8 to 8, where Er chloride species are predominant at acidic conditions (pH 3). At pH 7–9, the measured ErPO 4 solubility (−9.8 to −7.5 log m Er ) is up to 2.5 orders of magnitude lower than thermodynamic predictions (−9.4 to −6.7 log m Er ) using existing thermodynamic databases. At pH 2–3, the predicted ErPO 4 solubility is ∼ 0.5 orders of magnitude higher at 350 °C and ∼1 order of magnitude lower at 450 °C compared to experimentally measured Er concentrations. The thermodynamic properties of aqueous Er species were therefore revised in this study. The partial molal Gibbs energy of formation (Δ f G 0 T,P ) for aqueous Er hydroxyl and chloride species are optimized using GEMSFITS and the logarithmic formation constants (log β n (Cl,OH) ) were derived at each experimental temperature and pressure:
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: ErPO4的溶解度以及Er在350至450 °C不同pH和盐度热液中的形态

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决高温水热流体中重稀土元素（如Er）迁移行为的未知影响，并研究ErPO4在不同pH和盐度下的溶解度及Er的形态。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用分批式Inconel反应器，在350-450°C和不同压力下，测量了ErPO4在含NaCl-HCl-NaOH水溶液中的溶解度，并分析了Er的形态。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 实验测得的ErPO4溶解度与现有热力学数据库的预测值存在显著差异，尤其在pH 7-9时低2.5个数量级，在pH 2-3时也有差异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究通过实验数据修正了水溶液中Er物种的热力学性质，并优化了Er羟基和氯化物物种的偏摩尔吉布斯生成能及形成常数。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为预测稀土元素在水热流体中的迁移行为提供了更准确的实验数据和热力学参数，对理解稀土矿床形成和绿色能源转型至关重要。

works.title: Diagenetic effects on cerium isotope fractionation in marine carbonates: Toward calibrating carbonate Ce isotopes as a paleoredox proxy
works.abstract: The cerium isotope ratio ( 142 Ce/ 140 Ce, commonly denoted as δ 142 Ce) has emerged as a promising tracer to complement the traditional Ce anomaly proxy for reconstructing past marine redox conditions. Although marine carbonates have been proposed as crucial archives of seawater Ce isotopic compositions, the effects of various diagenetic processes on Ce isotope fractionation in marine carbonates remain poorly constrained. Here, we present high-precision and high-resolution δ 142 Ce data from two deep drill cores in the South China Sea that record nearly all typical carbonate diagenetic environments. δ 142 Ce in these carbonates ranges from 0.04‰ to 0.35‰, with a mean of 0.19 ± 0.14‰ (2SD). Variations in mean δ 142 Ce values among the different diagenetic zones are minimal: the meteoric diagenetic zone ranges from 0.04‰ to 0.34‰ (mean = 0.20 ± 0.16‰, 2SD), the marine diagenetic zone from 0.06‰ to 0.28‰ (mean = 0.18 ± 0.14‰, 2SD), and the dolomitization zone from 0.07‰ to 0.32‰ (mean = 0.19 ± 0.14‰, 2SD). These values closely overlap with those of unconsolidated carbonate sediments from the primary or weakly diagenetic zone (0.10‰ to 0.35‰; mean = 0.20 ± 0.14‰, 2SD), indicating negligible modification of δ 142 Ce during early diagenesis. An exception occurs in the marine diagenetic zone of the NK-1 core, where we observed anomalously low δ 142 Ce values that correlate with elevated Ce concentrations and (Nd/Yb) SN . We attribute these anomalies to enhanced porewater-rock interaction with volcanic detritus during early diagenesis, which altered the isotopic composition of diagenetic fluids that were subsequently recorded in the carbonates. Overall, our results indicate that Ce isotopes in shallow marine carbonates are largely resistant to early diagenetic alteration, preserving depositional signals across a range of diagenetic conditions. This finding supports the application of carbonate δ 142 Ce as a promising proxy for reconstructing ancient marine redox conditions.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 成岩作用对海相碳酸盐岩中铈同位素分馏的影响：旨在校准碳酸盐Ce同位素作为古氧化还原指标

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决海相碳酸盐岩中成岩作用对铈同位素分馏的影响，这对于利用碳酸盐铈同位素作为古氧化还原指标至关重要。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究人员分析了南海两个深钻岩心的高精度、高分辨率δ142Ce数据，这些岩心记录了几乎所有典型的碳酸盐成岩环境。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 碳酸盐岩中的δ142Ce值在不同成岩带之间变化极小，表明早期成岩作用对其影响可忽略不计，但与火山碎屑的孔隙水-岩石相互作用除外。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究提供了关键的实证证据，表明碳酸盐δ142Ce在多种成岩条件下仍能保留沉积信号，从而验证了其作为古氧化还原指标的可靠性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究证实了碳酸盐δ142Ce作为重建古代海洋氧化还原条件的可靠指标，对古海洋学研究具有重要价值。

works.title: Diagenetic and Hydrothermal Processes Produce Heavy Molybdenum Isotope Signatures in Pelagic Sediments of the North and South Pacific
works.abstract: Abstract Molybdenum isotopes (δ 98 Mo) have been used for more than two decades to investigate past‐ocean redox conditions due to the distinct behavior of this element in oxic and anoxic environments. The oxic sink is generally accepted to have a near‐constant δ 98 Mo value of −0.7‰, a value derived primarily from the δ 98 Mo signatures of Fe–Mn crusts and nodules. However, little information is available on the downcore evolution of δ 98 Mo in oxic pelagic sediments, which constitute the largest fraction of the oxic Mo sink. Here, we present δ 98 Mo authigenic data for two deep‐sea sites with oxygenated pore waters covering 90 Myr of sedimentation, one from the North Pacific Gyre and another from the South Pacific Gyre. In both records, sedimentary δ 98 Mo auth values systematically increase downcore from −0.5‰ at the sediment surface to a maximum of ∼+0.3‰. This shift cannot be explained by changes in the ocean's redox state but is likely related to the diagenetic conversion of Mn‐oxides into different mineral phases. Our findings indicate that the δ 98 Mo signal generated by adsorption at the sediment‐water interface is not preserved during burial, suggesting that the canonical −0.7‰ value of the oxic sink requires re‐evaluation. In the lower section of the South Pacific Site, we also identify two positive excursions reaching δ 98 Mo auth values as high as +1.7‰. This portion of the site was influenced by near‐field hydrothermal processes, and we propose that these large excursions reflect Mo adsorption onto Fe (oxyhydr)oxides.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 北太平洋和南太平洋远洋沉积物中重钼同位素特征的成因：成岩作用和热液过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探究氧化性远洋沉积物中钼同位素（δ98Mo）的深层演化及其对海洋氧化汇的意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析了来自南北太平洋两个深海站位、覆盖9000万年沉积的氧化性孔隙水沉积物中自生δ98Mo数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 氧化性沉积物中δ98Mo值随深度系统性增加，主要由锰氧化物成岩转化引起，且水-沉积物界面的信号在埋藏过程中未被保存。
summary_bullets.innovation: 挑战了氧化性钼汇−0.7‰的普遍接受值，揭示了成岩作用和热液过程对氧化性沉积物中δ98Mo演化的重要影响。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究重新评估了古海洋氧化还原条件研究中钼同位素的解释，对理解海洋钼循环和地球化学代理具有重要意义。

works.title: Molybdenum isotope fractionation during low-temperature alteration of the upper ocean crust at DSDP sites 417 and 418
works.abstract: While there is growing interest in using Mo isotope systematics to understand subduction processes and crust-mantle recycling, how Mo isotopes may fractionate during seafloor alteration and the role of altered oceanic crust in these processes remains poorly understood. This study investigates Mo concentrations and isotope compositions ( δ 98/95 Mo, relative to NIST SRM3134) in basalts from DSDP Sites 417A, 417D, and 418A in the Atlantic, which experienced varying extent of seafloor alteration. These samples display significant Mo concentration (28 to 738 ng/g) and Mo isotopic variability ( δ 98/95 Mo = −2.33‰ to +0.99‰), resulting from distinct alteration conditions. Basalts from Site 417A, which generally underwent oxidative alteration at high water–rock ratios, exhibit low Mo concentrations and low δ 98/95 Mo values (−0.43 ± 0.26‰; 1σ). In these samples, the Mo mobilization ratios (R Mo = [Mo] AOC /[Mo] fresh ) show a positive correlation with δ 98/95 Mo and negative correlations with fluid–rock interaction proxies (e.g., K, Rb, 87 Sr/ 86 Sr), which is consistent with preferential leaching of isotopically heavy Mo from primary minerals during basalt dissolution. In contrast, samples from Site 417D generally exhibit Mo enrichment (ΔMo up to 3) and higher δ 98/95 Mo (up to +0.99‰), likely resulting from carbonate precipitation under relatively reducing conditions. Samples from Site 418A mostly show Mo uptake (R Mo up to 4.5) but lower δ 98/95 Mo (−0.80 ± 0.53‰; 1σ), consistent with adsorption onto Fe-oxyhydroxides in sub-oxic environments. These findings indicate the dual role of altered ocean crust as both Mo sink and source on varying localized scales, which needs consideration in discussing global Mo cycling. The heterogeneity of Mo isotopes in altered ocean crust challenges its characterization as a uniform reservoir and support the notion that deep, unaltered ocean crust may dominate slab-derived Mo fluxes in subduction zones. Our study highlights the need for mineral-scale isotopic analyses and experimental constraints to refine models of global Mo cycling and mantle heterogeneity.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: DSDP 417 和 418 站位上部洋壳低温蚀变过程中的钼同位素分馏

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明海底蚀变过程中钼同位素分馏机制以及蚀变洋壳在这些过程中的作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过分析DSDP 417A、417D和418A站位玄武岩的钼浓度和同位素组成（δ98/95Mo）进行。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 蚀变洋壳中钼同位素分馏受氧化条件、碳酸盐沉淀和铁氧化物吸附等多种机制控制，表现出钼的富集、亏损和同位素异质性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了蚀变洋壳在不同局部尺度上既是钼的汇又是源的双重作用，并挑战了其作为均一同位素储库的传统认知。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究对理解全球钼循环、地幔异质性以及俯冲带中板片来源钼通量具有重要意义。

works.title: A tungsten-182 and trace element perspective on the origin of the FOcal ZOne (FOZO) component
works.abstract: Small variations in 182 W/ 184 W resulting from the decay of 182 Hf to 182 W while 182 Hf was extant during the first ∼60 Myr of Solar System history are present in some modern ocean island basalts (OIB). The lowest ratios, or most negative μ 182 W values when calculated as parts per million variations from an assumed Bulk Silicate Earth (BSE) value, correspond with elevated 3 He/ 4 He compositions for some OIB lavas. Possible explanations for these anomalous isotopic compositions include: 1) core-mantle interaction following initial core-mantle separation or 2) early differentiation of the silicate mantle. Elevated 3 He/ 4 He in OIB originates from a less-degassed portion of the mantle, compared to the accessible upper mantle, and has been associated with a moderately depleted mantle component with long-lived radiogenic isotope characteristics intermediate to all known extreme mantle endmembers. This component has commonly been referred to as the “FOcal ZOne” or FOZO. In addition to these characteristics, FOZO has been suggested to have anomalous enrichments in the high field strength elements (HFSE) Ti, Ta, and Nb. Tungsten is a moderately siderophile element that behaves as an HFSE in the silicate Earth, and in some OIB, μ 182 W and Ti, Ta, and Nb enrichments display negative correlations. To further investigate the relation between anomalous μ 182 W, 3 He/ 4 He and Ti, Ta, and Nb enrichments in melts most closely associated with the FOZO mantle source, we analyzed basalts from three intraplate volcanic tracks, Easter-Salas y Gomez, Bowie-Kodiak, and Louisville, for μ 182 W and bulk major and trace elements. The new isotopic data for each hotspot system record μ 182 W values that are within the global range of OIB (Easter-Salas y Gomez μ 182 W = +3 to −17; Bowie-Kodiak μ 182 W = +1 to −12; and Louisville μ 182 W = −1 to −9). To test whether these compositions can be explained by the crystallization of an early basal magma ocean and subsequent long-term isolation of its crystallization products, a simple fractional crystallization model was developed. We find that nearly all isotopic and trace element compositions inferred for the FOZO component can be reproduced by the chemical fractionations produced with this model. Furthermore, the model is consistent with data for additional OIB sampled globally. Finally, our model results also indicate that the Sm/Nd ratio in the inferred FOZO reservoir may not be sufficiently modified by bridgmanite fractionation to generate resolvable μ 142 Nd anomalies in OIB (resulting from decay in the 146 Sm- 142 Nd short-lived system) relative to BSE. This is consistent with the lack of μ 142 Nd anomalies in most OIB, even where negative μ 182 W anomalies are largest. Collectively, these findings indicate that at least some of the anomalous 182 W/ 184 W compositions observed in modern OIB may plausibly originate from a differentiation product of the silicate mantle that formed within the first 60 Ma of Solar System history, and without the need for core-mantle interaction.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 钨-182和微量元素视角下的FOZO (FOcal ZOne) 组分起源

summary_bullets.research_question: What is the origin of the FOZO component in ocean island basalts, particularly regarding anomalous 182W/184W and trace element signatures?
summary_bullets.methodology: Analyzed μ182W and trace elements in OIBs from three hotspot tracks, then developed a fractional crystallization model to explain the observed compositions.
summary_bullets.key_findings: A fractional crystallization model of an early basal magma ocean successfully explains FOZO's isotopic and trace element signatures, suggesting early silicate mantle differentiation as its origin.
summary_bullets.innovation: Proposes and validates a novel fractional crystallization model of an early basal magma ocean to explain the FOZO component's complex isotopic and trace element characteristics.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research offers a comprehensive model for the FOZO component's origin, unifying various geochemical anomalies and challenging existing hypotheses on mantle evolution.

works.title: Metallic molybdenum sulfide catalyses protometabolic carbon dioxide reaction networks under extreme conditions
works.abstract: The nonenzymatic synthesis of organics from H2–CO2 redox couple forms the foundational basis for prebiotic carbon metabolism. However, constructing comprehensive carbon cycling reaction networks with multiple interlinked subsystems preceding enzymatic catalysis remains challenging. Here, we demonstrate that metallic molybdenum sulfide mimicking Mo-S2-pterin enzyme drives the construction of hydrothermal CO2 reaction networks across five carbon sequestration pathways including acetyl-CoA, reductive tricarboxylic acid, 3-hydroxypropionate-4-hydroxybutyrate, dicarboxylate-4-hydroxybutyrate, and ethylmalonyl-CoA pathways. A total of 32 intermediates and end-products are synthesized from CO2, encompassing five universal metabolic precursors. Spectroscopic and computational studies reveal that molybdenum sulfide containing Mo3+ with vacancy-induced distorted octahedral structure promotes the formation of radicals and enhances their adsorption and coupling in aqueous solutions, leading to CO2 conversion rate of 68.6% and selectivity of up to 70% for C2+ carboxylates. The metal sulfide-catalyzed multiple CO2 reaction networks under extreme conditions could function as a prebiotic precursor to ancient and core metabolic pathways. While nonenzymatic organic synthesis from the H₂–CO₂ redox couple underpins prebiotic carbon metabolism, building integrated, multi-pathway carbon reaction networks prior to enzymatic catalysis remains challenging. Here, the authors show that metallic molybdenum sulfide, mimicking Mo–S₂–pterin enzymes, enables hydrothermal CO₂ reaction networks spanning five carbon sequestration pathways.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 金属硫化钼在极端条件下催化原始代谢二氧化碳反应网络

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何在酶催化之前构建复杂且相互关联的非酶促碳循环反应网络，以合成有机物？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用金属硫化钼作为催化剂，在水热条件下，结合光谱和计算研究，驱动CO2反应网络。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 金属硫化钼催化CO2生成32种有机物，涵盖五种碳固定途径，CO2转化率68.6%，C2+羧酸盐选择性高达70%。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次展示金属硫化钼模拟酶，在极端条件下驱动五个互联的CO2碳固定反应网络，合成多种前生物有机物。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为理解地球早期生命起源时非酶促碳代谢的形成提供了关键见解。

works.title: Abyssal hydrothermal alteration drives the evolution from simple alkanes to prebiotic molecular complexity
works.abstract: Abstract Abyssal hydrothermal vents are regarded as reactors for simple reduced carbon transforming into more complex forms of prebiotic organic chemistry. While the organic geochemical continuum and evolutionary transitions remain elusive, due to the intense hydrothermal alteration. We apply a metabolomics-inspired molecular fingerprinting strategy integrating mass spectral networking and hierarchical organization, to construct a molecular relatedness phylogenetic tree for vents from ultraslow-spreading Indian Ridge. Here we show that organic molecules from different vent fields and activity states share common molecular connection patterns. The observed progressive molecular evolution from alkanes through aromatics to complex heteroatom-bearing compounds reveals a systematic increase in molecular functionalization and polarity. This finding helps bridge the gap between simple reduced carbon and prebiotic molecular complexity, underscoring the role of hydrothermal systems in shaping life’s essential feedstock on the primordial Earth. This framework may contribute to the search for life-markers on other astrobiological contexts, e.g., Mars, Enceladus, Callisto and Europa.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 深海热液蚀变驱动从简单烷烃到前生命分子复杂性的演化

summary_bullets.research_question: How do simple reduced carbon compounds evolve into complex prebiotic organic molecules in abyssal hydrothermal vents, given the challenges of intense alteration?
summary_bullets.methodology: The study used a metabolomics-inspired molecular fingerprinting strategy, integrating mass spectral networking and hierarchical organization, to build a molecular relatedness phylogenetic tree.
