summary_bullets.key_findings: 该方法有效抑制了挥发性元素丢失，绝大多数元素测试准确度优于±10%，精密度优于10%，且单个样品分析时间仅需15分钟，效率大幅提升。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新点在于成功改进并研制了双铱带高温炉，有效解决了熔融制样中挥发性元素丢失问题，并建立了快速、准确的主微量元素联用分析技术。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为地球科学领域提供了一种快速、准确、高效的全岩主元素和微量元素分析新方法，具有重要的应用价值。

works.title: 单个流体包裹体元素化学组成分析新技术——激光剥蚀电感耦合等离子体质谱（LA—ICP—MS）
works.abstract: 高灵敏度、高精密度、低检出限、多元素同时检测并可提供同位素组成比值信息的等离子体质谱与高空间分辨率的紫外激光采样技术结合,可定量地测定单个流体包裹体中常、微量元素含量,为成矿流体的研究提供了一个新的研究手段.文中简要地介绍了激光剥蚀电感耦合等离子体质谱(LA-ICP-MS)分析仪器的发展,结合实验室的研究工作,就激光剥蚀池的设计、单个流体包裹体的剥蚀方法、元素的分馏效率、定量校正技术及其在成矿成因物理化学机制研究中的应用等进行评述,并阐述单个流体包裹体元素组成的LA-ICP-MS分析技术存在的局限和发展趋势.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 单个流体包裹体元素化学组成分析新技术——激光剥蚀电感耦合等离子体质谱（LA—ICP—MS）

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何高精度、多元素定量测定单个流体包裹体中的常微量元素，以深入研究成矿流体。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用激光剥蚀电感耦合等离子体质谱（LA-ICP-MS）技术，结合紫外激光采样，分析单个流体包裹体元素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: LA-ICP-MS技术能高灵敏、高精密度地定量测定单个流体包裹体中常微量元素，并应用于成矿成因研究。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性地将LA-ICP-MS技术应用于单个流体包裹体元素分析，并系统评述其设计、剥蚀、校正及应用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为成矿流体研究提供高灵敏、高精度的元素分析新手段，有助于深入理解成矿成因的物理化学机制。

works.title: 高级变质岩中Zr、Hf、Nb、Ta的ICP—MS准确分析
works.abstract: 采用高压密闭溶样ICP-MS研究了片麻岩、榴辉岩等高级变质岩中Nb、Ta、Zr、Hf准确分析方法.实验表明:在温度为190℃时,溶样时间大于36h,Nb、Ta、Zr、Hf可完全溶解,而获得准确的分析结果.但Nb、Ta在稀硝酸介质中的不稳定性会导致分析结果的误差,采用0.1% HF介质的F- 基体匹配,可保持Nb、Ta长时间的稳定性.所建立的高压密闭溶样ICP-MS分析方法用于苏鲁-大别地区片麻岩、榴辉岩等高级变质岩的分析,经与XRF及碱熔融ICP-MS方法对比,分析结果具有良好的一致性.
works.venue: 地球科学：中国地质大学学报
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 高级变质岩中Zr、Hf、Nb、Ta的ICP-MS准确分析

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决高级变质岩中Nb、Ta、Zr、Hf元素ICP-MS准确分析的难题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用高压密闭溶样ICP-MS，优化了190℃、36小时以上溶样条件，并使用0.1% HF介质进行F-基体匹配。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 优化条件可使元素完全溶解；0.1% HF介质有效稳定Nb、Ta；新方法与XRF及碱熔融ICP-MS结果一致。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性地提出采用0.1% HF介质进行F-基体匹配，解决了Nb、Ta在稀硝酸介质中的不稳定性问题。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该方法为地质学家准确分析高级变质岩中关键微量元素提供了可靠手段，有助于地球化学研究。

works.title: Extremely light Mo isotope compositions of the lower continental crust caused by fluid leaching
works.abstract: Mantle-crust differentiation and crustal material cycling are fundamental processes in Earth's evolution. Molybdenum (Mo) isotopes provide new constraints due to their fractionation between the upper continental crust and the mantle. However, data on Mo isotope compositions from the lower continental crust, an important intermediary layer, remain scarce, hindering the effective utilization of Mo isotopes in understanding continental crust formation and evolution. This study investigates the Mo isotope compositions of mafic granulite and websterite xenoliths derived from Mesozoic basalts in the western Cathaysia Block to directly constrain the mechanisms underlying Mo isotope variations in the juvenile lower continental crust. Xenoliths with high Mo concentrations show mantle-like δ 98/95 Mo (−0.18 ‰), whereas those with low Mo concentrations display significant variation in δ 98/95 Mo values (−1.94 ‰ to 0.55 ‰). This significant variation cannot be fully explained by mantle heterogeneity, as supported by Sr Nd isotopes with limited variability and low Nb/Zr, (La/Sm) N , and Th/Yb ratios. The lack of covariance between δ 98/95 Mo and differentiation index Mg# argues against magmatic differentiation governing Mo isotopic fractionation. Most samples show a sharp decline in δ 98/95 Mo values with decreasing Mo/Ce ratios, far below mantle values, suggesting that fluid leaching is responsible for the observed Mo isotope fractionation. Based on newly obtained Mo isotope data for these Mesozoic xenoliths, the juvenile lower crust beneath the Cathaysia Block is enriched in extremely light Mo isotopes compared to the mantle. It is proposed that widely distributed fluids in the crust may be an important reservoir for balancing Earth's Mo isotope system. In this context, molybdenum isotope fingerprinting of fluid activities constitutes a significant approach for investigating crustal differentiation.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 流体淋滤导致的大陆下地壳极轻钼同位素组成

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决下地壳钼同位素组成数据稀缺的问题，并揭示其变异机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究人员分析了华南板块中生代玄武岩中的麻粒岩和辉石岩捕虏体的钼同位素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 下地壳捕虏体显示极轻的钼同位素组成（低至-1.94‰），主要由流体淋滤而非地幔不均一性或岩浆分异引起。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出流体淋滤是下地壳极轻钼同位素的主要成因，并指出地壳流体可能是平衡地球钼同位素体系的重要储库。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 钼同位素指纹技术可作为研究地壳分异和流体活动的重要方法，对地球演化研究具有价值。

works.title: Establishment and development of mantle geochemistry
works.abstract: Mantle geochemistry, a field that emerged in the mid-1970s, utilizes geochemical approaches to investigate the chemical composition and structure as well as the evolution and dynamics of Earth’s mantle. Since its establishment, this field has become a key part of solid Earth Science and Planetary Science, demonstrating great vitality. The development of its theoretical framework began with the observation of mantle heterogeneity revealed by the radiogenic isotopic compositions of ocean island basalts (OIBs) and mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORBs), which in turn gave rise to the classic “crustal recycling” model. Based on this, a suite of globally representative mantle end-member components, namely DMM (Depleted MORB Mantle), EMI (Enriched Mantle I), EMII (Enriched Mantle II), HIMU (High μ, μ=238U/204Pb) and PREMA (prevalent mantle), was identified, thereby establishing a comprehensive framework to characterize the geochemical structure and geodynamic system of the mantle. Over the past five decades, mantle geochemistry has advanced with new analytical techniques and theoretical development, greatly broadening its scope. It is now a key field within the Earth System Sciences, crucial for developing models of deep material cycling and surface environmental responses. Aiming to review the development of mantle geochemistry, this paper analyzes eight seminal studies focused on radiogenic isotopes, revisiting the establishment and evolution of mantle geochemistry, exploring the scientific vision of pioneers and highlighting the key topics that define this discipline.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地幔地球化学的建立与发展

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在回顾地幔地球化学的建立与发展，并探讨其演变、先驱者的科学愿景及核心议题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 本文通过分析八项关于放射性同位素的开创性研究来回顾地幔地球化学。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地幔地球化学通过放射性同位素揭示地幔不均一性，建立了“地壳再循环”模型，并识别了DMM等全球代表性地幔端元组分。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文通过回顾开创性研究，重新审视地幔地球化学的建立与演变，并突出其核心议题和先驱者的科学愿景。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究对固体地球科学、行星科学及地球系统科学至关重要，有助于理解深部物质循环和地表环境响应。

works.title: Transformation of silica-rich to carbonated silicate melts in a big mantle wedge revealed by geochemistry of mantle xenoliths
works.abstract: Carbonated silicate melts transport oxidized carbon from the deep to shallow mantle, and thus play an important role in the deep carbon cycle. However, it is unclear how carbonated silicate melts are formed. Here, we report whole-rock major and trace element, and Mg-Zn-Fe isotope, and in situ olivine and clinopyroxene Mg isotope data for peridotites and pyroxenites in Cenozoic alkaline basalts from Shulan and Yitong, Northeast China, to reveal the formation mechanisms of carbonated silicate melts. As residues of the primitive mantle, most of the Shulan and Yitong (spinel) harzburgite and lherzolite have relatively lower δ26Mg and higher δ66Zn than the mantle values, and show LREE-enriched patterns. These features indicate that these peridotites have been modified by carbonated silicate melt, transforming them into carbonated peridotites. The Shulan websterites exhibit metasomatic textures, and most of their whole-rock and in situ δ26Mg values are lower than the mantle values, which also supports the presence of a carbonated lithospheric mantle. The Yitong cumulate orthopyroxenites, representing silica-rich melts, have lower δ26Mg and higher δ66Zn values than mantle peridotites, implying that recycled carbonate has been involved in these silica-rich melts. The Yitong cumulate wehrlites and (olivine) websterites display major element compositions similar to those of carbonated peridotite melts, coupled with low whole-rock and clinopyroxene δ26Mg values, high δ66Zn and δ57Fe values, indicating the occurrence of carbonated silicate melts. The transition from orthopyroxenites to (olivine) websterites is marked by the decreasing of their whole-rock δ26Mg, δ57Fe values and Zn/Fe ratios and increasing of their δ66Zn values, along with decreasing of their crystallization temperatures, suggesting that silica-rich melts were gradually transformed into carbonated silicate melts via continuous interaction with carbonated peridotite. Our findings demonstrate that silica-rich melts from the stagnant slab can extract carbon from pre-existing carbonated mantle within the big mantle wedge.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 地幔捕虏体地球化学揭示的大型地幔楔中富硅硅酸盐熔体向碳酸盐化硅酸盐熔体的转化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明碳酸盐硅酸盐熔体如何形成，因为其形成机制尚不清楚。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用全岩主量、微量元素、Mg-Zn-Fe同位素以及橄榄石和单斜辉石Mg同位素原位分析，研究了舒兰和伊通的幔源捕虏体。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 研究发现，富硅熔体通过与碳酸盐化橄榄岩的持续相互作用，逐渐转化为碳酸盐硅酸盐熔体。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示了滞留板片富硅熔体在大地幔楔中从预存碳酸盐化地幔中提取碳，形成碳酸盐硅酸盐熔体的机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 理解碳酸盐硅酸盐熔体的形成机制，对于深入认识深部碳循环及其在地球内部的传输至关重要。

works.title: Ba isotope unmasks recycling processes of fluid mobile elements in subduction zones
works.abstract: Geochemical recycling processes in subduction zones exhibit significant variability due to the incorporation of complex subduction components into the mantle wedge. Here, we present whole-rock geochemical and Ba–Sr–Nd–Hf–Pb isotopic data for basalts from the sediment-rich Luzon Arc and the sediment-poor Bicol Arc to constrain the recycling processes of fluid mobile elements (FME) in different subduction settings. Our results suggest that the mantle wedge beneath the Luzon and Bicol arcs was primarily metasomatized by melts from subducted sediments and fluids from subducted oceanic crust, respectively. The basalts from both arcs show variable δ 138/134 Ba values despite their limited variations in Sr–Nd–Hf–Pb isotopes, reflecting the heterogeneous dehydration of phengite in subducted sediments and oceanic crust, which have undergone different extents of Ba isotopic fractionation at shallow depths. Luzon back-arc basalts (BAB) exhibit Sr–Nd–Hf–Pb isotopic compositions similar to those of island arc basalts (IAB), yet possess more variable and lighter Ba isotopic compositions. This defines a distinct Ba isotopic lightening trend across the arc, reflecting progressive Ba isotopic fractionation associated with enhanced phengite dehydration at increasing subduction depths. The Bicol basalts show lower 87 Sr/ 86 Sr and much higher Sr/Zr ratios compared to the Luzon basalts, indicating pervasive fluid infiltration from the subducted oceanic crust into their mantle sources, which promotes the preferential breakdown of lawsonite and results in significant Sr enrichment in the mantle wedge. This observation explains why global arc basalts tend to have higher Sr/Zr ratios with decreasing 87 Sr/ 86 Sr ratios. Notably, Luzon basalts display Ba/Zr, K/Zr, and Rb/Zr ratios that largely overlap with those of Bicol arc basalts. We propose that subducted oceanic crust plays a role similar to that of subducted sediments in recycling FME, such as K, Rb, and Ba, owing to the buffering effect of phengite. Nevertheless, it potentially contributes more significantly to Sr enrichment within the mantle wedge of subduction zones.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 钡同位素揭示俯冲带流体活动元素的再循环过程

summary_bullets.research_question: To constrain the recycling processes of fluid mobile elements (FME) in different subduction settings.
summary_bullets.methodology: Whole-rock geochemical and Ba–Sr–Nd–Hf–Pb isotopic data were analyzed from basalts of Luzon and Bicol Arcs.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Ba isotopes reveal distinct FME recycling mechanisms in sediment-rich versus sediment-poor arcs, highlighting phengite dehydration and oceanic crust fluids' role in Sr enrichment.
summary_bullets.innovation: Utilizing Ba isotopes, the study unmasks distinct FME recycling pathways and quantifies the role of oceanic crust versus sediments in element enrichment.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This study offers new insights into FME recycling in subduction zones, explaining global arc basalt Sr/Zr ratios and the distinct roles of subducted components.

works.title: Tracking deep mantle heat and volatiles in the Iceland plume from a high-density survey of helium isotopes along the Reykjanes Ridge
works.abstract: The upwelling mantle plume beneath Iceland flows southwest down the Reykjanes Ridge. Several prominent V-shaped ridges (VSRs) and troughs (VSTs) extend obliquely from the ridge that are believed to result from pulses of hotter plume mantle. The intimate connection between heat and primordial He in the deep mantle means that the mantle beneath the Reykjanes Ridge should have elevated 3 He/ 4 He. A new high resolution He isotope study of basaltic glasses from southernmost Iceland (63°N) to 55°N along the Reykjanes Ridge demonstrates a broad peak of 3 He/ 4 He (16.0 R a ) centred around 60°N that coincides with the first topographic high (VSR-1). The magnitude of the He isotope anomaly broadly scales with the excess temperature inferred from crustal thickness. This supports the hypothesis that thickened oceanic crust is a consequence of a pulse of hotter mantle within the upwelling plume that flows down the Reykjanes Ridge. The along-ridge 3 He/ 4 He peak at 59-62°N is significantly longer (320 km) than the thickened oceanic crust of VSR-1 (60-70 km). This can most simply be explained if the hot mantle blob is surrounded by a high 3 He/ 4 He mantle carapace that has a temperature similar to the surrounding mantle. As helium diffusion is orders of magnitude slower than heat, this relationship can be most simply explained if the outer region of the hot, He-rich blob has lost heat to the surrounding mantle during transit from the core-mantle boundary, yet retained the deep mantle He isotope fingerprint.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 通过沿雷克雅内斯海岭的氦同位素高密度调查，追踪冰岛地幔柱中的深部地幔热量和挥发物

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在追踪冰岛地幔柱中深部地幔热量和挥发物的分布及其与地幔流动的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用高分辨率氦同位素分析技术，对雷克雅内斯海岭沿线玄武岩玻璃样本进行研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 在60°N发现宽广的3He/4He峰值，与地形高点吻合，且其强度与推断的过剩温度相关，但氦同位素峰值比热异常更长。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出热的富氦地幔团块在传输过程中可因氦扩散慢于热扩散而保留深部氦同位素特征，形成冷却的富氦外壳。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解地幔柱动力学、热量与挥发物的差异性传输以及洋壳结构形成提供了关键见解。

works.title: Si Isotope Fractionation in Metamorphic Rocks From Cryogenic Temperature Crystallographic Data and Quantum Phonon Model
works.abstract: Abstract In this study, we demonstrate that it is possible to fit the resilience at the high temperature limit using only the atomic mean square displacement determined from cryogenic temperature single crystal diffraction data. Our method introduces the Debye phonon model, under which the atomic mean square displacement displays quantum behavior at cryogenic temperatures and deviates from a linear temperature dependence. From the resilience of Si extrapolated from cryogenic temperature X‐ray diffraction data, one can calculate the Si isotope fractionation using our recently developed force constants approach. We applied our method to epidote and coesite, which are common minerals in ultra‐high pressure metamorphic rocks, and our predicted Si isotope fractionation lnα Si30/28 are consistent with mass spectroscopy observations of Δ 30 Si in Dabie eclogite and Alps whiteschist. Our results indicate that the geofluid involved in the fluid‐rock interaction in Dabie and Alps orogens doesn't significantly alter the Si‐isotope composition of ultrahigh pressure metamorphism. Our manuscript presents a novel experimental methodology to determine the high‐temperature resilience and equilibrium isotope fractionation factors of silicon in minerals, which can be applied to the metastable upper mantle silicates that are non‐quenchable at high temperatures and room pressure.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 变质岩中的Si同位素分馏：基于低温晶体学数据和量子声子模型

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在通过低温晶体学数据和量子声子模型，确定矿物中硅同位素的高温分馏。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用低温单晶衍射数据结合德拜声子模型确定原子均方位移，并利用力常数方法计算硅同位素分馏。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 预测的硅同位素分馏与质谱观测一致，表明地质流体未显著改变超高压变质作用中的硅同位素组成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出了一种新颖的实验方法，通过低温数据确定矿物的高温弹性模量和硅同位素分馏因子。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该方法可应用于研究高温高压下不可淬灭的亚稳态上地幔硅酸盐矿物。

works.title: Equilibrium thermodynamics of K-Na exchange between alkali feldspars and aqueous alkali chlorides at 450 °C and 427 bar (0.31 g cm−3 water density)
works.abstract:
K-Na exchange between alkali feldspars and aqueous KCl and NaCl is an important process in many natural hydrothermal systems and proceeds according to the reaction:
As additional result, we provide two lines of evidence that for certain concentrations the alkali feldspar-equilibrated fluid is in the two-phase vapor + liquid state at the experimental conditions, slightly below the critical pressure. The vapor phase has a bulk alkali chloride molality of ∽ 1 m with a K/Na mole ratio of 0.15–0.16 while the liquid phase has ∽ 3.6 m with K/Na of ∽ 0.2 ± 0.01. As the experimental trend of K/Na ratios with total chloride concentration displays a non-linear, curved shape, albite can form from K-feldspar by either isothermal dilution of a high-salinity, feldspar-equilibrated brine or by mixing a brine and a vapor phase. These new mechanisms can naturally explain albitization in diverse geological settings, such as Au-rich porphyry Cu, iron oxide copper–gold deposits, and sub-solidus albitization in granitic intrusions.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碱长石与含水碱氯化物之间钾钠交换的平衡热力学：在450 °C和427 bar（水密度为0.31 g cm−3）条件下

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文研究了在特定高温高压条件下，碱性长石与含水碱性氯化物之间的钾钠交换平衡热力学。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过在450°C和427 bar的实验条件下，分析碱性长石与含水碱性氯化物之间的钾钠交换过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现特定浓度下流体呈气液两相状态，且气相和液相具有不同的盐度与钾钠比，钾钠比随总氯化物浓度呈非线性曲线关系。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出了通过等温稀释或盐水与蒸汽混合形成钠长石的新机制，解释了多种地质背景下的钠长石化作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解自然热液系统中的钾钠交换、钠长石化过程及其在地质矿床形成中的作用提供了新的见解。

works.title: Sulfate-driven anaerobic oxidation of methane in deeply buried sediments on the Southern Campbell Plateau
works.abstract: Sulfur is a key component in the reduction of organic carbon in marine sediments. Sulfate-driven anaerobic oxidation of methane and microbial sulfate reduction are the leading processes driving the removal of organic carbon and sulfur from the environment. Microbial sulfate reduction has been well studied in most marine depositional environments, however, studies examining sulfate-driven anaerobic oxidation of methane are primarily limited to shallow burial or methane seep environments. Sediments recovered from IODP site U1553 on the southern Campbell Plateau demonstrate evidence of a deeply buried sulfate-methane transition zone (SMTZ). In this study, we identified a deep (> 500mbsf) sulfate-methane transition zone through the analysis of sulfur isotopes in sulfide minerals (d 34 S CRS ). Three potential paleo-SMTZs were also identified as peaks in d 34 S CRS below the modern SMTZ, suggesting the changing seafloor and depositional conditions since the late Oligocene contributed to the upward migration of the SMTZ over time. Understanding the evolution of deep SMTZs and the processes associated with them will help further constrain how the sulfur and carbon cycles interact and drive carbon storage in marine sediments.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 南坎贝尔高原深埋沉积物中硫酸盐驱动的甲烷厌氧氧化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探究深埋沉积物中硫酸盐驱动的甲烷厌氧氧化过程，此前研究主要限于浅层或甲烷渗漏环境。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过分析硫化物矿物中的硫同位素（d 34 S CRS）来识别深埋的硫酸盐-甲烷过渡带（SMTZ）。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 研究在500米以下发现了现代深埋硫酸盐-甲烷过渡带，并识别出三个古SMTZ，表明SMTZ随时间向上迁移。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究首次在深埋（>500米）沉积物中识别出硫酸盐-甲烷过渡带，并揭示了其长期演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究有助于深入理解深层硫酸盐-甲烷过渡带的演化，及其对海洋沉积物中硫碳循环和碳储存的影响。

works.title: Hydrogen generation potential of peridotites and pyroxenites in ophiolitic settings
works.abstract: The partially serpentinized mantle bodies exposed in the western sector of the Northern Apennines, Italy, represent a favorable environment for natural hydrogen (H 2 ) studies, particularly Mt. Prinzera, which hosts a hyperalkaline spring containing dissolved H 2 . A geochemical characterization of peridotite, pyroxenite, and serpentinite samples was carried out to reconstruct the past and present stages of serpentinization and to assess their H 2 generation potential. This study combined mineralogical, whole-rock compositional, and redox-state analyses, along with thermodynamic modeling of spring waters. The major serpentinization event associated with mantle exhumation in the Middle to Late Jurassic was marked by extensive replacement of olivine, clinopyroxene, orthopyroxene by serpentine and subordinate magnetite. Alteration was more intense in olivine than in pyroxenes, resulting in higher serpentinization degrees in peridotites (~ 50 vol%), compared to pyroxenites (~ 10 vol%). Mineralogical evidence suggests temperatures of approximately 220 °C and 300 °C for this stage. Currently, serpentinization and H 2 generation are likely active at Mt. Prinzera, with fluid-rock interactions involving particularly the oxidation of a small fraction of Fe 2+ -serpentine and/or magnetite, rather than the primary mineral assemblage. Thermodynamic equilibria, based on the activities obtained from the aqueous speciation, and the isotope composition of the hyperalkaline water were used to estimate the temperature at depth, which appears to be markedly low. In addition, trapped H₂ accumulations originating from earlier serpentinization stages can also be considered. Thus, serpentinization may occur either at the base of Mt. Prinzera or within a deeper, hidden ultramafic body.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 蛇绿岩背景下橄榄岩与辉石岩的产氢潜力

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在评估蛇纹石化作用在蛇绿岩环境中生成氢气的潜力，并重建其过去和现在的阶段。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用了矿物学、全岩成分、氧化还原态分析以及泉水热力学模拟相结合的方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 过去蛇纹石化作用在橄榄岩中更强（~50%），而目前氢气生成涉及Fe2+-蛇纹石/磁铁矿氧化，温度较低，可能来自深部或捕获的氢气。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究通过多学科方法揭示了蛇绿岩环境中氢气生成的过去与现在机制，并强调了Fe2+-蛇纹石/磁铁矿氧化在低温下的作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为理解蛇绿岩环境中天然氢气的生成机制和潜力提供了重要见解，对能源和地球科学领域具有价值。

works.title: Paleogeographic and Structural Controls on the Sediment-Hosted Zhaishang Au Deposit, West Qinling Orogen, China
works.abstract: Abstract Structural and paleogeographic controls on sediment-hosted Au deposits are investigated using the giant Zhaishang Au deposit in the west Qinling orogen as an example. Two distinct types of mineralization are identified. The first is fault-controlled mineralization within Devonian Fe-rich calcareous siltstone, deposited in a platform-edge environment. The second is stratabound-replacement mineralization within Permian carbonaceous mudstone. This mudstone, which contains up to 1.46% organic carbon, was deposited in a low-energy, deep-sea environment. Geophysical sections demonstrate that the two types of Au mineralization are bounded by a WNW-ESE–trending fault called F5, which extends to a depth of at least 1 km with secondary mineralized structures converging into it. New structural mapping reveals that deposit-scale, NW-SE–trending locked-up folds and thrust faults developed under NNE-SSW compression at ca. 279 to 275 Ma according to the sericite Ar-Ar dating. In situ U-Pb dating of Au-related apatite from mineralized veinlets indicates that the WNW- to E-trending reverse faulting, stratabound replacement, and Au mineralization took place at ca. 220 Ma. The fault-controlled Au in the Devonian beds comprises polymetallic sulfides associated with decarbonation with both native gold and invisible Au within pyrite. In contrast, the stratabound-replacement Au orebodies in the Permian beds comprise pyrite and arsenopyrite hosting invisible Au associated with quartz alteration. The contrasting mineralization styles can be attributed to variations in host rocks and their mechanical competency determined by distinct paleogeographic settings and different pathways for fluid-rock interaction.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西秦岭造山带寨上沉积岩容矿金矿床的古地理与构造控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨寨上金矿受古地理环境与构造作用控制的成矿机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合构造填图、地球物理剖面及绢云母Ar-Ar和磷灰石U-Pb定年分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别两类成矿样式，受F5断层分隔，并确定约220 Ma为主要成矿期。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将古地理差异、岩石力学性质与流体作用路径联系解释成矿分异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为沉积岩容矿金矿的找矿预测及构造—地层联合研究提供依据。

works.title: Pyrite Textures, Trace Element Chemistries, and Isotopic Signatures (S, Pb) Suggest Hybrid Ore-Forming Processes in the World-Class Metasediment-Hosted Liba Au Deposit, West Qinling Orogen, Central China
works.abstract: Abstract The Liba Au deposit (109.8 t Au at 1.99 g/t) in the West Qinling orogen (central China) is hosted in Middle Devonian greenschist facies metamorphosed clastic rocks and carbonates and has a close spatio-temporal relationship with Late Triassic granitoid complex and mafic to felsic dikes. The Au mineralization is localized within west-northwest to east-west fracture zones and characterized by pyrite disseminations and subordinate auriferous quartz veins. Based on field and textural relationships, the following four paragenetic stages are defined: (1) pre-ore stage marked by deformed pyrite, (2) early ore stage comprising quartz-pyrite and quartz-sericite-pyrite ores, (3) late ore stage composed of quartz-polymetallic sulfide veins, and (4) post-ore stage of barren calcite. Pre-ore stage pyrite (Au ≤ 3.0 ppm) has δ34S values of 5.0 to 6.8‰, which are lower than those for orestage pyrites (6.8–10.4‰). This S isotope difference discounts the possibility that some of the ore-forming S was sourced from the local metasedimentary host rocks. Pyrite from the early ore stage displays core-mantlerim zoned textures and hosts fine-grained native gold grains and has relatively high contents of invisible Au (≤600 ppm) in its mantle zones. The uniform δ34S values (mostly 8.5–10.4‰) and 206Pb/204Pb ratios (18.3918–18.6362) for these pyrites suggest a deep-seated homogenized source for ore fluids, most likely derived from metamorphic devolatilization of Paleozoic metasedimentary rocks. Pyrite of the late ore stage, closely associated with abundant native gold, can be subdivided into a texturally early Au-bearing generation (Au ≤ 8.9 ppm; δ34S of 8.6–9.3‰; 206Pb/204Pb of 18.9885–18.9959), which is overprinted by a texturally later Au-poor generation (Au ≤ 2.0 ppm; δ34S of 8.8–9.6‰) and Au-bearing generation (Au ≤ 3.9 ppm; δ34S of 6.8–8.5‰; 206Pb/204Pb of 18.9501–18.9890). The lower δ34S values and more radiogenic Pb isotope signature, combined with enrichment in Cu, Zn, Ag, Sn, Sb, and Pb in this latest Au-bearing pyrite, indicate a different fluid source, which is suggested to originate from magmatic-hydrothermal fluids that interacted with the enveloping Devonian metasedimentary rocks. Integration of our new data with previous studies suggests the Liba Au deposit is hybrid in nature and involved multiple fluid sources and multiple Au deposition stages—a finding that has also been documented in other orogenic Au deposit settings worldwide. In addition, systematic in situ chemical and isotopic analyses of texturally well-constrained pyrite provide the means to geochemically characterize the entire fluid evolution history, as done at Liba, and fingerprint the fluid reservoirs and processes implicated in orogenic Au systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 黄铁矿结构、微量元素地球化学和同位素特征（S、Pb）表明中国中部西秦岭造山带世界级变沉积岩容矿里巴金矿床具有混合成矿过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨Liba金矿成矿流体来源、演化及其是否为混合成矿过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外分期、黄铁矿结构观察、微量元素原位分析及S-Pb同位素测试。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Liba金矿为多阶段成矿，早期以变质流体为主，晚期叠加岩浆热液贡献。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以具纹理约束的黄铁矿原位地球化学重建了完整流体演化与金沉淀历史。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为造山型金矿多源流体识别和成矿机制判别提供了可推广的方法与证据。

works.title: Apatite geochemistry and Sr isotopes reveal the genesis of Au–W deposits in the Xiangzhong Metallogenic Province, South China: Insights from the Xingfengshan deposit
works.abstract: Metasedimentary rock-hosted Au–W deposits constitute a globally significant resource for gold and tungsten, yet their genesis remains debated, primarily due to uncertainties in linking mineralization to regional magmatism. The Xiangzhong Metallogenic Province (XZMP) represents a world-class Au–W metallogenic domain, providing a valuable window to address this issue. We conducted an integrated study of apatite from the Xingfengshan deposit, combining textural analysis with trace element and Sr isotopic measurements. Two types of apatite were identified: Ap-1 from skarn W ore and Ap-2 from auriferous sheeted quartz veins. Both types exhibit homogeneous textures and middle REE-enriched patterns. Nevertheless, they differ significantly in Eu anomalies: Ap-1 exhibits negative anomalies (Eu/Eu* = 0.5–0.9), whereas Ap-2 shows positive anomalies (Eu/Eu* = 1.9–3.7). Integrated with existing geochronological and petrogenetic analyses, REE patterns and Sr isotope ratios indicate that Ap-1 formed via interaction between magmatic-hydrothermal fluid from the Longcangwan granite and the Neoproterozoic Mobin Formation calcareous-interlayered slate. In contrast, Ap-2 likely formed from the interaction between magmatic-hydrothermal fluid corresponding to the Longtan granite and the Neoproterozoic Gaojian Formation slate. Isotopic modeling further reveals significantly stronger fluid-rock interaction during W mineralization (fluid/rock mass ratio = 10.0–34.7) compared to Au mineralization (fluid/rock mass ratio = 0.6–0.8). This study not only establishes genetic links between Au–W mineralization and specific magmatism, supporting an intrusion-related origin for the Au–W deposits in XZMP, but also highlights apatite as a powerful geochemical tracer for reconstructing the evolution of hydrothermal fluid in metasedimentary-hosted Au–W systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 磷灰石地球化学与 Sr 同位素揭示华南湘中成矿省 Au–W 矿床的成因：以兴丰山矿床为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 解决湘中Au–W矿床成因及其与区域岩浆作用对应关系不清的问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合磷灰石岩相特征、微量元素、稀土配分和Sr同位素开展综合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: W矿化与龙藏湾花岗岩有关，Au矿化与龙潭花岗岩有关，且W期水岩作用更强。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以磷灰石地球化学和Sr同位素精确追踪Au–W成矿流体来源与演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为沉积变质岩容矿Au–W系统判别成因、岩浆联系及流体过程提供新依据。

works.title: Pyrite Re-Os Geochronology of Carbonate-Hosted Zn-Pb Deposits of the Canadian Cordillera
works.abstract: Abstract The Cambrian-Devonian platform carbonate rocks found throughout the eastern Canadian Cordillera are important hosts of Zn-Pb sulfide mineralization. Models for mineralization commonly invoke either Laramide compression, or hydrothermal circulation associated with an active tectonic margin that was present during the Paleozoic. To distinguish between these possibilities, we have dated two Zn-Pb deposits from the northeastern Canadian Cordillera (Robb Lake and Prairie Creek) using pyrite Re-Os geochronology. The age of Robb Lake (348 ± 26 Ma) overlaps with that of the clastic-dominated deposits in the Kechika trough, located directly to the west, and is consistent with both sets of deposit types being related to a common metallogenic system. Pyrite collected from stratabound sulfides and quartz-carbonate-sulfide veins from the main orebody at Prairie Creek was dated to 315.7 ± 8.3 Ma and is statistically indistinguishable from the age of 322 ± 10 Ma calculated from Mississippi Valley-type mineralization distal to the main orebody. Our Re-Os dates require that mineralization at Prairie Creek and Robb Lake occurred during the Paleozoic, in stark contrast to previous age estimates made by paleomagnetism (<150 Ma). Consequently, Zn-Pb mineralization in the northern cordillera formed in response to an active margin that existed along the western margin of North America during the Paleozoic, and it is not related to the Laramide compression.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 加拿大科迪勒拉碳酸盐岩容矿 Zn-Pb 矿床中黄铁矿 Re-Os 地质年代学研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在判定加拿大科迪勒拉碳酸盐容矿Zn-Pb矿化究竟形成于拉拉米德挤压期还是古生代活动大陆边缘作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用黄铁矿Re-Os同位素定年，对Robb Lake与Prairie Creek两处Zn-Pb矿床进行成矿时代测定。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Robb Lake与Prairie Creek定年分别为348±26 Ma和315.7±8.3 Ma，表明矿化发生于古生代而非小于150 Ma。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新在于将黄铁矿Re-Os定年直接用于两类碳酸盐容矿Zn-Pb矿床，以约束其成矿时限与构造背景。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为科迪勒拉Zn-Pb成矿系统、区域构造演化及矿床对比提供了关键年代学证据与成因约束。

works.title: Vapor phase facilitated rhenium enrichment in porphyry Mo deposit: Insights from thermodynamic simulations and molybdenum isotopes at Jinduicheng deposit, central China
works.abstract: Rhenium (Re) is a critical metal, predominantly concentrated in molybdenite through lattice substitution, with more than 90% of global production sourced from porphyry deposits. Although fluid boiling is a fundamental ore-forming process in porphyry systems, the role of vapor and liquid phases derived from boiling in controlling Re enrichment remains poorly constrained. Recent studies indicate that Re can partition significantly into the vapor phase and be effectively transported within it; vapor is also known to preferentially incorporate heavy Mo isotopes. Here, the Re contents, Mo isotopic compositions of molybdenite, and thermodynamic modeling results for the Jinduicheng porphyry Mo deposit in the East Qinling–Dabie Mo belt are reported. Our data show that Re concentrations in molybdenite range from 7.04 to 34.24 ppm, and δ 98 Mo values vary from +0.66‰ to −0.38‰. A systematic decrease in δ 98 Mo values over the hydrothermal sequence indicates Mo isotope fractionation driven by fluid boiling. The negative correlation between Re content and δ 98 Mo suggests that Re preferentially partitions into the vapor phase over Mo and precipitates later during cooling, resulting in late-stage, Re-rich molybdenite. Thermodynamic simulations support this boiling-controlled partitioning and precipitation behavior. Furthermore, boiling-induced salinity increase in the residual liquid enhances Re complexation with chloride and promotes Re mobility, consistent with the negative correlation between Re/Mo and δ 98 Mo. Our study demonstrates that Mo isotopes serve as a sensitive tracer for Re transport and enrichment processes in porphyry systems, providing new insights into the mechanisms of Re enrichment.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 蒸气相促进斑岩型 Mo 矿床中铼富集：来自中国中部金堆城矿床热力学模拟与钼同位素的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨斑岩钼矿中流体沸腾的气液分离如何控制铼富集。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合辉钼矿铼含量、钼同位素分析与热力学模拟开展研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铼优先进入气相并晚期沉淀，形成富铼辉钼矿且δ98Mo持续降低。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用钼同位素联合模拟有效示踪斑岩体系中铼迁移富集机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解斑岩矿床关键金属富集规律及找矿评价提供新指标。

works.title: Hydrothermal chlorite geochemistry and formation mechanisms: Linking alterations to uranium mineralization and exploration in the Daliang deposit of South China
works.abstract: Chlorite is the dominant hydrothermal mineral in the Daliang deposit, a granite-related hydrothermal uranium deposit in South China. Despite the prevalence of chlorite, its characteristics and link to uranium mineralization have largely been neglected. Through comprehensive petrographic and geochemical analyses, we identified five distinct chlorite types (Chl-1 to Chl-5) and traced their formation mechanisms (dissolution−precipitation, layer-by-layer replacement, and dissolution−transport−precipitation) and crystallization temperatures (166−303 °C). Our analyses reveal that the chlorite compositions in the Daliang deposit effectively track the distinct evolutionary trends of the physicochemical properties of hydrothermal fluids across different paragenetic stages, including pH and oxygen fugacity. These observations suggest that the intragroup compositional variations in chlorite are primarily controlled by temperature. In contrast, the intergroup differences mainly reflect precursor mineralogy, fluid pH, and variations in oxygen fugacity. The formation of pre-ore chlorites (Chl-1 to Chl-3) provided favorable spatial conditions for uranium mineralization, whereas the evolution of mineralizing fluids from relatively oxidizing conditions (Chl-4) during the early ore stage to reducing conditions (Chl-5) during the main ore stage directly drove the pitchblende formation process. This research establishes new geochemical indicators for exploring uranium. Notably, elevated Cu/Li and Cu/Ga ratios—coupled with decreasing Li/U ratios and high U and Cu concentrations in ore-stage chlorite—emerge as effective proximal vectors for mineralization within the Daliang deposit. These results not only increase our understanding of granite-related hydrothermal uranium deposits but also provide practical tools for accelerating future exploration efforts.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 热液绿泥石地球化学及其形成机制：华南大良矿床中蚀变作用与铀成矿及找矿的联系

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究氯绿泥石的形成机制、地球化学特征及其与铀成矿和找矿的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学观察与系统地球化学分析，划分五类氯绿泥石并估算成矿温度。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 氯绿泥石记录流体温度、pH和氧逸度演化，前期蚀变利于成矿，流体还原化促成沥青铀矿沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出以氯绿泥石成分及Cu/Li、Cu/Ga、Li/U比值作为铀矿近矿找矿指标。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为花岗岩相关热液型铀矿成因研究和勘查靶区快速识别提供实用地球化学工具。

works.title: Late Devonian Mn mineralization as a result of volcanism- and orbital-forced palaeoceanographic changes
works.abstract: Sedimentary Mn carbonate deposits (SMCDs) constitute the dominant global reservoir of Mn, a critical metal essential for modern technologies, yet their formation timing and links to environmental perturbations remain elusive owing to sparse datable minerals and coarse chronostratigraphic resolution. Here, we report astronomical cycle signals preserved in P (indicative of marine productivity) and (Zr+K)/Al (indicative of detrital flux and relative sea level) from drill core ZK2407 of the Xialei SMCD (∼143 Mt Mn), South China, which is embedded in Late Devonian platform/slope facies strata of the Youjiang Basin. Leveraging the 405 kyr eccentricity cycle and conodont biostratigraphy, the astronomical timescale for the Xialei SMCD was established. The deposition of ore layers I and II+III in the Xialei SMCD took ∼130 and ∼550 kyr, respectively. Ore layer I aligns precisely with the Late Famennian Annulata Event (∼363.4 Ma), while ore layer II+III coincides with the Dasberg Event (∼361.9 Ma). As both mass extinctions were volcanically driven, these temporal couplings suggest large volcanic eruptions as the primary forcing for Mn metallogeny. Massive CO2 emissions from large volcanism induced global warming and sea-level rise, fostering redox-stratified oceanic conditions conducive to SMCD formation. Mn concentrations covary positively in-phase with P and sea-level, indicating transgression-mediated co-transport of anoxic deep-sea hydrothermal Mn(II) and nutrients to the oxic shallow sea, where Mn(III/IV) oxides precipitated. The resulting heightened productivity drove organic matter burial, which subsequently facilitated the reductive transformation of these oxides into Mn carbonates during early diagenesis. Orbital forcing modulated the rhythm of Mn enrichment on astronomical timescales by periodically driving paleoenvironmental variations. This work delineates a temporal framework for the formation of SMCDs and demonstrates that the metallogeny of SMCDs resulted from paleoceanographic changes induced by large volcanism and orbital dynamics.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 晚泥盆世锰成矿作用：火山活动与轨道驱动的古海洋变化的结果

summary_bullets.research_question: 探明晚泥盆世沉积锰碳酸盐矿的形成时序及环境驱动机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合钻芯地球化学旋回、405千年偏心率定年与牙形石生物地层分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 锰矿层形成与两次火山驱动灭绝事件同步，并受轨道旋回调制富集节律。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次为该锰矿床建立天文时间标尺并链接火山、海洋变化与成矿过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为关键金属锰资源成因、古海洋演化及深时气候事件研究提供新框架。

works.title: Deciphering Fluid and Uranium Mobilities in Unconformity-Related Uranium Deposits Using Uranium Oxides: The Waterfound Case Study
works.abstract: Abstract The Athabasca basin (Saskatchewan, Canada) hosts high-grade unconformity-related uranium deposits occurring at the interface between Archean-Paleoproterozoic crystalline basement and the Paleozoic to Meso-proterozoic sedimentary basin, rooted above basement-hosted graphite-rich structures. Episodic fluid circulations (1.6–1.0 Ga) are considered to have produced extensive mineralization and hydrothermal haloes in this context. The succession of fluid episodes after the initial uranium deposition nevertheless obscures understanding of the timing and conditions of deposit formation. This study targets the Waterfound U prospect in the northeastern basin, where structural and mineralogical contexts linked to uranium oxides are preserved. A framework is developed and applied to uranium oxides to decipher the structural, physico-chemical, and geochronological evolution of the prospect. The results indicate that uranium oxides at Waterfound formed at 1360 ± 5 Ma in veins and fault cores, in a context of fluid overpressure, associated with clay minerals (first generation of illite and chlorite). These oxides subsequently experienced three main alteration phases: (1) localized brecciation circa 1263 Ma, associated with Ni-Co sulfarsenide precipitation; (2) alteration around 1050 Ma with partial UO2 dissolution, Pb loss, and first chemical trend substitutions, linked to formation of clay minerals (second generation of illite and chlorite); and (3) a near-recent (<100 Ma) alteration causing Pb loss, a second trend of chemical substitutions, and formation of new generation UO2 from oxidized meteoric water. The study highlights the necessity of integrating structural, mineralogical, and geochemical data to accurately reconstruct uranium deposit formation and postcrystallization alteration throughout the geologic history of the Athabasca basin and related Canadian Shield.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 利用铀氧化物解析不整合面相关铀矿床中流体与铀的迁移性：以 Waterfound 为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究Waterfound铀矿床中流体活动与铀迁移的时序、条件及后期改造过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合铀氧化物的构造、矿物学、地球化学与年代学分析，重建矿床演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铀氧化物形成于1360±5 Ma，后经历1263 Ma、约1050 Ma及近现代三期蚀变。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立并应用以铀氧化物为核心的综合解析框架，区分成矿与后期流体事件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于更准确重建Athabasca型铀矿成矿史，并指导矿床解释与找矿。

works.title: Reworked staurolite-rich metamorphic belts as lithium-fertile terranes
works.abstract: Lithium is a strategically critical yet scarce metal vital for the global energy revolution. Understanding how lithium becomes enriched during orogenesis helps locate lithium-fertile terranes. We investigated seven Barrovian metamorphic sequences and metamorphic country rocks from eleven pegmatite-type lithium deposits/pegmatite fields. Staurolite and biotite are the primary lithium hosts (staurolite > biotite ≥ chlorite > muscovite) in metapelites, with average lithium contents increasing from distal Barrovian metamorphic rocks (426 ppm and 75 ppm) to those 200-500 meters from evolved granites (738 ppm and 149 ppm), and to metamorphic country rocks within 200 meters of lithium-rich intrusions (1395 ppm and 560 ppm). Integrated whole‑rock data and phase equilibrium modelling reveal that staurolite-rich layers with considerable biotite function as natural lithium “sponges”, sequestering lithium during metamorphism and fluid metasomatism to form fertile sources for mineralization. These findings establish staurolite‑rich terranes, reworked by multistage metamorphism and anatexis, as promising areas for lithium exploration. Staurolite-bearing layers can effectively capture lithium from crustal reworking processes, leading to the formation of enriched sources for producing lithium-rich melts during melting, according to geochemical analysis and phase equilibrium modelling of Barrovian metamorphic sequences and metamorphic country rocks.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 经再造的富十字石变质带可作为富锂有利地体

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究造山过程中锂如何富集，并识别具锂成矿潜力的变质地体。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析七套巴罗式变质序列和十一处锂伟晶岩围岩的矿物、全岩地球化学及相平衡模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 十字石和黑云母是主要载锂矿物，近花岗岩与锂侵入体围岩的锂含量显著升高。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出富十字石层可作为锂海绵，在多期变质与深熔改造中富集并释放成矿锂源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为锂资源勘查提供新判据，帮助研究者优先锁定富十字石改造变质带。

works.title: The Submarine West Rota Caldera Sulfide Mineral Deposit, Southern Mariana Arc: Exposed roots of a < 1 Ma hydrothermal system
works.abstract: We sampled a suite of fresh, altered, and variably mineralized volcanic rocks from West Rota Volcano (WRV) in the Mariana arc. The WRV is an extinct volcano with a 6 × 10 km-wide caldera, the largest in the Mariana arc portion of the Izu-Bonin-Mariana arc system. Samples recovered during dredging and remotely operated vehicle (ROV) dives range from fresh to highly hydrothermally altered rocks (high S and high loss on ignition values) across a compositional range from basalt to dacite. Alteration is characterized by silicification, formation of white mica, and chlorite in some samples, with intense bleaching of rocks. Altered rocks show elevated S (up to 16.9 wt.%), Cu (up to 14.1 wt.%), and various trace metals and metalloids including As, Ag, Bi, Mo, Sb, Se, Te, W, and Pb. We interpret this alteration and enrichment to fluids degassed from an underlying magma chamber interacting in the subsurface with circulating seawater, i.e. magmatic-hydrothermal alteration. Magmatic contributions to alteration are consistent with generally negative δ 34 S VCDT values that range from −15.4 to 2.3 ‰, more negative than is typical for a sediment-free mid-ocean ridge hydrothermal system and consistent with SO 2 disproportionation. We hypothesize that the Cu enrichment in some samples, the intensity and mineralogy of magmatic alteration, and enrichment in magmatic-volatile elements suggests that the samples are from the roots, or stockwork zone, of a seafloor massive sulphide deposit. We suggest that the upper portions of what would have been a massive sulphide deposit (or deposits) were removed by subsequent caldera-forming eruptions and gravity processes.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 南马里亚纳弧西罗塔海底破火山口硫化物矿床：一个年龄小于 1 Ma 的热液系统的出露根部

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨西罗塔破火山口硫化物矿床是否代表年轻海底热液系统的深部根带。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过拖网与ROV采样，并开展岩石蚀变、元素地球化学及硫同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现强烈岩浆-热液蚀变与铜硫富集，指示暴露的是块状硫化物矿床的网脉根带。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出该区保留了小于100万年海底块状硫化物系统被剥露的深部根部。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为弧后海底矿床成因、岩浆挥发分作用及深海找矿提供关键对比案例。

works.title: Magmatic–hydrothermal mineralization processes in the Xiwukou Sn–W–Rb deposit, Jiangnan orogenic belt: Constraints from multi-mineral U–Pb geochronology
works.abstract: Tin-tungsten-rubidium mineralization is typically associated with magmatic–hydrothermal processes. To examine the transition and mineralization processes from the late magmatic to hydrothermal stages, a comprehensive geochemical-geochronological investigation on monazite, cassiterite, and wolframite, together with bulk-rock compositions and petrology was carried out on the Xiwukou Sn–W–Rb polymetallic deposit and its associated granites in the eastern segment of the Jiangnan Orogenic Belt (JOB), South China. Field observations revealed that altered granite–greisen-type Sn–Rb ore bodies occur in the upper part of the intrusion, while quartz vein-type Sn–W ore bodies are hosted mainly in Silurian sedimentary country rocks. LA-ICP-MS U–Pb dating of monazite from the Xiwukou pluton delineates two distinct magmatic stages: 139.9 ± 1.0 Ma for porphyritic granite (Granite Ⅰ) and 129.0 ± 0.7 Ma for porphyritic biotite granite (Granite Ⅱ). Monazite from altered granite and altered granite-type Sn ore yielded consistent ages of 129.3 ± 0.8 and 128.9 ± 1.3 Ma, respectively. Furthermore, cassiterite and wolframite dating directly constrained the Sn mineralization from 128.9 ± 0.9 Ma (altered granite-type) to 126.4 ± 1.5 Ma (quartz vein-type), while the W mineralization in wolframite–topaz–quartz veins formed from 127.4 ± 1.4 to 125.5 ± 2.0 Ma. The monazite geochemistry revealed systematic compositional variations during the magmatic–hydrothermal evolution, characterized by decreasing Th contents, increasing Eu anomalies, and enhanced LREE-HREE differentiation from the granite and altered granite to the Sn ores. Integrated with the whole-rock geochemistry of the granites and tectonic setting of the JOB during this period, we conclude that emplacement of porphyritic biotite granite at ca. 129 Ma occurred in an extensional setting, which triggered the primary Sn–W metallogenetic event.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 江南造山带西坞口锡—钨—铷矿床的岩浆—热液成矿过程：来自多矿物 U–Pb 年代学的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究锡钨铷矿化由晚期岩浆向热液阶段转变的时序与机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合独居石、锡石、黑钨矿U-Pb定年及全岩地球化学、岩相学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 129Ma黑云母花岗岩侵位触发主成矿，Sn-W矿化持续至约125Ma。
summary_bullets.innovation: 用多矿物U-Pb直接约束岩浆—热液演化与Sn-W成矿时空关系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为花岗岩相关稀有金属成矿机制、找矿预测和区域构造解释提供约束。

works.title: Deciphering ore formation and guiding ore exploration for antimony within the North Himalayan Metallogenic Belt, southern Xizang (Tibet): Insights from antimony isotopic fingerprints
works.abstract: The North Himalayan Metallogenic Belt (NHMB) hosts a series of Sb, Sb-Au, and Sb-Pb-Zn-Ag deposits, yet the genetic association for these deposits remains poorly understood. Herein, we examine the Sb isotopic compositions of these Sb-bearing deposits to gain insights into regional Sb mineralization processes and guide ore exploration. The measured δ123Sb values (relative to the NIST 3102a standard) of the stibnite range from −0.16‰ to +2.06‰, with the Mazhala deposit exhibiting the lightest Sb isotopic compositions (−0.16‰ to +0.15‰), followed by the Shalagang (+0.09‰ to +0.35‰) and Cheqiongzhuobu (−0.11‰ to +0.45‰) deposits. Meanwhile, the Taga deposit displays the heaviest Sb isotopic compositions (+1.89‰ to +2.06‰) observed to date. Rayleigh distillation is inferred as the primary mechanism driving Sb isotopic variation during ore formation. With the support of S-Pb isotopic data and geological evidence, a Rayleigh distillation model was established. This model, together with the negative correlation between Sb isotopic compositions and ore-forming paleodepths, indicates that the studied Sb-bearing deposits in the NHMB share a common dominant Sb source (Precambrian metamorphic basement). These Sb-bearing deposits are products of a large-scale regional Sb-bearing hydrothermal system that precipitated ores at different positions or paleodepths within the shallow crust. Subsequently, these ores underwent differential erosion. Additionally, the regional differential erosion coupled with the Rayleigh distillation model indicate that the deeper parts of these deposits still hold significant potential for Sb-Au exploration. These findings provide new insights into the role of Sb isotopes in tracing hydrothermal mineralization processes and guiding regional exploration strategies.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 基于锑同位素指纹解析西藏南部北喜马拉雅成矿带锑矿成矿作用并指导找矿勘查

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究北喜马拉雅成锑矿床的成因联系、锑来源及找矿指示。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定辉锑矿锑同位素，并结合硫铅同位素、地质证据与瑞利分馏建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 各矿床共享前寒武纪变质基底锑源，锑同位素差异主要受瑞利分馏与成矿深度控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以锑同位素指纹和分馏模型系统揭示区域锑成矿过程并预测深部找矿潜力。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为示踪热液成矿系统、厘清矿床成因联系及指导深部锑金勘查提供新工具。

works.title: In-situ mineral chemistry, sulfur and lead isotopes, and paragenetic analysis to unravel the ore-forming processes in Qibaoshan Co-Ni-Cu-Pb-Zn deposit (Qin-Hang metallogenic belt, South China)
works.abstract: Abstract Cobalt and nickel are critical metals in high-demand for clean energy technologies, its occurrence in sediment-hosted deposits is mostly in association with Cu, but rare in association with Pb-Zn mineralization. The Qibaoshan deposit, located in the Qin-Hang metallogenic belt of western Jiangxi, South China, presents a unique case of stratiform Zn-Pb-Co-Ni-Cu mineralization hosted in Devonian-Carboniferous clastic-carbonate strata, with no exposed magmatic rocks. This study integrates in-situ mineral chemistry, sulfur and lead isotopes, and paragenetic analysis to unravel the ore-forming processes of this unusual polymetallic system. Results reveal two distinct mineralization events: (1) an earlier Pb-Zn stage driven by basin fluids heated by concealed magmatism, with metals and sulfur sourced from the metamorphic basement; and (2) a later Co-Cu-Ni stage linked to intermediate-mafic magmatic-hydrothermal fluids, introducing magma-derived sulfur and metals. Cobalt and nickel occur mainly as independent minerals, including sulfarsenide cobaltite, gersdorffite, diarsenide safflorite, rammelsbergite, loellingite, and triarsenide skutterudite, with minor substitution in pyrite and arsenopyrite. This study highlights a rare example of superimposed sediment-hosted base metal and critical metal mineralization, driven by dual fluid systems with contrasting sources. The findings challenge traditional models of sediment-hosted deposits and offer new insights into the diversity of cobalt enrichment mechanisms. The Qibaoshan deposit serves as a key natural laboratory for understanding metal coexistence, fluid evolution, and exploration targeting in complex polymetallic systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 利用原位矿物化学、硫和铅同位素及矿物共生分析揭示七宝山Co-Ni-Cu-Pb-Zn矿床（华南钦杭成矿带）的成矿过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 解析七宝山层控Co-Ni-Cu-Pb-Zn矿床的成矿过程与物质来源。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合原位矿物化学、硫铅同位素及矿物共生序列分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 矿床经历早期Pb-Zn和晚期Co-Cu-Ni两阶段叠加成矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示无出露岩浆岩区双源流体驱动的关键金属叠加成矿。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为层控多金属矿找矿模型与钴富集机制研究提供新依据。

works.title: Identifying ca. 190 Ma Nb-Ta-Sn metasomatic alteration in the world-class Bailongshan pegmatite Li deposit, Northwest China
works.abstract: Pegmatite-aplite systems are critical hosts for Li, Nb, and Ta mineralization, yet the role of their spatial distribution and overprinting enrichment processes remains poorly constrained. The world-class Bailongshan Li pegmatite deposit (Li2O resource >5 Mt), situated in the Western Kunlun Orogenic Belt of Northwest China, hosts Li-Nb-Ta mineralization primarily in coarse-grained spodumene pegmatites (Spd-1; >3 cm wide; pegmatite layer). These Spd-1 pegmatites are crosscut by fine-grained, spodumene-bearing pegmatites (Spd-2; <3 cm wide; aplite layer) that also exhibit distinct Nb-Ta-Sn enrichment. Two types of aplite are distinguished in the Bailongshan deposit: (1) aplite associated with and parallel to pegmatite zones, which is mostly spodumene-free, and (2) aplite layers that crosscut pegmatite zones at a small angle, exhibit a fine-grained texture, host fine-grained spodumene, and are characterized by typical hydrothermal alteration. Geochronology of columbite-group minerals (CGMs) in the coarse-grained pegmatite and fine-grained aplite layers reveals primary magmatic crystallization at ca. 210 Ma and a later metasomatic alteration at ca. 190 Ma (191.8 ± 1.5 Ma to ca. 191.0 ± 1.4 Ma), recorded by CGMs with higher Sn, Hf, Zr, and total rare earth elements (ΣREEs) with dissolution-precipitation textures. Spd-2 crystals in the fine-grained spodumene pegmatite are primarily xenocrystic, as the structural data obtained from single-crystal X-ray diffraction of both coarse-grained and fine-grained spodumene exhibits comparable structural characteristics. The electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) data indicated a slight orientation difference (0° to 2°) between the Spd-2 grains and the larger Spd-1 crystals. Coarse-grained Spd-1 was incorporated into the fine-grained aplite layer to form the xenocrystic Spd-2; this is evidenced by their comparable crystallographic structures despite the elevated Na, Mn, Fe, Ga, and Sn concentrations in Spd-2. The “bookshelf” structures in the aplite layer further suggest that ductile deformation facilitated the mechanical disaggregation of spodumene; this, combined with metasomatic alteration, contributed to localized Nb-Ta-Sn enrichment.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 识别中国西北世界级白龙山伟晶岩型锂矿床中约190 Ma的Nb-Ta-Sn交代蚀变

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究白龙山伟晶岩-细晶岩中锂铌钽锡富集的时空分布及叠加改造机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合铌钽铁矿定年、单晶XRD、EBSD及矿物地球化学与构造观察分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 粗粒伟晶岩约210Ma成岩，约190Ma交代改造促使细晶岩局部Nb-Ta-Sn再富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次识别白龙山约190Ma铌钽锡交代事件，并证明细粒锂辉石多为捕虏晶。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为伟晶岩型锂铌钽矿成因、叠加富集识别及找矿预测提供新依据。

works.title: Insights into Mountain Pass carbonatite formation from in-situ sulfur isotopes and geochemistry of sulfate and sulfide minerals
works.abstract: The Mountain Pass carbonatite stock hosts a world-class rare earth element deposit and may be classified as a carbonate-sulfate igneous rock, as it contains on average > 50 volume percent carbonate minerals and 20 to 30 volume percent sulfate minerals. The sulfates range in composition from barite to celestine and locally occur with sparse sulfide minerals. We investigate the origin of sulfur enrichment and the occurrence of sulfur-bearing minerals in the Mountain Pass carbonatite with in-situ sulfur isotope and mineral chemistry. Barite cores with δ34S of 1 to 3‰ do not coexist with sulfides, whereas celestine rims with δ34S of > 3‰ are associated with sulfides with δ34S < -10‰. We propose a model in which sulfur-bearing sediments were subducted during episodes of plate convergence in the Mojave Province that preceded Mountain Pass magmatism. Metasomatism of the overlying mantle by melts derived from the subducted sediments generated an unusually carbon- and sulfur-rich source to yield carbonatite magmas. Sulfur from primary carbonatite magmas and ~ 1 to 7% sulfur from subducted sediment melts yielded a slightly enriched δ34S composition (relative to depleted mantle δ34S of -1‰) for early crystallizing barite. Celestine rims on magmatic barite cores formed at low, hydrothermal temperatures (< 350 °C) based on S isotope thermometry for equilibrium celestine-galena and celestine-pyrite pairs. The sparse sulfides in the carbonatite stock are not in equilibrium with the primary barite cores and therefore do not permit S isotope thermometry estimates of magmatic temperatures. The S/Se ratios of sulfide minerals (> 3,400) typically exceed primitive mantle values (S/Se of 3,340), also consistent with their derivation from hydrothermal fluids. Trace occurrences of sulfide and sulfate minerals in alkaline silicate stocks related to the carbonatite stock have similar δ34S compositions and yield similarly low formation temperatures, suggesting regionally extensive and chemically similar sulfur-bearing hydrothermal fluids that imparted lithologically diverse rocks with a consistent sulfur isotope fingerprint.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 基于原位硫同位素及硫酸盐和硫化物矿物地球化学的 Mountain Pass 碳酸岩形成机制认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 阐明Mountain Pass碳酸岩中硫富集及硫酸盐、硫化物的成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 原位硫同位素、矿物化学分析，并结合S同位素测温与S/Se比值判别。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早期重晶石源于岩浆，后期天青石边与硫化物由低温热液形成，硫部分来自俯冲沉积物。
summary_bullets.innovation: 区分岩浆与热液两阶段硫来源，并提出俯冲沉积物交代地幔的成矿模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碳酸岩型稀土矿的硫循环、成矿过程及区域热液作用研究提供关键约束。

works.title: Texture, trace element geochemistry, and sulfur isotopes of pyrite fingerprint the Cu Zn (Au) metallogeny of the Meiling deposit in the Kalatag district, NW China
works.abstract: This paper presents combined texture, trace elements, and sulfur isotopes of five paragenetic pyrites (Py1 to Py5) to fingerprint the hydrothermal evolution (Stage I to Stage V) of the Meiling deposit, NW China. Py1 grains with distinct core-rim zonation textures and low Co/Ni ratios are interpreted as pre-ore syn -sedimentary origin and then modified by late hydrothermal process. High contents of Ni, Co, As, Ti, Te, and V in Py2 indicate relatively moderate-high temperature and reducing conditions in hydrofracturing during decreasing fluid pressure. Fluid composition, temperature, and fluid-rock reactions are the main factors controlling the incorporation of trace elements in Py3 and Py4, and the ore-forming fluids were enriched by Cu and Zn in Stage III and Stage IV, respectively. Specifically, later fine-grained Py3-F and Py4-F are more enriched in Cu, Zn, and Au, which is interpreted as both boiling and cooling processes caused by decrease of pressure and temperature in a fluid saturated with respect to metal elements. An oxidizing state in open spaces and mixture of fluids facilitated the precipitation of Py5 in the late stage V. We propose that pyrite grains characterized by high Cu and Zn contents and negative δ 34 S values can discriminate economic Cu-rich and Zn-rich veins from barren veins to ascertain potential metal endowment in epithermal deposits.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 黄铁矿的结构构造、微量元素地球化学和硫同位素示踪中国西北卡拉塔格地区梅岭矿床Cu-Zn（Au）成矿作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在厘清梅岭矿床铜锌（金）成矿演化及黄铁矿示踪意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合五期黄铁矿的显微构造、微量元素地球化学与硫同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 不同期黄铁矿记录了流体温压、氧化还原与混合作用，并指示铜锌富集阶段。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出以高Cu、Zn和负δ34S黄铁矿识别富矿脉与贫矿脉的新判据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为浅成热液矿床找矿评价和成矿过程重建提供了有效指标。

works.title: Selective transport of light vs. heavy rare earth elements by sulfate/bisulfate complexes in hydrothermal fluids
works.abstract: This study explores the transport of rare earth elements (REE) in acidic sulfate-bearing hydrothermal fluids and the implications for the fractionation of light/heavy REE in critical mineral deposits. The speciation of Nd (light REE) and Yb (heavy REE) sulfate complexes were determined via in situ Raman spectroscopy using fused SiO 2 capillary cells up to 300 °C at saturated water vapor pressure (0.1–8.6 MPa) and in a hydrothermal diamond anvil cell up to 500 °C and 540 MPa. The REE monosulfate (REESO 4 + ) and REE disulfate (REE(SO 4 ) 2 − ) species are stable below 150 to 250 °C but become less stable at higher temperatures, particularly the light REE, due to the decreased solubility of REE sulfate solids. At higher pressure, these REE sulfate complexes display an increased stability field up to 400 °C. The REE bisulfate complex (REEHSO 4 2+ ) was identified with a wide stability field below 400 °C for the HREE in acidic Yb 2 (SO 4 ) 3 -bearing solutions, whereas in Nd 2 (SO 4 ) 3 -bearing solutions, the LREE bisulfate complex is restricted to below 100 °C. These results suggest that bisulfate is a previously unrecognized selective ligand for heavy REE transport at temperatures between 100 and 400 °C in acidic oxidized hydrothermal fluids. Such fluids are responsible for hydrothermal alteration in many REE deposits. Prediction of phase stabilities across pressure, temperature, and composition space ( P - T - x ) is crucial for predicting the role of aqueous REE sulfate complexes in the mobilization of REE in crustal fluids.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 热液流体中硫酸根/重硫酸根配合物对轻、重稀土元素的选择性迁移

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究酸性硫酸盐热液中轻、重稀土的络合迁移与分异机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 用原位拉曼光谱结合熔融石英毛细管和金刚石压腔开展高温高压实验。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 重稀土双硫酸氢根络合物在100–400°C更稳定，轻稀土稳定域更窄。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次识别硫酸氢根为选择性迁移重稀土的重要配体并界定其稳定域。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助预测地壳热液中稀土迁移富集规律并指导关键矿床成因研究。

works.title: Calcium isotopes and thermodynamic calculations decipher fluorite mineralization in hydrothermal systems
works.abstract: Fluorite mineralization, an economically significant process, remains insufficiently understood because traditional geochemical tracers are limited in resolving Ca sources and depositional mechanisms within complex hydrothermal systems. In this study, we integrate calcium (Ca) isotopes with strontium–neodymium (Sr–Nd) isotopes, thermodynamic calculations, and in-situ optical observations to investigate the mineralization and precipitation mechanisms of diverse fluorite deposits, hosted in magmatic, volcanic, and carbonate rocks. Our results reveal considerable variations in δ 44/40 Ca values (0.90–1.89‰) among the deposits. These variations are governed primarily by fluid sources: elevated δ 44/40 Ca values (up to 1.89‰) reflect derivation from ancient evaporitic brines, whereas lower values indicate contributions from crustal or mantle sources. Additionally, equilibrium isotope fractionation during fluorite precipitation (0.21–0.44‰) further influences the δ 44/40 Ca values. Importantly, Ca isotopes demonstrate that Ca is derived predominantly from mineralization fluids rather than from host rocks, even in systems exhibiting strong hydrothermal alteration. To validate the model proposing both F and Ca derived from fluids, this study conducted thermodynamic calculations and in-situ optical observations. The results demonstrate that fluorite solubility exhibits temperature-dependence. Furthermore, specific ions in geological fluids (particularly Al 3+ and H + ) could significantly enhance fluorite dissolution through interactions with F − (via complexation and protonation). These findings indicate that Ca isotopes can serve as effective tracers for Ca sources in hydrothermal mineralization systems, and the coexistence mechanism of Ca and F can fully account for large-scale, highly efficient fluorite mineralization. This study provides the first evidence from Ca isotopes and thermodynamics for the cooling and decompression mineralization model.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 钙同位素与热力学计算揭示热液系统中的萤石成矿作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在厘清热液系统中萤石成矿的钙来源与沉淀机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合Ca同位素、Sr-Nd同位素、热力学计算与原位光学观测开展研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Ca主要来自成矿流体，冷却减压及Al3+、H+作用促进萤石沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用Ca同位素与热力学共同验证萤石冷却减压成矿模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为示踪热液成矿物质来源和解释高效萤石富集提供新工具。

works.title: Integrating biotite and zircon geothermometry with halogen chemistry and oxygen fugacity constraints: implications for magmatic fluid evolution and gold mineralization in the northern margin of the North China craton
works.abstract: The Northern margin of the North China Craton (NNCC) hosts major gold deposits linked to Late Jurassic–Early Cretaceous granitic magmatism. Although spatial relationships between specific intrusions (e.g., Dahuabei, Haigou, Xitaizi–Jinchanggouliang granites and Duimiangou quartz monzodiorite) and mineralization are established, the roles of magmatic temperature, halogen chemistry, redox state, and fluid exsolution in ore formation remain debated. This study integrates zircon–biotite geothermometry, halogen fugacity proxies, and oxygen fugacity ( f O₂) constraints to reconstruct magmatic–hydrothermal evolution in the Hadamengou, Jinchanggouliang–Erdaogou, and Haigou deposits. Field evidence, including pegmatite dikes, unidirectional solidification textures (UST), and quartz “eyes,” indicates volatile-rich residual melts (10–50% H₂O) and hydraulic fracturing during fluid release. Biotite Cl/F ratios reveal contrasting metallogenic affinities: Cl-rich systems at Jinchanggouliang–Erdaogou resemble porphyry Cu–Au environments, whereas F-rich magmas at Hadamengou and Dahuabei are comparable to porphyry Mo settings. Zircon and biotite geochemistry indicates moderately oxidized conditions near the Ni–NiO to magnetite–hematite buffers, favoring Au transport as chloride and sulfur complexes. Variations in halogen activity and redox state control deposit styles and emphasize localized physicochemical controls on gold fertility.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 整合黑云母和锆石地温计、卤素地球化学与氧逸度约束：对华北克拉通北缘岩浆流体演化与金成矿作用的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究华北克拉通北缘金矿成矿中岩浆温度、卤素化学、氧逸度与流体演化的作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合锆石-黑云母测温、黑云母Cl/F代理、氧逸度约束及野外岩相证据开展分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 富挥发分残余熔体释放流体致裂，卤素活度与中等氧化态共同控制金矿化类型与金富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统耦合测温、卤素逸度与氧逸度指标，重建区内岩浆—热液成矿演化过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为判别花岗质岩体金成矿潜力及理解不同矿床类型的物理化学控制提供依据。

works.title: Unravelling the petrogenetic link between carbonatites and high-grade Nb-rich phoscorites: insights from in-situ magnetite microanalysis at the Boa Vista deposit, Central Brazil
works.abstract: Carbonatites and phoscorites are the world’s main sources of REE and Nb, yet their genetic relationship remains controversial. In the Alto Paranaíba Igneous Province (APIP) of central Brazil—the world’s largest producer of Nb—the Boa Vista Nb deposit exploits residual soils from pyrochlore-rich phoscorites associated with carbonatites. Assessing petrogenetic processes in the Boa Vista deposit is challenging due to the intense alteration of the host rocks, including CO2-, K- and OH−-rich alteration/fenitization, which obscures bulk geochemical signals and hinder reconstruction of magmatic processes. Here, we integrate field observations from the Boa Vista mine with µ-XRF mineral mapping, EMPA data and LA-ICP-MS trace element analysis of magnetite to investigate the petrogenetic relationship between carbonatites and phoscorites. Macrotextural evidence from drill cores reveals rhythmic intercalation of carbonatite and phoscorite cumulate layers at depths exceeding 500 m. Magnetite from both rock types exhibits subhedral habits with ilmenite lamellae oxy-exsolutions without martitization, indicating high-temperature magmatic crystallization from a parental carbonatite magma. Phoscorite magnetite shows enrichment in HFSE relative to those in carbonatites, a signature consistent with co-crystallization of pyrochlore group minerals. In particular, Nb contents in magnetite are an order of magnitude higher in high-grade Nb deposits like Boa Vista compared to low-grade occurrences worldwide, suggesting its potential as a grade indicator. These results suggest that phoscorites may form through efficient heavy crystal segregation during early carbonatite fractionation, rather than from a specific immiscible phoscorite magma. This research contributes to our understanding of high-grade Nb ores in alkaline-carbonatite complexes, highlighting crystal/magma segregation as a crucial mechanism for forming Nb-rich phoscorites.

works.translated_title: 揭示碳酸岩与高品位富 Nb phoscorite 之间的成因联系：来自巴西中部 Boa Vista 矿床原位磁铁矿微区分析的认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨Boa Vista碳酸岩与富铌磷灰岩的成因联系及高品位铌矿形成机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合矿区钻芯观察、微区XRF制图、EMPA与LA-ICP-MS磁铁矿原位分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 两类岩石源于母体碳酸岩浆，富铌磷灰岩主要由早期重晶体高效分离形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以磁铁矿原位微量元素为抗蚀变示踪剂，提出铌含量可指示矿体品位。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碳酸岩型铌稀土矿成因重建、找矿评价及高品位矿预测提供新依据。

works.title: Burbankite-bearing ferrocarbonatite and its alteration to LREE ore at Swartbooisdrift, NW Namibia
works.abstract: Based on compiled mineralogical and geochemical data, we show that burbankite-rich ferrocarbonatite is altered to calcite–bastnäsite–monazite ore at Swartbooisdrift, NW Namibia. The magmatic carbonatite assemblage comprises ankerite, magnetite, pyrochlore, fluorapatite, and locally abundant burbankite. All of these minerals can be enriched in layers that define a magmatic flow banding. Burbankite formation can be restrained to ~ 650 °C. Late-magmatic to hydrothermal alteration proceeds in situ from burbankite to carbocernaite (I to II) ± calcite ± barite ± strontianite, then cordylite-(Ce), monazite-(Ce) and finally ancylite-(Ce). Pyrochlore alters to columbite-(Fe) and fluorapatite to secondary monazite-(Ce). The calcite–bastnäsite–monazite ore forms below ~ 460 °C as veins, lenses and bands confined to the main ferrocarbonatite dikes. Its pinkish color results from minor hematite. Mass-balance calculations indicate fluid-assisted removal of Sr, Na, Mg, Ba and addition of Ca, P, Fe, Mn and LREE with modest volume loss to reach ore grades. C-O stable isotope analyses for the ferrocarbonatite, burbankite and LREE ore show an increasingly heavier δ18O signature linked to the hydrothermal alteration with an interpreted rising crustal influence and decreasing temperatures. Additionally, in-situ trace element analysis further provides arguments for the hydrothermal character of LREE redistribution through fluid-sensitive element ratios (Th/U; Y/Ho; Pb/Th). Our data suggest that formation of the Swartbooisdrift LREE ore results from instability and reaction of early Na-carbonates, apatite, and pyrochlore with progressive fluid evolution (decreasing Na and increasing oxygen fugacity with decreasing T), finally leading to a transformation of burbankite-rich zones of ferrocarbonatite into pink ore along carbonatite-hosted structures. This establishes a coherent magmatic–hydrothermal pathway from primary burbankite to economic LREE mineralization.

works.translated_title: 纳米比亚西北部Swartbooisdrift含布班克石铁碳酸岩及其蚀变为轻稀土（LREE）矿石

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨斯瓦特布伊斯德里夫铁碳酸岩如何演化为轻稀土矿体。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合矿物学、地球化学、同位素、原位微量元素及质量平衡分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 富钠碳酸盐铁碳酸岩经流体交代逐步转化为方解石-氟碳铈矿-独居石矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立了原生burbankite到经济性轻稀土成矿的完整岩浆-热液演化路径。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碳酸岩型轻稀土矿成因解释、找矿判据与演化模型提供关键依据。

works.title: Sequestration of chlorine in scapolite during metamorphism and the formation and role of residual bittern brines for mineralized systems in the Mesoproterozoic Belt Supergroup, North America
works.abstract: The Mesoproterozoic Belt Supergroup, which spans western Montana and central to northern Idaho in the USA and southeastern British Columbia in Canada, where it is known as the Purcell Supergroup, hosts several mineralized systems, including the world-class Coeur d'Alene Ag-Pb-Zn district and the Idaho cobalt belt in the southeastern Lemhi subbasin. In both regions, metamorphism, including the involvement of metamorphic fluids, is suspected to have played an important role in the formation and remobilization of ore deposits. Scapolite, a halogen-bearing mineral common in salty metamorphic rocks and in specific Belt lithologies, preserves a geochemical record of these fluids. We integrated Cl/Br ratios in scapolite with whole-rock geochemistry to reconstruct fluid evolution during metamorphism and evaluate the role of these fluids in mineralization. Our data show that halite components were sequestered in scapolite during metamorphism in the saltiest protoliths of the middle and upper Belt strata in the northern part. During halite formation, residual bittern brines were produced and subsequently infiltrated deeper stratigraphic levels. Such residual bittern brine fluid signatures have previously been identified in mineralized zones of the Coeur d'Alene district. Scapolite from the Lemhi subbasin shows that residual bittern brine fluids dominated ore-bearing lithologies there as well. Cobalt mineralization in the Lemhi region has previously been attributed to interaction between residual bittern brines and magmatic fluids released from a 1349 ± 76 Ma intrusion. A new U Pb titanite age from a scapolite-rich biotitite records metasomatism by non-magmatic, highly Br-rich fluids at 1231 ± 18 Ma, indicating fluid rock interaction that likely (re-) mobilized ore metals. These fluids are interpreted as a “pure” residual bittern brine end-member, compositionally similar to those linked to Cu Co mineralization in the Zambian Copperbelt. Our results show that residual bittern brines played a central role in the metallogenic evolution of the Belt Basin, with minimal evidence for a substantial halogen contribution from halite-dissolution or magmatic fluids.

works.translated_title: 变质作用过程中氯在方柱石中的封存，以及残余苦卤卤水在北美中元古代贝尔特超级群成矿系统中的形成与作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨变质期氯如何封存于方柱石及残余苦卤卤水对成矿的作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合方柱石Cl/Br比、全岩地球化学与U-Pb榍石定年重建流体演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 方柱石封存卤石组分，残余富溴苦卤卤水渗入深部并主导成矿与金属再活化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统用方柱石Cl/Br示踪盆地变质卤水来源，并识别非岩浆纯苦卤端元。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为判别成矿流体来源与盆地金属富集机制提供了新指标和区域类比。

works.title: Evidence for organic and igneous carbon sources in the Mesoproterozoic Adirondack Highlands graphite district, New York
works.abstract: This study examined the origin of graphite mineralization in the Mesoproterozoic Adirondack Highlands. Flake graphite was mined from the historic mining district around Ticonderoga, New York, USA, from the 1850s to the 1920s. Most of the production and reserves from the district are disseminated graphite from feldspathic quartz schists (e.g., Dixon-American Graphite Co. mine, Faxon property, Flake Graphite Company). Protolith sediments of the schists were deposited in the Trans-Adirondack backarc basin at ca. 1.25 Ga and were metamorphosed to high grade at 1.18−1.15 Ga during the accretionary Shawinigan orogeny and at 1.09−1.02 Ga during the Ottawan phase of the Grenvillian orogeny. Major elements and carbon isotopes of graphite from schists (δ13C = −28.1‰ to −5.4‰ relative to Vienna Peedee belemnite) are consistent with derivation from organic carbon in protolith sandstones that devolatilized during metamorphism. Some small mines and prospects in the district mined graphitic calcite marbles and clinopyroxene ± scapolite skarns associated with a pegmatite suite dated by U-Pb in zircon to 1.04−1.01 Ga (e.g., Lead Hill and Crown Point deposits), and rare graphite veins are observed at several deposits. Hydrothermal flake graphite from pegmatites, skarns, and veins are distinct from graphite in schist-hosted deposits and have δ13C values that cluster around −7‰ to −5‰, consistent with deposition from igneous CO2. Covariation of carbon and oxygen stable isotopes and U-Pb zircon geochronology are not compatible with precipitation from fluids derived from country rock metapelites or marbles. Some graphite districts elsewhere show compelling evidence for remobilization and redeposition of sedimentary-derived carbon as hydrothermal graphite, sometimes as thick veins producing world-class, high-grade deposits. In the Adirondacks, there is evidence for two generations of graphite mineralization with distinct carbon sources: syngenetic graphite with an organic origin in Shawinigan quartz schists and epigenetic graphite with an igneous origin in Ottawan skarns and pegmatites.
