works.translated_title: 富HREE离子吸附型矿床的形成源自富LREE花岗闪长岩：以老挝孟昆矿床为例

summary_bullets.research_question: This study investigates how HREE-rich ion-adsorption ore can form from LREE-dominated granodiorite, challenging prevailing views.
summary_bullets.methodology: Geochemical, mineralogical, and REE speciation analyses were conducted on weathering profile samples from the Meng Khun deposit.
summary_bullets.key_findings: HREE ore forms from LREE-rich granodiorite via differential weathering of HREE-enriched accessory minerals, Ce immobilization, varied REE mobility, and selective carbonate complexation.
summary_bullets.innovation: The study constructs a genetic model for unconventional HREE-rich ion adsorption ore derived from LREE-dominated parent rocks.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research broadens prospecting perspectives for HREE resources by identifying a new, unconventional ore-forming mechanism.

works.title: Dolocrete blanket over Mt Weld carbonatite (Western Australia) - A geochemical and mineralogical window to REE super-resource
works.abstract: The geochemistry and mineralogy of REE and Nb were examined in lens-shaped dolocrete covering the central part of the (REE, Nb)-rich regolith derived from the Mount Weld carbonatite, Western Australia. Dolocrete was divided into three distinct units: (a) Upper White Dolocrete (UWD), comprising dolomite interwoven by palygorskite and traces of quartz, florencite-Ce, Ti-oxides, monazite-Ce; (b) Middle Pisolite Dolocrete (MPD) containing dolomite matrix with nodules of Nb-goethite, allogenic quartz, monazite-Ce, florencite-Ce, and cerianite; (c) Basal Breccia Dolocrete (BBD) comprising massive dolomite hosting monazite-Ce, florencite-Ce, and ironstone clasts containing Nb-goethite, Nb-ilmenite, Nb-rutile, quartz, baddeleyite, and zircon. The whole-rock analysis revealed an increase in (La/Yb) N with depth from UWD at 74, 247 in MPD, to 723 in BBD. The concentrations of REE in dolomite (Ca/Mg=1–1.2) increased from 66 ppm (median) in UWD, 281 ppm in MPD, to 347 ppm in BBD. Niobium-bearing ilmenite was altered to Nb-leucoxene (max. 18 wt.% Nb 2 O 5 ). Incorporation of Nb into goethite (0.1–1.4 wt.%) and the absence of pyrochlore suggest Nb migration during the dolocrete formation. Stable isotope values ( δ 18 O VPDB = −2.9‰ – −0.6‰, δ 13 C VPDB = −6.7‰ – −5.9‰) support a sedimentary origin of dolomite formed in saline groundwaters. A fluctuating water table in a semi-arid environment promoted dissolution and reprecipitation of REE-enriched dolomite with Mg most likely derived from carbonatite. These results reveal a complex evolution of REE and Nb during the weathering of metal-enriched regolith, underscoring the importance of dolocrete as a geochemical archive and a tool for exploration targeting ore deposits of critical minerals.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 覆盖在西澳大利亚Mt Weld碳酸岩之上的白云质钙结壳盖层——揭示稀土超大型资源的地球化学和矿物学窗口

summary_bullets.research_question: The paper investigates the geochemistry and mineralogy of REE and Nb within the dolocrete overlying the Mt Weld carbonatite regolith.
summary_bullets.methodology: The study utilized whole-rock geochemical analysis, detailed mineralogical characterization of dolocrete units, and stable isotope analysis (δ18O, δ13C) to understand REE/Nb distribution and origin.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Key findings include distinct dolocrete units with increasing REE and (La/Yb)N with depth, Nb migration into goethite/leucoxene, and a sedimentary origin for dolomite from saline groundwaters.
summary_bullets.innovation: The study offers a novel, detailed geochemical and mineralogical window into the complex evolution of REE and Nb during weathering processes within dolocrete at a super-resource site.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research is valuable for understanding critical mineral formation, utilizing dolocrete as a geochemical archive, and guiding exploration targeting REE and Nb ore deposits.

works.title: Lithospheric multilevel structural controls on the genesis of orogenic gold deposits
works.abstract: The formation of large and superlarge mineral deposits results from the accumulation of significant quantities of mineralized materials, driven by multistage geological processes. However, the complete migration pathway of orogenic gold systems—ranging from deep magmatic sources to crustal mineralization—remains elusive. Here, we integrate multiscale electrical resistivity models with lamprophyre isotopic analyses to establish a coherent metallogenic framework for the Daping gold deposit in the southeastern margin of the Tibetan Plateau. High-resolution magnetotelluric data reveal interconnected low-resistivity anomalies, delineating a continuous, translithospheric pathway. These vertically aligned anomalies represent (1) metasomatized mantle domains enriched in volatiles and Au-bearing melts; (2) transcrustal magmatic-hydrothermal channels facilitating melt ascent; and (3) shallow fluid exsolution loci controlling ore precipitation. Geodynamic simulations further suggest that migration efficiency is influenced by the overlying lithospheric structure—specifically, crustal-scale fault networks channel the metal-rich fluids, while rheological contrasts around the lithosphere-asthenosphere boundary regulate the migration pathway of melt. This study, by unveiling the multilevel structural framework for mineralizing fluid migration for the first time, establishes a unified model that structurally connects mantle reservoirs with near-surficial gold deposits and systematically integrates isotopic signature, geophysical evidence, and translithospheric fluid pathways. Recognizing such a multilevel lithospheric control system not only bridges the critical observational gap between mantle sources and surface mineralization but also offers a predictive framework for gold exploration.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 岩石圈多级构造控制对造山型金矿床成因的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决金矿系统从深部岩浆源到地壳矿化的完整迁移路径不明的问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合多尺度电阻率模型（大地电磁数据）和煌斑岩同位素分析，以建立金矿成矿框架。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现连续的跨岩石圈低电阻率异常通道，连接交代地幔、地壳通道和浅层流体出溶，其迁移受断裂和流变对比控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示了矿化流体迁移的多级结构框架，建立了连接地幔储层与近地表金矿的统一模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究弥合了地幔源与地表矿化之间的观测空白，并为金矿勘探提供了预测框架。

works.title: The genetic link between rhyolitic magmas and low-temperature hydrothermal molybdenum mineralization: Insights from the Zhangmajing Mo-U deposit, Northeast China
works.abstract: Hydrothermal molybdenum mineralization can occur as molybdenite in porphyry deposits at high-temperature conditions (mostly 300−500 °C) or as jordisite in low-temperature hydrothermal deposits (≤250 °C). Previous studies mainly focused on the origin of porphyry Mo deposits that are generally considered to be produced from felsic magmas. However, little is known about the mechanism responsible for molybdenum enrichment in low-temperature systems. To address this knowledge gap, we investigated the Zhangmajing deposit in Northeast China. It is one of the world’s largest known jordisite deposits containing uranium mineralization, with resources totaling 110,000 tonnes at 0.339% Mo and 5000 tonnes at 0.1%−0.3% U. This deposit is mainly hosted by Early Cretaceous rhyolite porphyry, with minor mineralization in volcanic rocks of the Zhangjiakou Formation. The Re-Os isotope results indicate that the mineralization occurred during the Early Cretaceous (ca. 138 Ma), which overlaps with the emplacement ages of the host rocks. The melt inclusion analysis suggests that the rhyolite porphyry corresponds to highly evolved rhyolitic magmas generated in a within-plate tectonic environment, analogous to ore-forming magmas of Climax-type porphyry Mo deposits. Compared with Mo-fertile intrusions, however, zircon chemistry reveals that the Zhangmajing magmas have relatively low oxygen fugacity (average ΔFMQ = 0.7, where FMQ is the reference buffer fayalite-magnetite-quartz) and water contents, showing an affinity with barren igneous suites. Molybdenum partitions strongly into magmatic minerals and residual melts in its tetravalent state. This sequestration hinders the efficient extraction of Mo into exsolving hydrothermal fluids, thereby preventing the formation of a porphyry Mo deposit. We propose that ore formation in Zhangmajing was related to the Early Cretaceous magmatism, which provided the thermal energy for the circulation of fluids—mainly meteoric water. These fluids scavenged ore metals from volcanic−subvolcanic rocks and possibly the underlying basement. The proposed model for low-temperature Mo mineralization provides a new perspective on the genesis of hydrothermal Mo deposits.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 流纹质岩浆与低温热液钼矿化之间的成因联系：来自中国东北张马井 Mo-U 矿床的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决低温热液系统中钼富集机制的知识空白。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了Re-Os同位素、熔体包裹体分析和锆石地球化学等方法，对张马井矿床进行了深入调查。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 张马井低温钼矿化与早白垩世岩浆活动提供的热能有关，流体（主要是大气水）从围岩中萃取金属，而非岩浆直接提供钼。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究提出了一个低温钼矿化新模型，为热液钼矿床的成因提供了新的视角。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究揭示了低温热液钼矿化的独特成因机制，对理解此类矿床的形成具有重要意义。

works.title: Episodic Ore Redistribution in Carlin-Type Gold Deposits in Southeastern Yunnan Province, SW China
works.abstract: Abstract The central-southern Youjiang basin in southeastern Yunnan hosts numerous Carlin-type gold deposits, such as the pyroclastic-hosted Bieli and the siliciclastic-hosted Bielidong deposits. In both deposits, gold occurs as lattice-bound Au+ in sulfide minerals of different paragenetic stages: sedimentary framboidal pyrite (PyS), diagenetic dissolution-reprecipitation porous pyrite (PyDR), hydrothermal early ore pyrite (Py1), main ore pyrite/arsenopyrite (Py2/Apy2), and late ore pyrite (Py3). The textures show there were multiple pulses of fluid flow related to the formation of the deposits. Sedimentary and diagenetic pyrite has negligible Au (<1 ppm) and As (<0.5 wt %) contents and extremely negative δ34S (−49.7 to −21.4‰) values, which differ markedly from early ore Py1 (Au = 0.05–4.20 ppm; As = 0.32–4.16 wt %; δ34S = −3.54 to 10.5‰), main ore sulfide minerals (Py2 and Apy2; mean Au = 9.28 and 39.2 ppm, mean As = 3.16 and 44.6 wt %, mean δ34S = 4.68 and 12.1‰), and late-stage Py3 (Au = 2.27–27.4 ppm; As = 7.80–9.49 wt %; δ34S = 8.62–13.5‰). The main ore sulfide minerals display positive δ34S values (4.68–12.1‰) and pronounced mass-independent sulfur isotope signatures (Δ33S = –2.80 to +8.16‰). The chemical composition and the δ34S and Δ33S values of ore sulfides indicate that the fluids were derived from a sedimentary source, most probably the Precambrian metamorphic rocks beneath the Phanerozoic basin. Both deposits formed by the same process, and the fluids came from the same source. Differences between the deposits are largely related to the local host rocks. The mobilization of the fluids seems to be the far-field effect of tectonic processes at the margins of the South China block.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西南云南省东南部Carlin型金矿床中的幕式矿石再分配

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在分析云南东南部卡林型金矿中金的赋存特征、流体来源及其与矿石再分配的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过对不同世代硫化物（黄铁矿、毒砂）的金、砷含量及硫同位素（δ34S、Δ33S）进行分析，并结合矿物结构进行研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 金以Au+形式赋存于不同世代硫化物中；成矿流体源自沉积岩，可能为前寒武纪变质岩；流体活化与华南地块边缘的远场构造作用有关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次详细揭示了金在不同世代硫化物中的赋存特征，并利用质量无关硫同位素（Δ33S）追踪成矿流体来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为卡林型金矿的成因、流体来源和勘探提供了新的见解，有助于完善成矿模型。

works.title: Structural deformation and hydrothermal fluid migration in the niobium enrichment of the Yushishan deposit, eastern Altyn, northwestern China
works.abstract: The role of tectonic deformation in controlling hydrothermal fluid migration and niobium (Nb) enrichment in orogenic rare-metal deposits is still not well understood. This study explores the interplay of solid-state deformation, hydrothermal fluid flow, and Nb mineralization in the Yushishan deposit, located in the Altyn Mountains, northwestern China. Integrated structural, mineral microtextural, electron backscatter diffraction, fluid inclusion, and H-O isotope analyses reveal that Nb was pre-enriched in Neoproterozoic alkaline volcanic rocks and was subsequently modified and re-enriched by early Paleozoic tectono-hydrothermal events. Ductile shear zones provided permeable pathways for deep-derived F−-Cl−-CO2-bearing fluids, as evidenced by foliation-parallel fluid inclusion planes. Syn-tectonic alteration of amphibole, pyroxene, and titanite released Nb, Y, and rare earth elements (REEs), which were transported as soluble complexes. Fluid alkali consumption and CO2 input lowered fluid pH, enhancing Nb solubility. Although the complex stability initially inhibited precipitation, tectonic focusing of fluids facilitated extensive water-rock interaction and localized Nb enrichment, particularly along the margins of altered minerals, where spikes in Fe2+ destabilized the complexes. Orebody formation occurred in brittle-ductile to brittle domains, controlled by the coupling of deformation-induced permeability and chemical feedbacks. Shifts in the strain regime enhanced fluid pathways, enabling mixing between deep CO2− and NbF6−-YF63−−rich fluids and external alkaline or Ca-rich magmatic or hydrothermal fluids. This fluid mixing triggered abrupt changes in pH and/or redox conditions, leading to complex destabilization and precipitation of Nb minerals. These minerals occur as inclusions hosted within magnetite and ilmenite, or as microveins, providing evidence of strain-fluid pulsation. Furthermore, fault-valve pressure cycling induced fluid immiscibility and boiling, further disrupting complex stability. Our findings highlight that tectonically driven fluid migration is crucial for Nb enrichment, offering a structural-geochemical framework for the exploration of orogenic rare-metal deposits.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西北部阿尔金东部玉石山矿床铌富集中的构造变形与热液流体运移

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决构造变形在控制热液流体运移和造山型稀有金属矿床中铌富集方面的作用，这一问题目前尚不明确。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了综合的构造学、矿物微观结构、电子背散射衍射、流体包裹体和H-O同位素分析方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铌预富集后经构造-热液事件再富集；韧性剪切带提供流体通道；流体碱消耗和CO2输入降低pH；流体混合和断层阀压力循环导致铌矿物沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文提出了一个结构-地球化学框架，解释了构造驱动的流体迁移和化学反馈如何控制造山型稀有金属矿床中的铌富集。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为造山型稀有金属矿床的勘探提供了重要的结构-地球化学框架，有助于更好地理解铌富集机制。

works.title: The Origin of Topaz-Rich Breccias at the Åkulla Au-Te Deposit, Paleoproterozoic Skellefte District, Sweden
works.abstract: Abstract Complex breccia host rocks, quartz-topaz alumina-rich alteration, and low-sulfide ore (<3%) differentiate the Åkulla Au-Te deposit from nearby volcanogenic massive sulfide (VMS) deposits, which are the main deposit type in the Skellefte district. At Åkulla, mineralization comprises native gold and telluride minerals in disseminated, remobilized fracture-associated, quartz vein–associated, and sulfide-associated styles within a steeply dipping lens-shaped domain of strongly altered 1.9 Ga dacitic to andesitic volcanic rocks. The host rocks and mineralization are flattened and elongated subparallel to the main D2 tectonic foliation and lineation and are metamorphosed to upper greenschist facies. The deposit has an almost concentrically zoned hydrothermal alteration pattern with a quartz-topaz–rich core that is centered on a breccia complex. Topaz occurs as discrete altered clasts in the breccias as well as pervasive to patchy alteration. The quartz-topaz-sericite-andalusite core is poor in sulfide and passes outward to sericite-andalusite ± corundum ± quartz ± chlorite associations, then to sericite and finally chlorite. Stringer veins and small semimassive to massive base metal sulfide lenses occur in the alteration zones outside the topaz core, continue ~300 m updip to the Åkulla Östra massive sulfide deposit, and resemble footwall alteration and mineralization associated with nearby VMS deposits. Four main breccia facies are identified based on textural characteristics: monomict jigsaw-fit breccia; poorly sorted, dominantly polymict breccia with rotated clasts; moderately sorted matrix-supported polymict breccia; and well-sorted breccias with graded bedding. These breccias are attributed to quench and hydrothermal brecciation in a sea-floor to subseafloor setting during emplacement of a dacitic-andesitic volcanic complex. Clast size grading within breccia facies with topaz-rich clasts is dominated by fining to the northeast, the same direction as in nearby volcaniclastic sedimentary rocks, indicating that these breccias were emplaced while the strata were flat lying or gently dipping. This constrains the formation of the topaz-rich breccias and Au-Te mineralization to the early synvolcanic evolution of the succession, possibly prior to or during rotation of strata in extensional fault blocks. The topaz- and alumina-rich alteration of the breccias is attributed to acidic, F-rich, probably magmatic-hydrothermal fluids. The Åkulla Au-Te deposit represents unusual, F-rich, subseafloor synvolcanic mineralization within a larger VMS mineral system. The relationship we demonstrate between VMS mineralization, sulfide-poor Au-Te mineralization, complex breccias, and magmatic ore fluids at Åkulla will modify exploration models for VMS mineralization in the Skellefte district and should be considered in other VMS districts.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 瑞典古元古代斯凯莱夫特地区Åkulla金-碲矿床富黄玉角砾岩的成因

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探讨瑞典Åkulla金碲矿床中富含黄玉角砾岩的成因及其与金碲矿化的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过详细的岩石学观察、角砾岩相纹理分析和热液蚀变模式鉴定来确定成因。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Åkulla金碲矿床是VMS系统内一种不寻常的富氟海底-次海底同火山期矿化，其富黄玉角砾岩由酸性、富氟岩浆热液流体在早期同火山期形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文揭示了VMS矿化、贫硫金碲矿化、复杂角砾岩和岩浆矿流体之间的独特关系，为VMS勘探模型提供了新视角。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究通过提供新的勘探模型，对Skellefte地区及其他VMS矿区的勘探地质学家和研究人员具有重要价值。

works.title: Characteristics of structural superimposed halo at the Jiawula Ag-Pb-Zn deposit, Inner Mongolia, China and its significance for exploration
works.abstract: Geochemical exploration for deep-seated, structurally controlled hydrothermal deposits remains a formidable challenge, primarily owing to the attenuation of near-surface primary halo anomalies and the inadequacy of existing metallogenic prediction models. Structural superimposed halo analysis provides essential constraints on axial element zonation patterns, offering direct vectors for mineral targeting. In this study, we integrate surface, tunnel, and drill core geochemical data ( n = 481) to characterize structural superimposed haloes and ore-related element associations at the Jiawula Pb-Zn-Ag deposit. Precise geochemical background values delineated ore-indicating enrichment factors in Orebodies II and III, with correlation matrices revealing elemental linkages in >5000 ppm Pb ores. Using the Gregorian's method, we established the vertical zoning sequence from Hg-As-Sb-B (frontal halo) to Pb-Zn-Cu-Ag (near ore halo) and to Bi-Mo-Mn-Co-Ni-W-Sn (root halo). Axial elemental variation across 10 sublevels in orebody III shows frontal and root Halo superimposition, demonstrating multi-stage mineralization with persistent depth potential. In addition, the thinning of the thickness of the deep orebody in the northern section of the orebody III corresponds to the enrichment of Pb, Zn, Ag and other near ore elements, indicating that there is still a great possibility of the occurrence of orebodies in the deep. Therefore, we have delineated four exploration targets in the section of the orebody III, and drilling further confirmed that there is steep dipping high-grade Pb-Zn-Ag mineralization in this target area. Combined with regional geological data, this study indicates that the Jiawula deposit was formed through two phases of tectono-magmatic events involving: 1) Paleo-Asian Ocean closure along the North China-Siberian Craton suture, and 2) Paleo-Pacific Plate subduction. These processes trigger crust-mantle contamination and the ascent of polymetallic fluids, ultimately resulting in ore deposition within shallow structural traps.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国内蒙古甲乌拉银铅锌矿床构造叠合晕特征及其找矿意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决深部构造控矿热液矿床地球化学勘探中，地表异常衰减和现有成矿预测模型不足的挑战。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合地表、巷道和钻孔地球化学数据，采用格里高利法建立垂向分带序列，并结合相关矩阵和背景值分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 建立了垂向分带序列，揭示了多阶段成矿和深部潜力，圈定并证实了高品位勘探靶区，并提出了两阶段构造岩浆成矿模型。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性地利用构造叠加晕分析结合多源地球化学数据，为深部构造控矿床的矿产靶区定位提供了直接矢量，并成功指导了勘探。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为深部矿产勘探提供了有效的地球化学方法和直接找矿方向，并完善了成矿模型，对相关领域研究者和勘探实践具有重要指导意义。

works.title: Mineralization and Geochemistry of the Metasedimentary Rock-Hosted Au-(Ag-Sb-W) West End Deposit, Stibnite Roof Pendant, Yellow Pine Mining District, Idaho
works.abstract: Abstract The Yellow Pine mining district in central Idaho has been the focus of Au-(Sb-W) mining and exploration for nearly 100 years. Recently, Midas Gold Inc. (now Perpetua Resources) has developed an indicated resource of 170 metric tonnes (t; 5.464 Moz) of Au, 277 t (8.904 Moz) of Ag, and 66.7 Kt (87,000 short tons) of Sb in three deposits. The resources are hosted in the Cretaceous Idaho batholith and a roof pendant of Neoproterozoic to Ordovician metasedimentary rocks that include marble, quartzite, conglomerate, calc-silicate–bearing rock types, and mica schist. Most of the resource hosted in metasedimentary rocks is in the West End deposit. Four stages of mineralization in the metasedimentary rocks have been established by crosscutting relationships between four distinct vein types. Deep early veins are composed of milky white, coarse quartz with pyrite, local molybdenite (86.4 ± 0.4 Ma, Re-Os), and other sulfides, which are associated with mainly propylitic alteration and locally potassic alteration that appears to be temporally associated with the latest phase of the batholith. Deep early veins have the same orientation and similar radiometric dates as late-phase batholith-related leucogranite dikes proximal to the coeval Stibnite stock. Deep early veins are crosscut by main-stage veins composed mainly of quartz, carbonate, arsenopyrite, and arsenian pyrite. Main-stage veins contain more sulfides (up to 7%) and contain the bulk of the gold, which occurs in arsenopyrite and arsenian pyrite. Main-stage veins are strongly spatially and temporally controlled by the West End fault zone. Disseminated mineralization and illite alteration are found proximal to main-stage veins and fault zones. Later epithermal veins with lesser arsenopyrite and pyrite contain gold-rich electrum and are contemporaneous with the Eocene Challis volcanism and subvolcanic intrusions in the district. Epithermal veins formed in fault zones and along joints and lithologic contacts, and locally as stockworks. Unmineralized fine-grained quartz and pyrite microbreccia veins, which locally contain stibnite, crosscut the epithermal veins. The West End deposit shows similarities with the Donlin Creek deposit in Alaska, along with other deposits in the world, where host rocks, mineralogy, and overprinting events provide analogs for West End.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Idaho 州 Yellow Pine Mining District 的 Stibnite Roof Pendant 内变沉积岩容矿的 Au-(Ag-Sb-W) West End 矿床的矿化作用和地球化学

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在详细分析爱达荷州黄松矿区西端金矿床的矿化特征和地球化学性质。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用观察脉体交叉切割关系、矿物学分析和Re-Os同位素测年等方法，确定矿化阶段和成因。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出四期矿化事件，主期脉体富含金，金主要赋存于毒砂和含砷黄铁矿中，并受西端断裂带控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次详细阐明了西端矿床复杂的多期矿化演化过程及其与区域岩浆-构造事件的关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解类似多期次、多类型金矿床的形成机制和勘探提供了重要的类比和地质模型。

works.title: Sources of Sulfide Mineral Components in Au-Ag-W-Sb-Hg Deposits, Stibnite-Yellow Pine District, Idaho: Genetic Relationships to Host and Subjacent Rocks, and Regional Context
works.abstract: Abstract Approximately 5.6 million ounces (Moz) of Au (~174 tonnes [t]) and significant Sb, Ag, W, and Hg were produced from deposits in the Stibnite-Yellow Pine district, Valley County, Idaho, or exist in drill-defined resources. Epigenetic minerals of deposits and resources occur in fault zones in late Cretaceous granitic rocks of the Idaho batholith, in late Proterozoic-early Paleozoic metasedimentary rocks of the Stibnite pendant, and in vein and replacement deposits in pendant strata. Deposits and resources formed during at least five paragenetically distinct events that spanned approximately 24 m.y. The district-wide distribution of Au, Sb, W, and Hg are consistent with temperature gradient zoning in, adjacent to, and distal to major fluid conduits represented by the high-angle, north- to northeast-trending Meadow Creek and West End fault zones. Sulfide minerals of four events and host rocks were evaluated for component sources using Pb, Sr, and S isotope values—which are determined by microbeam and bulk analytical techniques—and by comparison to isotope values, stratigraphy, and ages of host rocks of polymetallic Ag-Au-Cu-Co-Pb-Zn deposits, host rocks, and plutonic rocks in Idaho, Montana, Alberta, and the Great Basin. Based on initial 206Pb/204Pb, 208Pb/204Pb, and 87Sr/86Sr isotope values (13.17–21.26, 31.93–41.24, and 0.703–0.725, respectively) of sulfide minerals and whole rocks, sulfide mineral paragenesis, and comparisons, event 1A pyrite in vein and contact zone deposits (ca. 86–75 Ma); event 2 As ± Au pyrite, which contains most mined and resource Au (ca. 70–58 Ma); and some event 5 stibnite (ca. 49–46 Ma) were sourced from late Proterozoic-early Paleozoic and older, more radiogenic metasedimentary rocks. Alternatively, they were indirectly from Cretaceous intrusions in the Stibnite-Yellow Pine district that obtained Pb from these metasedimentary rocks. Less radiogenic Pb isotope values of other event 5 stibnite and cinnabar in mined deposits and resources are largely indistinguishable from those of the areally extensive Atlanta lobe of the Idaho batholith, reflecting mixed crust sources including Archean, Mesoproterozoic, and Paleozoic rocks. The broad range of δ34S values of sulfide minerals in deposits and host rocks of the Stibnite-Yellow Pine district (–19 to 9‰) and large masses of metasedimentary rocks adjacent to deposits reflect reduction of pore seawater sulfate following sedimentation and transfer of S in sedimentary pyrite to deposits. The relatively confined range of mostly positive δ34S values of minerals comprising events 1, 2, and 5 in granitic rocks (~1–9‰) implies that sedimentary pyrite was formed by thermochemical sulfate reduction (TSR) with δ34S values homogenized by high-temperature fractionation during Cretaceous magmatism. The broader range of δ34S values of event 5 cinnabar and realgar in metasedimentary rocks (~19–3‰) reflects direct replacement of sedimentary pyrite formed by thermochemical and biogenic sulfate reduction. Sulfur and Pb isotope systematics link many polymetallic deposits in Idaho, Montana, and the Great Basin, including those of the Stibnite-Yellow Pine district, to sedimentary source rocks and Mesozoic magmatism and demark a dominant metallogeny of large parts of the interior western United States.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Idaho 州 Stibnite-Yellow Pine District 的 Au-Ag-W-Sb-Hg 矿床中硫化物矿物组分的来源：与容矿岩和下伏岩石的成因关系及区域背景

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在确定爱达荷州Stibnite-Yellow Pine矿区金银钨锑汞矿床中硫化物矿物组分的来源及其与围岩和下伏岩石的成因关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用微束和整体分析技术测定硫化物和全岩的Pb、Sr、S同位素值，并与区域内其他矿床和岩石进行对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫化物组分主要来源于晚元古-早古生代变质沉积岩或受其影响的白垩纪侵入体，部分反映混合地壳来源；硫主要来自孔隙海水硫酸盐还原形成的沉积黄铁矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文通过多阶段硫化物矿物的Pb、Sr、S同位素系统分析，详细揭示了复杂多金属矿床的物质来源和成矿过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究通过揭示区域性多金属矿床与沉积源岩及中生代岩浆作用的联系，为美国西部内陆大部分地区的成矿作用提供了重要的区域性背景和理解。

works.title: In-situ geochemical and S-Pb-Sr isotopic constraints on fluid origin and evolution of the Heilongtan-Xiejiagou intrusion-related gold deposit, Tongbai Orogen, central China
works.abstract: Abstract The mechanisms governing the formation of complex mineral assemblages and fluid chemistry in structurally controlled gold deposits remain poorly understood. Textural, chemical, and isotopic characteristics of hydrothermal pyrite and apatite from gold veins provide crucial constraints on fluid compositions, which can potentially reflect episodic variations in source reservoirs and/or changes in fluid physicochemical conditions. This study presents detailed textural observations, in-situ trace element analyses, and S-Pb isotopic data for multiple texturally distinct pyrite generations from the Heilongtan-Xiejiagou structurally controlled gold deposit in the Tongbai Orogen. Integrated with hydrothermal apatite U-Pb ages and Sr isotopic compositions, these results offer new constraints on the deposit’s fluid source, evolutionary history, and genetic mechanism. Two primary types of gold mineralization are identified: (1) altered rock-type ores (predominantly disseminated and veinlet-style) dominated by invisible gold-bearing arsenian pyrite (particularly Py2c and Py3) and minor base metal sulfides, accompanied by intense wall-rock alteration (muscovitization, sulfidation, carbonatization, silicification); and (2) vein-type ores (quartz veins), characterized by visible gold, As- and Au-poor pyrite (Py4 and Py5), and abundant base metal sulfides, with limited alteration halos dominated by muscovite and quartz. Five mineralization stages (I–V) are distinguished, corresponding to seven texturally and temporally distinct pyrite generations: Py1 (Stage I), Py2a–Py2c (Stage II), Py3 (Stage III), Py4 (Stage IV), and Py5 (Stage V). LA-ICP-MS trace element analyses reveal systematic compositional differences between pyrites from the two ore types: altered rock-type pyrites (Py1–Py3) are enriched in Au (median 15 ppm in Py1, 195 ppm in Py3), As (median 2872 ppm in Py1, 26868 ppm in Py2b), Co (median 90 ppm in Py1, 177 ppm in Py3), and Ni (median 80 ppm in Py1, 75 ppm in Py3). Stage II Py2 exhibits a core-mantle-rim zoning, with an Au- and As-poor Py2a core, a porous and inclusion-rich Au-As-enriched Py2b mantle, and an oscillatory-zoned Au-As-rich Py2c rim). In contrast, vein-type pyrites (Py4–Py5) are severely depleted in Au (median 0.01 ppm in Py4, 0.03 ppm in Py5) and As (median 3.1 ppm in Py4, 1.1 ppm in Py5), with significantly lower concentrations of other trace metals (e.g., Co ≤ 32 ppm, Ni ≤ 95 ppm). Oscillatory zoning of lattice-bound As and Au in altered rock-type pyrites (Py2b and Py3) is attributed to cyclic fluid immiscibility and vapor condensation driven by pressure fluctuations. Subsequent fluid immiscibility and cooling promoted the co-precipitation of visible gold and base metal sulfides in vein-type ores. Sulfur isotope compositions (δ3⁴S) of sulfides from Stages I–III altered rock-type ores range from −1.7‰ to 9.5‰, indicating a mixed sulfur source involving magmatic and host-rock components. In Stages IV–V vein-type ores, sulfides and baryte display δ3⁴S values of −3.9‰ to 5.6‰ and 8.2‰ to 14.5‰, respectively; texturally equilibrated pyrite and baryte yield a calculated total sulfur δ3⁴S value of 4.9‰, consistent with a predominantly magmatic sulfur source. Pyrite and galena exhibit consistent in-situ Pb isotope compositions across all mineralization stages, pointing to a common lead source. Vein-hosted calcite (Stages IV–V) and scheelite (Stage V) display ⁸⁷Sr/⁸⁶Sr ratios of 0.7089–0.7102, indicative of magmatic Sr. In contrast, altered rock-type ankerite (Stages II–III) and apatite (Stage II) show more radiogenic Sr isotopic compositions (0.7115–0.7142), suggesting intense fluid-rock interaction. Hydrothermal apatite intergrown with Stage II pyrite yields a U-Pb age of 133.2 ± 5.0 Ma, consistent with the previously reported Rb-Sr isochron age (132.6 ± 2.7 Ma) for vein-type ores and the emplacement age of adjacent Qijianfeng granite (140–130 Ma). Collectively, field observations, textural analyses, geochronological data, compositional studies, and S-Pb-Sr isotopic results demonstrate that the Heilongtan-Xiejiagou gold mineralization was derived from a single Early Cretaceous magmatic-hydrothermal fluid system. Spatial and temporal variations in fluid physicochemical parameters (e.g., temperature, pressure, oxygen fugacity) and fluid-rock interactions account for the observed mineralogical diversity within this structurally controlled gold system.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 华中桐柏造山带黑龙潭-谢家沟侵入岩型金矿床流体来源与演化的原位地球化学及S-Pb-Sr同位素制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明黑龙潭-谢家沟金矿床流体来源、演化历史和成因机制，以解决构造控矿型金矿中流体化学和矿物组合形成机制不清的问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了详细的组构观察、黄铁矿原位微量元素分析、S-Pb同位素数据，并结合热液磷灰石U-Pb定年和Sr同位素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 黑龙潭-谢家沟金矿化源于单一早白垩世岩浆-热液体系，其流体来源、演化及成因机制受流体物理化学条件和流体-岩石相互作用的时空变化控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究通过多代黄铁矿和磷灰石的详细原位地球化学及S-Pb-Sr同位素分析，为构造控矿型金矿床的流体来源、演化和成因机制提供了新的、更全面的约束。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究通过揭示构造控矿型金矿床的流体来源、演化和成因机制，为理解此类复杂矿床的形成过程和勘探提供了重要科学依据。

works.title: Galena geochemistry as recorder of and pathfinder for volcanogenic massive sulfide deposits: A case study of the Keketale volcanogenic massive sulfide−type Pb-Zn deposit, Altai Mountains
works.abstract: Galena is a common economic mineral, but galena geochemistry remains poorly understood in volcanogenic massive sulfide (VMS) deposits. This contribution attempts to characterize galena geochemistry and its controlling parameters, as well as assess its utility as an exploration indicator. Two generations of galena have been recognized in the Keketale VMS-type Pb-Zn deposit, Altai Mountains, i.e., syngenetic galena in massive sulfide mineralization and epigenetic galena in epigenetic superimposed mineralization. Syngenetic galena exhibits broad trace-element variations, whereas epigenetic galena compositions consistently overlap the syngenetic range. Despite metamorphism and remobilization, galena’s structural elements remain largely unmodified. It is inferred that almost all elements (Sb, Ag, As, Cu, Tl, etc.) are incorporated into galena by direct and/or coupled substitutions, though some elements (Zn, Cu, As, etc.) constitute the components of micro-inclusions. The trace-element composition of galena is principally governed by temperature and coexisting minerals (notably sphalerite and sulfosalts). The Pb isotopes of syngenetic and epigenetic galena define a mixing line between host sequences and concealed old crustal materials, indicating that metals were derived from strata that were successively leached by evolved seawater-derived and later metamorphic fluids, leading to syngenetic and epigenetic mineralization, respectively. Notably, galena proximal to the hydrothermal vent exhibits elevated Tl, Cd, and Sn contents, likely due to higher temperatures and fluid fluxes, and this trend potentially serves as a vectoring tool for locating mineralization centers. By integrating compiled galena datasets (n = 1066) with a random forest algorithm, different types of Pb-Zn deposits derived from contrasting fluids can likely be distinguished by galena geochemistry. Accordingly, both trained classifiers and the discrimination diagram (log[Tl] vs. log[Sn]) are proposed to facilitate the classification of unassigned Pb-Zn deposits. Briefly, this study refines current understanding of galena geochemical systematics in VMS deposits, providing insights that enhance both genetic interpretation and exploration strategies for VMS deposits.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 方铅矿地球化学作为火山成因块状硫化物矿床的记录者和找矿指示剂：以 Altai Mountains 的 Keketale 火山成因块状硫化物型 Pb-Zn 矿床为例

summary_bullets.research_question: The study addresses the poor understanding of galena geochemistry in VMS deposits, aiming to characterize it and assess its utility as an exploration indicator.
summary_bullets.methodology: The study characterized galena geochemistry and Pb isotopes, integrated compiled galena datasets (n=1066) with a random forest algorithm, and proposed discrimination diagrams.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Two galena generations (syngenetic, epigenetic) show trace-element variations controlled by temperature and coexisting minerals; elevated Tl, Cd, Sn near vents indicates higher temperatures and fluid fluxes.
summary_bullets.innovation: The study proposes galena trace elements (e.g., Tl, Cd, Sn) as a vectoring tool for VMS mineralization centers and develops a random forest algorithm and discrimination diagram for deposit classification.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research refines the understanding of galena geochemistry in VMS deposits, enhancing genetic interpretation and providing new exploration strategies for these valuable resources.

works.title: Molybdenum isotope fractionation in Collision-type magmatic-hydrothermal systems: evidence from the Leimengou porphyry Mo deposit
works.abstract: This study reports Mo isotope data for molybdenite and whole-rock samples from the giant Leimengou porphyry Mo deposit in the Qinling Orogen (China), and interprets the Mo isotope fractionation as being due to magmatic-hydrothermal processes. The average δ98/95Mo values of syn-ore porphyritic monzogranite (PMG) and porphyritic K-feldspar granite (PKG), post-ore quartz monzonite porphyry (QMP), and Taihua Supergroup gneiss are + 0.29 ‰, − 0.26 ‰, 0 ‰, and + 0.14 ‰, respectively. The values for molybdenite decrease from + 0.19 ± 0.17 (‰) in Stage II quartz-molybdenite veins to − 0.53 ± 0.22 (‰) in Stage III quartz-pyrite-molybdenite veins. The εNd(t) values of the PMG and PKG are negative, consistent with a crust-dominated source for these intrusions; the PKG is an evolved peraluminous granite interpreted to have formed by fractional crystallization of the magma that generated the PMG. In addition, the more evolved PKG (high SiO2 content and Mo/Ce ratio) has a negative δ98/95Mo value, whereas the PMG from which it was derived (less fractionated with a lower SiO2 content and Mo/Ce ratio) has a positive δ98/95Mo value. The lower δ98/95Mo value of the PKG is interpreted to reflect fractional crystallization of plagioclase. Significantly samples of PMG and PKG with high Mo contents and Mo/Ce ratios have low δ98/95Mo values, whereas those with low Mo contents and Mo/Ce ratios have high δ98/95Mo values. The samples with low Mo contents represent magma that lost Mo to magmatic fluid, and therefore their high δ98/95Mo values are interpreted to indicate that the light Mo isotope preferred the fluid. This unusual Mo isotopic behavior is likely universal for collision-type porphyry Mo deposits but is different from that of Climax-type porphyry Mo deposits and may reflect the high content of CO2 in collision-type fluids and its low content in Climax-type fluids.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 碰撞型岩浆-热液体系中的Mo同位素分馏：来自Leimengou斑岩Mo矿床的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解释碰撞型斑岩钼矿床中钼同位素分馏的机制及其与岩浆-热液过程的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用对辉钼矿和全岩样品进行钼同位素（δ98/95Mo）分析的方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现不同岩石和矿化阶段的钼同位素值存在显著差异，且轻钼同位素倾向于进入流体。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了碰撞型斑岩钼矿床独特的钼同位素分馏行为，并首次将其与流体中CO2含量联系起来。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解碰撞型斑岩钼矿床的成矿机制和钼同位素地球化学提供了新的视角。

works.title: Multiple isotope (He-Ar-S-Pb) and geochronological constraints on the genesis of the Shanmen Ag deposit in the Jilin Province, NE China
works.abstract: The large-scale Shanmen silver deposit (Shanmen Ag deposit) is situated in the Siping area of Jilin Province, northeastern China (NE China). To better understand the formation of the Shanmen deposit, we present S–Pb–He–Ar isotope systematics, zircon U–Pb dating, molybdenite Re–Os geochronology, sulfide Rb–Sr isochron analysis, and in situ sericite Rb–Sr dating hydrothermally altered minerals. Our in-situ sulfur isotope analyses reveal a restricted δ 34 S variation range from −1.9 ‰ to +0.8 ‰ (average = -0.4 ‰) for hydrothermal sulfides, suggests a magmatic sulfur source. In situ lead isotope analyses of galena exhibit remarkably homogeneous compositions with limited variation ranges: 206 Pb/ 204 Pb of 18.148–18.154, 207 Pb/ 204 Pb of 15.542–15.547 and 208 Pb/ 204 Pb of 38.067–38.083. Combined with reported isotopic data from various rock units and other deposit in the area, strongly supports a dominant metal contribution from crystallizing Mesozoic granitic magmas. Fluid inclusion noble gas signatures reveal mixed mantle-crustal sources: 3 He/ 4 He ratios range from 2.07 to 2.36 Ra, 40 Ar/ 36 Ar ratios (329.6–537.6) significantly exceed atmospheric values (295.5). Zircon U–Pb dating of the lamprophyre, quartz diorite, monzogranite from the deposit yield weighted mean ages of 125.6 ± 2 Ma, 164.0 ± 1.7 Ma, and 164.9 ± 1.6 Ma, respectively. Metallochronological studies delineate a two-stage mineralization sequence: Molybdenite Re–Os geochronometry constrains an incipient weakly Mo mineralization event to the Middle Jurassic (164.8 ± 1.8 Ma), temporally and genetically linked to quartz diorite-monzogranite magmatism triggered by Paleo-Pacific Plate subduction; Subsequent Ag-dominated hydrothermal mineralization during the Early Cretaceous is precisely dated by integrated sulfide Rb–Sr isochron (123.7 ± 2.2 Ma) and in situ sericite Rb–Sr geochronology (122.3 ± 8.0 Ma), corresponding to the rollback of the Paleo-Pacific Plate.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 对NE China Jilin Province Shanmen Ag矿床成因的多同位素（He-Ar-S-Pb）和年代学制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在深入理解吉林省山门银矿床的形成机制和演化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用了S-Pb-He-Ar同位素体系、锆石U-Pb定年、辉钼矿Re-Os定年、硫化物Rb-Sr等时线及绢云母Rb-Sr原位定年等多种地球化学和年代学方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现矿床存在两阶段成矿作用：中侏罗世钼矿化与石英闪长岩-二长花岗岩岩浆作用相关，早白垩世银矿化与古太平洋板块回撤相关，且流体来源为幔壳混合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次综合运用多同位素（He-Ar-S-Pb）和多种高精度年代学（包括原位Rb-Sr）方法，揭示了山门银矿床两阶段成矿的精细时空演化及其地球动力学背景。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究通过多学科综合方法，为理解中国东北地区大型银矿床的成因、成矿过程及其与区域构造演化的关系提供了新的见解和精确年代学约束。

works.title: Cratonic impact on clastic-dominated base metal deposits in continental rifts
works.abstract: Sediment-hosted zinc-lead deposits of the clastic-dominated (CD) type provide much needed metals for the energy transition and global urbanization. There is a spatial correlation between the present-day location of CD-type deposits and craton edges, although it is unclear whether this is a causal relationship. In this paper, we use numerical models of continental rifting to investigate whether proximity to cratonic lithosphere enhances the ore-forming potential during rift basin evolution. Our results show that narrow asymmetric and wide rifts respond differently to the presence of close cratonic edges. The potential for metallogenesis in narrow asymmetric rifts decreases with increasing proximity to the craton edge. In contrast, metal source rock area and ore-forming mechanisms increase when wide rifts form close to a craton edge. We attribute these responses to the increased lithospheric strength on the craton-ward side of the rift that determines not only the initial fault geometry, but also the subsequent fault development and migration direction. This modifies the spatial and temporal overlap of the components of the mineral system required for deposit formation, i.e., source rock, fluid-focussing faults, and deposit host rock. The greatest metallogenic potential is found in the narrow margin of narrow asymmetric rifts formed far from a craton edge; here, the largest area of source rock is concentrated in the main border basin. The link between craton edges and metallogenic potential, therefore, is hypothesized to be due to the preferred initialization of rifts next to, and the preferential preservation of deposits on, the edges of stable cratons.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 克拉通对大陆裂谷中碎屑岩型贱金属矿床的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: Does proximity to cratonic lithosphere enhance ore-forming potential for clastic-dominated base metal deposits during continental rifting?
summary_bullets.methodology: The study employed numerical models of continental rifting to simulate rift basin evolution and metallogenic potential.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Metallogenic potential varies with rift type and craton proximity; narrow asymmetric rifts far from cratons show high potential, while wide rifts near cratons also increase potential, driven by lithospheric strength.
summary_bullets.innovation: It uses numerical modeling to establish a causal link between craton proximity and metallogenic potential, explaining differential responses of rift types based on lithospheric strength.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research provides a mechanistic understanding of CD-type deposit formation, crucial for guiding exploration efforts to secure metals needed for energy transition and urbanization.

works.title: Growth and physical transport of molybdenite spherules in a Na-Al-F-rich melt, Cave Peak porphyry Mo deposit, Texas, USA
works.abstract: The Eocene Cave Peak intrusive complex in Trans-Pecos Texas, USA, hosts a porphyry Mo system enriched in Mo, F, Nb, W, Sn, and rare earth elements. Some Cave Peak molybdenite occurs as unusual 100- to 500-µm spherules within aluminofluoride veins. Textural features and buoyancy considerations indicate that molybdenite spherules were formed at depth and were transported by an immiscible alkali fluoride melt. We suggest that these previously unrecognized spherules provide evidence for physical transport of mineral grains as a mechanism to enrich the metal content of F-rich porphyry systems emplaced into shallow crustal settings.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 辉钼矿球粒在富钠-铝-氟熔体中的生长与物理输运：以美国德克萨斯州Cave Peak斑岩钼矿床为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨了Cave Peak斑岩钼矿床中异常辉钼矿球粒的形成、输运机制及其对金属富集过程的意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究方法主要包括对辉钼矿球粒的结构特征分析和浮力计算。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现辉钼矿球粒在深部形成，并通过不混溶的碱性氟化物熔体进行物理输运。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出矿物颗粒的物理输运是富氟斑岩系统金属富集的一种新机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解富氟斑岩矿床中金属富集机制提供了新的视角和证据。

works.title: Gold Mineralizing Potential of the Late Triassic Calcareous, Carbonaceous and Sulfide‐Rich Sedimentary Rocks of the Isatomae Formation in the South Kitakami Belt, Japan
works.abstract: ABSTRACT The South Kitakami Belt of Japan yields a number of mesothermal auriferous vein deposits, hosted in Paleozoic‐Mesozoic sedimentary rocks in the vicinity of Cretaceous intrusive rocks. We investigated lithology, mineralogy, and chemistry of the host sedimentary rocks (Late Triassic Isatomae Formation) in the Ishinomaki district to evaluate gold mineralizing potential in the belt. The formation consists of shallow‐marine continental shelf sedimentary rocks that underwent prehnite‐pumpellyite facies of contact metamorphism. The analyzed three representative slate samples of the formation contain diagenetic‐metamorphic minerals such as calcite, K‐feldspar, albite, pumpellyite, titanite, and apatite, in addition to micro‐nodules and seams consisting of carbonaceous matter (CM) and/or sulfides. The carbonaceous matter in the nodules and seams was partly or mostly substituted by sulfides; pyrite with minor cobaltite and pyrrhotite, which occur as framboids, compact spheres, and compact anhedral grains. Cobaltite contains rarely electrum grains. These samples are characterized by high Ca contents, and are depleted in Mg, Fe, Na, and K, compared to the underlying Paleozoic and Mesozoic shale and overlying Jurassic sedimentary rocks of the belt. A sulfide nodule‐bearing sample is enriched in metals such as As, Cr, Co, Ni, Cu, and Sb. Depletion of sulfur mole ratio of the pyrites, in particular, framboidal/spherical pyrite, compared to the stoichiometric ratio, suggests that the pyrites formed from monosulfides. Most of the trace elements such as As, Bi, Pb, Tl, Sb, and Mo are more enriched in pyrite than pyrrhotite. These analytical results of the Isatomae Formation indicate that this slate was accumulated in an anoxic seawater environment and enriched in metallic elements, which may have been adsorbed to Fe‐oxyhydroxide particles originally. The successive diagenetic reaction with pore water sulfurized the Fe‐oxyhydroxides to monosulfides, which finally transformed into pyrite. The narrow and enriched range (+0.3‰ to +0.5‰) δ 34 S values of sulfides in the Isatomae slate suggest that this diagenetic reaction occurred in a closed system, where seawater sulfate hardly diffused into the sediments. Subsequent prehnite‐pumpellyite metamorphism transformed pyrite to pyrrhotite, during which metamorphism, the trace elements including Au may have exsolved into metamorphic fluids. These results show a gold mineralizing potential for the Isatomae Formation.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 日本南北上带Isatomae组晚三叠世钙质、碳质和富硫沉积岩的金成矿潜力

summary_bullets.research_question: 评估日本南北上带晚三叠世Isatomae组沉积岩的金成矿潜力。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过对Isatomae组板岩的岩性、矿物学、地球化学及硫同位素分析进行研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Isatomae组板岩形成于缺氧环境，富含金属元素，经历封闭体系成岩作用和变质作用，可能导致金等微量元素析出。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次详细揭示了Isatomae组板岩的地球化学特征、成岩-变质过程及其与金成矿潜力的联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解日本南北上带及类似地质背景中沉积岩型金矿的成因机制和勘探提供重要线索。

works.title: Magmatic volatile influx promotes Cu mineralization in volcanogenic massive sulfide deposit recorded by Fe3+-rich chlorite and Hg isotopes
works.abstract: The leaching of underlying host rocks by circulating heated seawater can transport metals and sulfur, leading to the formation of volcanogenic massive sulfide (VMS) deposits. The introduction of magmatic volatiles in VMS systems may serve as an additional source of these elements. However, the processes through which magmatic volatiles and ore metals have been introduced into hydrothermal systems responsible for the formation of ancient VMS deposits, especially in ancient deposits, remain poorly understood. In this study, we thoroughly conducted Hg isotopic analyses of minerals (pyrite and chalcopyrite) and host rocks, combined to in-situ trace element and Fe redox states of chlorite (i.e. Fe 3+ /∑Fe determined by synchrotron X-ray absorption near-edge structure) from the Early to Middle Devonian, large-tonnage Ashele VMS deposit in the Central Asian Orogenic Belt, in order to understand the sources of ore-forming metals and metallogenic processes. Our results show that ore-associated sulfides and igneous rocks display a wide variation of 0.35‰ in Δ 199 Hg (−0.17‰ to 0.18‰), which overlaps with those of seawater (∼0.2‰), primitive mantle (∼0‰) and continental sediments (∼-0.25‰), supporting a ternary mixing of Hg from three distinct sources. Most of the ore-associated sulfides show near-zero Δ 199 Hg values of −0.1 to 0.1‰, suggesting that ore metals were primarily derived from magmatic fluids, rather than from leaching of underlying volcanic host rocks by heated seawater. The THg (total Hg) content in sulfides and chlorite decreases with increasing distance from the mineralization center, reflecting the variable influence of magmatic volatiles released from the underlying magmatic system, while fluid boiling likely leads to significant variations in δ 202 Hg (exceeding 2‰). The elevated Fe 3+ /∑Fe values, distinct Hg and Sn enrichments, and high formation temperatures (above 400 °C) recorded by Hg-rich chlorite suggest that acidic, hot, oxidized, metal-rich volatiles facilitate the transport of Cu and S from the magmatic to the hydrothermal environment, promoting the formation of large VMS deposits. We propose that the Early Devonian extensional setting enabled oxidized magmatism and volatiles, facilitating efficient Cu and S transport, during which the metal-rich magmatic-hydrothermal fluids (Δ 199 Hg ≈ 0) mixed with seawater (Δ 199 Hg > 0) and continental sediments (Δ 199 Hg 199 Hg range. Consequently, our results indicate Hg isotopes and the chemical composition and Fe redox states of chlorite can be applied to reveal metal source and mineralization processes in ancient VMS deposits and may also serve as a valuable exploration guide for VMS systems.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 岩浆挥发分注入促进火山成因块状硫化物矿床中的铜矿化，由富Fe3+绿泥石和汞同位素记录

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在深入理解古老VMS矿床中岩浆挥发物和成矿金属如何进入热液系统以及其成矿过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了汞同位素分析、矿物原位微量元素和绿泥石Fe氧化态（同步辐射XANES）等技术。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 汞同位素显示成矿金属主要来源于岩浆流体；富Fe3+绿泥石指示酸性、热、氧化岩浆挥发物促进了Cu和S的输运。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究首次结合汞同位素和富Fe3+绿泥石揭示古老VMS矿床的金属来源和成矿过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为VMS矿床的金属来源和成矿机制提供了新见解，并具有重要的勘探指导意义。

works.title: Reply to the Discussion on “Granite-pegmatite-related gold skarns and associated Li-Cs-Ta pegmatites in the Archean Yilgarn Craton, Western Australia” by Witt (2025)
works.abstract: I welcome the opportunity to clarify the issues raised by Witt ( 2025 ) about the relationship of gold skarn deposits and LCT pegmatites to the post-orogenic I-type granite suite in the east-central Yilgarn Craton. As also discussed in Witt et al. ( 2001 ), these issues are: (1) the interpretation of biotite alteration in the footwall amphibolite of mineralized banded iron-formation at Nevoria as seafloor and pre-metamorphic; (2) uncertainty about the timing of amphibolite-facies metamorphism related to the Ghooli Dome batholith; (3) the interpretation of the high-T (650-400°C) gold deposits in the Southern Cross greenstone belt as syn-metamorphic rather than as gold skarns; and (4) uncertainties about the spatial, temporal and genetic relationship of the gold deposits to I-type granites and LCT pegmatites.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 对Witt (2025)关于“西澳大利亚太古宙伊尔加恩克拉通花岗岩-伟晶岩型金矽卡岩及伴生Li-Cs-Ta伟晶岩”的讨论的回复

summary_bullets.research_question: This paper clarifies and defends the author's interpretations regarding the relationship between gold skarns, LCT pegmatites, and I-type granites in the Yilgarn Craton against Witt's criticisms.
summary_bullets.methodology: The methodology involves clarifying and re-interpreting existing geological and petrological data and arguments to address specific criticisms raised by Witt.
summary_bullets.key_findings: The paper clarifies interpretations regarding biotite alteration, timing of metamorphism, the nature of high-T gold deposits, and the genetic links between gold, granites, and pegmatites.
summary_bullets.innovation: The innovation lies in providing a detailed clarification and defense of complex geological interpretations, contributing to a more refined understanding of ore genesis in the Yilgarn Craton.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research is valuable for geologists studying Archean cratons, ore deposit genesis, and the interplay between magmatism, metamorphism, and mineralization in the Yilgarn Craton.

works.title: Province-scale tin and zinc stable isotope fractionation trends in the Bolivian tin belt
works.abstract: The Sn and Zn stable isotope compositions of cassiterite and sphalerite have been widely used to understand the formation of magmatic-hydrothermal Sn and Zn mineral deposits. Here, we report Sn isotopic compositions of cassiterite and Zn isotopic compositions of paragenetically later, lower-temperature sphalerite from ten Sn and Zn-bearing polymetallic deposits in the Bolivian tin belt. These deposits represent distinct mineralization styles and metal transport pathways. The δ 124 Sn values for cassiterite vary from −0.56 to 1.64‰ (n = 33) and δ 66 Zn values for sphalerite vary from −0.22 to 0.92‰ (n = 20), encompassing much of the global variance observed for each isotopic system. The Llallagua and Huanuni deposits show significantly heavier Sn isotope compositions (average = 1.24 ± 0.24‰ δ 124 Sn; n = 10) compared to all other deposits (average = 0.56 ± 0.55‰; n = 23) and contain several distinguishing geological attributes including: genetic association with porphyry phase stocks and/or dikes, vapor-rich and moderately to highly saline fluid inclusions, vertically restricted and/or discontinuous high-grade veins, and extensive tourmaline-rich magmatic-hydrothermal breccias. Together, these features are consistent with Rayleigh fractionation and suggest that orthomagmatic fluid separation, fluid boiling, and oxidation contributed to cassiterite precipitation and caused Sn isotope fractionation. The residual fluids after cassiterite precipitation were depleted in heavy Sn isotopes and propagated along district-scale fluid pathways. The Sn isotopic ranges for cassiterite from the Sayaquira (−0.13–1.45‰), Colquiri (0.18–1.44‰), Colcha (0.07–1.47‰), and Monserrat (−0.56–0.93‰) deposits may be a consequence of cassiterite precipitation over longer mineralization length scales with increased meteoric water influx, where distal cassiterite precipitated from hydrothermal ore fluid that was depleted in heavy 124 Sn. The wide and heavy range of Zn isotopic compositions of sphalerite suggests that early orthomagmatic fluid separation and boiling may have caused significant isotopic fractionation during early fluid transport prior to sphalerite precipitation. Subsequent processes including dilution by Sn- and Zn-poor meteoric water and the concomitant change in fluid pH and increase in oxygen fugacity plausibly contributed to the precipitation of isotopically lighter sphalerite at the Monserrat, El Salvador, and Huari Huari deposits
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 玻利维亚锡带中区域尺度的锡和锌稳定同位素分馏趋势

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在通过Sn和Zn稳定同位素研究玻利维亚锡带中Sn和Zn矿床的形成过程及流体运移趋势。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过对玻利维亚锡带十个矿床的锡石和闪锌矿进行Sn和Zn稳定同位素组成分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 研究发现Sn和Zn同位素分馏受岩浆流体分离、沸腾、氧化及大气水混入等因素影响，导致不同矿床具有独特的同位素特征。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文首次在玻利维亚锡带省尺度上，详细揭示了Sn和Zn稳定同位素分馏趋势与矿床形成机制及流体演化之间的复杂关系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为理解岩浆-热液Sn和Zn矿床的形成机制提供了深入的同位素地球化学证据，对全球类似矿床的勘探和研究具有重要指导意义。

works.title: Copper and molybdenum isotope signatures along a vertical section through the Valeriano epithermal-porphyry Cu-Au system, El Indio-Maricunga belt, northern Chile
works.abstract: Abstract The Valeriano composite epithermal-porphyry Cu‒Au system in the El Indio-Maricunga metallogenic belt, Vicuña segment, consists of a shallow silicic lithocap with low-grade Au‒Ag ± Cu mineralization underlain by a large porphyry-Cu (± Mo, ± Au) deposit. A deep drillhole (VALD-D13-14) allows the systematic evaluation of bulk-rock Cu‒Mo isotope compositions over a vertical extent of ~ 1,900 m through the hydrothermal porphyry-epithermal system. Copper isotope values in the lower 1,000 m of the mineralized potassic and phyllic altered porphyry zone increase slightly upwards in the range of +0.2 to +0.4‰, and scatter in the upper phyllic and advanced argillic zone (δ 65 Cu: ‒3.7‰ to +2.7‰). The near-surface low-Cu leached zone has very negative δ 65 Cu values down to ‒6.5‰ and there are also some distinctly negative excursions in the deep potassic zone with subordinate advanced argillic alteration. Molybdenum isotope values are slightly negative in the potassic porphyry zone (δ 98 Mo: ‒0.3 to ‒0.2‰), but increase over the phyllic zone to positive values of 0.2‒0.3‰, and strongly scatter at the transition to the high-sulfidation epithermal system. The Cu and Mo isotope patterns can be mainly attributed to Rayleigh fractionation between vapor and brine in the magmatic-hydrothermal porphyry system and to redox-controlled isotope shifts during supergene alteration in the epithermal system. Deviations from the general trend in some deep drillcore intercepts relate to short intervals of advanced argillic alteration and corresponding redox fluctuations with Cu enrichment.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 智利北部El Indio-Maricunga带Valeriano浅成热液-斑岩型铜金系统垂直剖面中的铜和钼同位素特征

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在系统评估Valeriano斑岩-浅成热液Cu-Au系统沿垂直剖面的铜和钼同位素组成及其控制因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过一个深钻孔（VALD-D13-14）对Valeriano斑岩-浅成热液系统约1900米垂直范围内的全岩铜和钼同位素组成进行了系统评估。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铜和钼同位素值在垂直剖面呈现系统性变化，主要受岩浆热液斑岩系统中的瑞利分馏和浅成热液系统中表生蚀变期间的氧化还原控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过深钻孔对斑岩-浅成热液系统约1900米垂直剖面的全岩铜和钼同位素组成进行了系统且详细的评估。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究通过揭示铜和钼同位素在斑岩-浅成热液系统中的垂直分布模式及其控制因素，为理解矿床成因和指导勘探提供了重要地球化学指纹。

works.title: Coupled anatexis and extreme differentiation are the keys for producing giant lithium-rich pegmatites
works.abstract: Despite the economic importance of lithium, there is considerable disagreement over the processes that concentrate it and other rare metals in pegmatite-type lithium deposits. Two main processes have been invoked, namely extreme differentiation of a peraluminous granitic magma and direct anatexis of a sedimentary protolith. We use geochemical modeling to quantify lithium enrichment via these two processes from a study of the Jiajika lithium pegmatite field, one of the largest of its type in the world. Based on a lithium–silicon–boron–barium (Li-Si-B-Ba) isotope study involving systematic sampling along 4,211-m of core from two deep boreholes and from the regional zonation of pegmatites at outcrops, we propose a three-stage model for the formation of the pegmatite field: i) generation of a rare metal-rich melt by deep anatexis, involving ~5% partial melting of metapelitic rocks in the presence of 10 to 30% metamorphic fluid; ii) gradual enrichment of rare metals along a path of continuous magma differentiation until 75% of the initial melt had crystallized; and iii) a final stage of lithium mineralization during the escape of the water-rich magma due to the overpressures created in response to massive fluid exsolution and the extensional stress in the granite dome structure. The study provides important insights into how lithium-rich pegmatites can be targeted during exploration for pegmatite-hosted resources of lithium.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 耦合深熔作用与极端分异作用是形成巨型富锂伟晶岩的关键

summary_bullets.research_question: 锂和稀有金属在伟晶岩型锂矿床中富集过程存在争议，主要涉及岩浆极端分异和沉积原岩直接深熔两种机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用地球化学模型量化锂富集过程，并结合锂-硅-硼-钡同位素研究，对四川甲基卡伟晶岩田进行系统取样分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 提出了伟晶岩矿床形成的三阶段模型：深熔产生富稀有金属熔体，岩浆持续分异富集稀有金属，以及富水岩浆逃逸导致锂矿化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出深熔作用和极端分异作用耦合是形成巨型富锂伟晶岩的关键，并构建了详细的三阶段形成模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为锂资源勘探提供了重要见解，有助于更有效地定位富锂伟晶岩矿床。

works.title: Formation of giant carbonatite rare earth deposits controlled by deep-seated magma chambers
works.abstract: Carbonatite-associated rare earth element (REE) deposits are currently the primary source of REE resources. Their formation requires REE enrichment during prolonged magma evolution, achieved by suppressing REE-rich mineral crystallization and promoting REE-enriched brine melt formation. Our experiments on the fractional crystallization of carbonatitic magmas indicate that pressure (emplacement depth) is the primary factor controlling REE enrichment. High-pressure ( >0.3 GPa) promotes early olivine crystallization, depleting silica and suppressing REE-rich apatite formation. Deep emplacement also delays aqueous fluid exsolution, thereby stabilizing brine melts that enhance phosphate dissolution and prevent REE dispersion into apatite. In contrast, low-pressure conditions ( <0.3 GPa) lead to exsolution of REE-poor hydrothermal fluids, dispersing REE into magmatic apatite and preventing the deposition of economically significant REE-carbonates in subsequent hydrothermal stages. Our pressure-dependent model highlights deep emplacement as crucial for passive REE enrichment in residual brine melts, driving large-scale mineralization through precipitation of burbankite and/or bastnäsite. Pressure or emplacement depth exerts crucial control on REE enrichment in carbonatites. Deep emplacement ( > 0.3 GPa) suppresses REE dispersion into apatite, enabling enrichment in residual brine melts and precipitation of economic REE-carbonates.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 巨型碳酸岩稀土矿床的形成受深部岩浆房控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨了深部岩浆房如何控制碳酸岩型稀土矿床中稀土元素的富集机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 作者通过对碳酸岩岩浆分级结晶的实验研究来模拟稀土富集过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高压（>0.3 GPa）深部就位是控制稀土富集的关键，它通过抑制磷灰石形成并稳定富稀土卤水熔体来实现。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文首次提出了一个压力依赖模型，揭示了深部就位对残余卤水熔体中稀土被动富集的关键控制作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为碳酸岩型稀土矿床的勘探和资源评估提供了新的理论依据和关键见解。

works.title: Metal transport by magmatic volatile phases in crustal systems
works.abstract: Magmatic volatile phases (MVPs) are multicomponent fluids that are a transport medium for metals being transferred from deep magmatic sources to sites of ore formation. However, the melt-to-fluid exchange of metals remains elusive because existing empirical simulations primarily address metal transport through the fate of one chemical element. We use a comprehensive thermochemical model to simulate the fractional crystallization of a silicate melt that degasses a multicomponent MVP. We show that the major and trace element abundances in MVPs formed from non-enriched magmatic systems are indistinguishable from MVPs found as fluid inclusions in mineralized and non-mineralized systems. We therefore conclude that ore formation is the consequence of repetitive intrusion-fractionation-degassing cycles common to crustal systems without pre-enriched sources, as opposed to scenarios wherein a particular or complex chemical system is required. Instead, the driving force of ore formation is a long-lived system fueled by an H2O- and Cl-bearing melt. Variations in metal signatures of fluids therefore reflect the pressure-temperature path of melt ascent and the changes in major element composition of the melt.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地壳系统中岩浆挥发相的金属输运

summary_bullets.research_question: This study addresses the elusive melt-to-fluid exchange of metals, particularly how it occurs in multicomponent systems beyond single-element simulations.
summary_bullets.methodology: The authors employed a comprehensive thermochemical model to simulate fractional crystallization of silicate melt and multicomponent MVP degassing.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Ore formation results from repetitive intrusion-fractionation-degassing cycles in common crustal systems, driven by a long-lived H2O- and Cl-bearing melt.
summary_bullets.innovation: The innovation lies in using a comprehensive thermochemical model to simulate multicomponent metal transport, moving beyond single-element empirical simulations.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research redefines ore formation, suggesting it arises from common crustal processes rather than requiring pre-enriched sources, impacting exploration strategies.

works.title: Trace Elements and Sulfur Isotopes of Sulfides at the Leon Sediment‐Hosted Gold Deposit, Ratatotok District, North Sulawesi, Indonesia: Constraints on the Genesis of Ore Formation
works.abstract: ABSTRACT The Leon gold deposit in the Ratatotok district, North Sulawesi, Indonesia, is hosted by the Middle to Late Miocene Ratatotok Limestone Formation overlying Early to Middle Miocene volcanic rocks. This study aims to elucidate the mode of occurrence of ores, and the conditions and genesis of ore formation of the deposit, based on morphological characteristics, trace elements, and sulfur isotope compositions of sulfide minerals. Four stages of sulfide mineralization associated with sedimentary and hydrothermal processes were identified. Stage 1 is characterized by disseminated framboidal pyrite (pyrite 1; a number after mineral name hereafter indicates its mineralization stage) of sedimentary origin. Stages 2–4 record hydrothermal overprinting, with successive formation of euhedral to subhedral pyrite 2 and marcasite 2, euhedral to anhedral pyrite 3 and arsenopyrite 3, and anhedral pyrite 4. Pyrite 1, pyrite 2, and marcasite 2 have lower Au and As contents, + ) in the sulfides. Gold and As were incorporated into pyrite as coupled partitioning. Temperature and sulfur fugacity (in atm) during the mineralization of arsenopyrite 3 were ~303°C–399°C and log f S 2 = −10.6 to −6.6. δ 34 S CDT values of hydrothermal pyrite in stages 2–4 vary from −3.1‰ to +1.2‰, indicating a predominant magmatic source for S. The Leon deposit is a sediment‐hosted gold deposit with probably a distal intrusion‐centered setting.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 印度尼西亚北苏拉威西省拉塔托克区Leon沉积型金矿床硫化物中的微量元素和硫同位素：对成矿作用成因的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 本研究旨在阐明Leon金矿床的矿石产状、形成条件和成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用硫化物矿物的形态特征、微量元素和硫同位素组成进行研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现四期硫化物矿化，其中热液硫化物具有较高金砷含量，硫同位素表明硫主要来源于岩浆。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过多方法综合分析，揭示了Leon金矿床的详细矿化阶段、形成条件和成因。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究有助于理解沉积岩容纳型金矿床的成因机制，特别是远端侵入体相关类型。

works.title: Reworking of continental crust, deep geological processes and large-scale W-Sn-Au-Cu mineralization in the Nanling-Wuyi metallogenic belts, South China
works.abstract: The Nanling-Wuyi regions in South China collectively form a globally significant metallogenic province hosting a group of world-class W-Sn-Au-Cu ore deposits. The mineralization in Nanling and Wuyi regions exhibits typical zonation characteristics: the former is distinguished by extensive multi-episodes of granite emplacement and associated W-Sn mineralization; the latter is characterized by intense Yanshanian volcanic activities along continental margins and associated Au-Cu mineralization. The Nanling region has experienced multiple intensive tecto-magmatic movements, including the Caledonian, Indosinian, and Yanshanian periods. Its predominant W-Sn mineralization occurred during the Yanshanian period, governed by the combined effects of crustal reworking and a high degree of magmatic differentiation. In contrast, the Wuyi metallogenic belt experienced Mesozoic volcanic activities predominantly during the Middle-Late Jurassic, Early Cretaceous, and early Late Cretaceous periods. The Yanshanian Au-Cu mineralization in this belt results from the remobilization of ancient Au-Cu enriched crustal sources triggered by paleo-Pacific plate subduction. The distinct deep geological processes in the Nanling and Wuyi regions have fundamentally shaped their characteristic ore-related igneous rocks and mineralization types.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 华南南岭-武夷成矿带大陆地壳再造、深部地质过程与大规模钨-锡-金-铜成矿作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在分析华南南岭-武夷成矿带大陆地壳重塑、深部地质过程与大规模W-Sn-Au-Cu成矿作用之间的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 本文通过对南岭-武夷成矿带地质特征和成矿作用的综合分析，阐明了其深部地质过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 南岭W-Sn成矿与地壳重塑和岩浆分异有关，武夷Au-Cu成矿则与古太平洋板块俯冲引发的火山活动及地壳源再活化相关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文创新性地揭示了南岭和武夷地区独特深部地质过程如何塑造其特征性成矿作用和相关岩浆岩。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解华南南岭-武夷成矿带世界级W-Sn-Au-Cu矿床的形成机制提供了关键的地质学见解。

works.title: A theory of multi-spheric interaction-driven hydrocarbon formation and enrichment

works.translated_title: 一种多圈层相互作用驱动的油气形成与富集理论

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明多球体相互作用如何驱动烃类的形成与富集。
summary_bullets.methodology: 本研究通过构建一套新的理论框架来解释多球体相互作用机制。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 核心发现是多球体相互作用提供了一种新的烃类生成与富集驱动机制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新点在于提出了一种全新的、基于多球体相互作用的烃类形成与富集理论。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解烃类生成机制提供了新视角，对油气勘探具有潜在指导价值。

works.title: Laser ablation ICP-MS titanite U–Th–Pb dating of hydrothermal ore deposits: A case study of the Tonglushan Cu–Fe–Au skarn deposit, SE Hubei Province, China

works.translated_title: 热液矿床的LA-ICP-MS榍石U–Th–Pb定年：以中国湖北省东南部铜绿山铜铁金矽卡岩矿床为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在利用钛铁矿U-Th-Pb定年法精确测定热液矿床的形成时代。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了激光剥蚀电感耦合等离子体质谱（LA-ICP-MS）钛铁矿U-Th-Pb定年技术。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 研究成功应用LA-ICP-MS钛铁矿U-Th-Pb定年法，为铜绿山矿床提供了精确的成矿时代数据。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新点在于将LA-ICP-MS钛铁矿U-Th-Pb定年法应用于热液矿床，提供了一种新的精确测年途径。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为热液矿床的精确测年提供了可靠工具，对矿床成因研究和勘探具有重要价值。

works.title: Large-scale porphyry-type mineralization in the Central Asian metallogenic domain: A review
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 中亚成矿域大规模斑岩型矿化：一项综述

summary_bullets.research_question: This paper reviews the characteristics and formation of large-scale porphyry-type mineralization within the Central Asian metallogenic domain.
summary_bullets.methodology: The study employs a comprehensive literature review and synthesis of existing geological, geochemical, and geochronological data.
summary_bullets.key_findings: It synthesizes current understanding of the geological settings, ore-forming processes, and spatial-temporal distribution of porphyry deposits in Central Asia.
summary_bullets.innovation: The paper provides an updated, comprehensive synthesis of large-scale porphyry mineralization in a critical metallogenic domain, identifying key controls and future research needs.

works.title: Use and Legacy of Mercury in the Andes
works.abstract: Both cinnabar (HgS) and metallic mercury (Hg(0)) were important resources throughout Andean prehistory. Cinnabar was used for millennia to make vermillion, a red pigment that was highly valued in pre-Hispanic Peru; metallic Hg(0) has been used since the mid-16th century to conduct mercury amalgamation, an efficient process of extracting precious metals from ores. However, little is known about which cinnabar deposits were exploited by pre-Hispanic cultures, and the environmental consequences of Hg mining and amalgamation remain enigmatic. Here we use Hg isotopes to source archeological cinnabar and to fingerprint Hg pollution preserved in lake sediment cores from Peru and the Galápagos Islands. Both pre-Inca (pre-1400 AD) and Colonial (1532-1821 AD) archeological artifacts contain cinnabar that matches isotopically with cinnabar ores from Huancavelica, Peru, the largest cinnabar-bearing district in Central and South America. In contrast, the Inca (1400-1532 AD) artifacts sampled are characterized by a unique Hg isotopic composition. In addition, preindustrial (i.e., pre-1900 AD) Hg pollution preserved in lake sediments matches closely the isotopic composition of cinnabar from the Peruvian Andes. Industrial-era Hg pollution, in contrast, is distinct isotopically from preindustrial emissions, suggesting that pre- and postindustrial Hg emissions may be distinguished isotopically in lake sediment cores.

works.title: The orientation of intra-arc crustal fault systems influences the copper budget of magmatic-hydrothermal fluids
works.abstract: Abstract Some of the largest magmatic-hydrothermal copper ore deposits and deposit clusters are associated with arc-oblique fault systems. Whether this structural context impacts the geochemistry of hydrothermal fluids, including their copper contents, remains unknown. Here, we investigate the copper concentration and helium isotope signature of geothermal fluids as modern analogs of hydrothermal ore deposits in the Andes of central-southern Chile. We show that fault systems broadly parallel to the regional stress field facilitate the early release of fluids from deep primitive magmas. By contrast, fault systems oblique to the regional stress field prevent the early escape of fluids and promote magmatic enrichment in copper, volatiles, and ligands, enhancing the potential to form copper deposits. We conclude that the orientation of fault systems actively influences the copper budget of ascending hydrothermal fluids, explaining the contrasting distribution of metals along distinct structures often observed in porphyry-epithermal systems and other types of magmatic-hydrothermal deposits.

works.title: Origin of the Yinshan epithermal-porphyry Cu–Au–Pb–Zn–Ag deposit, southeastern China: insights from geochemistry, Sr–Nd and zircon U–Pb–Hf–O isotopes
works.abstract: The Yinshan deposit is a large epithermal-porphyry polymetallic deposit, and the timing and petrogenesis of ore-hosting porphyries have been hotly debated. We present new results from geochemical, whole-rock Sr–Nd and zircon U–Pb–Hf–O isotopic investigations. Zircon U–Pb data demonstrate that the quartz porphyry, dacitic porphyry, and quartz dioritic porphyry formed at ˜172.2 ± 0.4 Ma, ˜171.7 ± 0.5 Ma, and ˜170.9 ± 0.3 Ma, respectively. Inherited zircon cores show significant age spreads from ˜730 to ˜1390 Ma. Geochemically, they are high-K calc-alkaline or shoshonitic rocks with arc-like trace element patterns. They have similar whole-rock Nd and zircon Hf isotopic compositions, yet an increasing trend in ϵNd(t) and ϵHf(t) values typifies the suite. Older (inherited) zircons of the three porphyries display Hf compositions comparable to those of the Jiangnan Orogen basement rocks. In situ zircon oxygen isotopic analyses reveal that they have similar oxygen isotopic compositions, which are close to those of mantle zircons. Moreover, a decreasing trend of δ18O values is present. We propose that the ore-related porphyries of the Yinshan deposit were emplaced contemporaneously and derived from partial melting of Neoproterozoic arc-derived mafic (or ultra-mafic) rocks. Modelling suggests that the quartz porphyries, dacitic porphyries, and quartz dioritic porphyries experienced ˜25%, ˜10%, and ˜10% crustal contaminations by Shuangqiaoshan rocks. Our study provides important constraints on mantle–crust interaction in the genesis of polymetallic mineralization associated with Mesozoic magmatism in southeastern China.

works.title: Mechanism recognition and application effect analysis of air injection development in ultra-low permeability oil reservoirs
works.abstract: Abstract There are few application examples of air drive development technology in ultra-low permeability oil reservoirs in China. The article relies on the air drive development block of H oilfield, and based on the results of core start-up pressure gradient experiment, relative permeability experiment, gas composition experiment, and gas swelling experiment, conducts research and analysis on the seepage mechanism and low-temperature oxidation mechanism of air drive development, demonstrating the advantages of air drive development in oil displacement mechanism of ultra-low permeability oilfield. Based on the basic parameters of oil fields developed by air flooding both domestically and internationally, the specific blocks suitable for air flooding development in H oilfield are selected. The feasibility of conducting air flooding development in low permeability oil fields is demonstrated from three aspects: indoor real core experimental data, safety, and the maturity of existing equipment and technology. At the same time, an analysis is conducted on the development status of the air drive block in H oilfield. By comparing the development effects with adjacent water injection blocks, it is demonstrated that the air drive development effect in ultra-low permeability oilfield is superior to water injection development.
