works.title: Tunable intrinsic ferromagnetic topological phases in bulk van der Waals\n crystal MnSb6Te10
works.abstract:
Intrinsic ferromagnetism is a crucial ingredient to realize quantum anomalous
Hall effect in quasi two dimensional materials, thus the search of intrinsic
ferromagnetic topological materials is one of the most concerned issues in the
field of topological phases of matter. In this work, combining magnetotransport
measurements, first principles calculations, and angle-resolved photoemission
spectroscopy studies, we find that in MnSb6Te10, the n = 2 member of the
MnSb2Te4/(Sb2Te3)n family, the strong magnetic competition realizes a fragile
ferromagnetic ground state, which whereas easily enters into ferrimagnetic and
the Z_2 antiferromagnetic topological insulator phase with warming to higher
temperature. Interestingly, the system stays in an inversion-symmetry-protected
axion insulator phase in the ferromagnetic ground state as well as in the
external magnetic field driven spin-polarized FM phase and can be converted
into a Weyl semimetal with multiple Weyl nodes in the valence bands with hole
doping, which are manifested by the measured notable intrinsic anomalous Hall
effect. Our work thus provides an intrinsic magnetic topological material which
is highly tunable into versatile topological phases by temperature, magnetic
field, as well as carrier doping.

works.title: Museum-Based Teacher Professional Development: Peabody Fellows in Earth Science
works.abstract: The Peabody Fellows in Earth Science program was a professional development opportunity for middle and high school teachers to enhance their knowledge of, and teaching skills in, the Earth sciences. It combined a summer institute and academic year workshops with the production of new curricular resources on the interpretation of landforms in Connecticut. Teachers implemented these materials with the aid of an accompanying classroom kit. The program included in-depth evaluation of the project outcomes for teachers and students; focused on tectonic processes; and on erosion, weathering, and glaciers. Forty-seven teachers participated in the institute, 30 taught the full curriculum, and 21 completed all the evaluation activities. Teachers reported that they had significantly increased their geoscience content knowledge as well as their ability to teach geoscience-related skills, particularly in guiding students to make observations and inferences about the local landscape. In the majority of cases for teachers that completed all evaluation activities, there was a significant increase in student performance in at least one learning goal as a result of the teachers' participation in the program. These data show this type of informal–formal educational initiative can be highly successful in improving teacher competence and student learning in the geosciences. They also provide evidence that positive proximal outcomes for the teachers are reflected in the ultimate outcomes for students.

works.title: Research Progress of Coarse Woody Debris in Forest Ecosystems
works.abstract: Coarse woody debris(CWD) is an important structural and functional component of forest ecosystems and plays a key role in keeping the integrity of ecosystems.The concept of CWD and its classification system were specified,and the dynamics of the domestic and abroad study on CWD were sorted out and summarized.Besides,it was pointed out that the ecological functions of CWD had been attached great importance to by the researchers at home and abroad,especially those facets like the CWD storage,decomposition rate,nutrients storage(C and N,etc.),the process of dynamic change and its characteristics,the influence on the regeneration and succession of forest ecosystems and biodiversity protection,strong water and soil conservation functions of CWD(inhibiting water and soil loss,improving soil texture),and the function of seedling nursing relative to water and soil conservation,were presented and studied.

works.title: MicroCT characterization on microstructure of C/SiC composites
works.abstract: Nondestructive three-dimensional structure of 3D C/SiC composites fabricated by chemical vapor infiltration(CVI) was characterized using X-ray microcomputed tomography(MicroCT).The current study was undertaken to assess the capabilities and limitations of MicroCT for the characterization of C/SiC composites.Results demonstrate that MicroCT can facilitate characterization of fabric morphology,defects(porosity and the different densities of SiC matrix) in 3D C/SiC composites.A gas retention and viscous flow formation in the preform was revealed in the light of three-dimensional porosity.A nodular surface morphology of SiC matrix fabricated by CVI was observed by reconstructing the matrix porosity-wall.Comparing with the SEM surface morphology of SiC coating fabricated by chemical vapor deposition(CVD),pressure difference between the inner and outer preform was demonstrated.

summary_bullets.innovation: The innovation is the nondestructive 3D characterization of C/SiC composites using MicroCT, revealing formation mechanisms and detailed microstructure.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This study offers valuable nondestructive 3D characterization insights into C/SiC composite microstructure and formation mechanisms for material development.

works.title: On CNC Manufacturing Information Acquirement Technology
works.abstract: CNC machine tools information acquirement method through the serial port was expounded.Functions of PLC in the CNC system and link between CNC and PLC were specified.The method of information acquirement through the support of user-defined CNC M code was proposed.The Siemens S7-200 PLC's PPI communication protocol was adopted.VB program was adopted to collect the real time manufacturing data;the feasibility was verified.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: CNC制造信息获取技术研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决通过串口获取数控机床制造信息的问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用串口通信、用户自定义M代码、西门子S7-200 PLC的PPI协议和VB编程来获取信息。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成功采集了实时制造数据，并验证了所提方法的有效性和可行性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性地提出了通过支持用户自定义CNC M代码来获取制造信息的方法。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为数控机床实时制造数据采集提供了一种经验证的有效方法，对智能制造有价值。

works.title: [A kinetic study of organic reaction by Kalman filter and spectrophotometry].
works.abstract: The Kalman filter-spectrometry was used to the study on the chemical dynamics of alpha-Oxo ketene cyclic dithioacetals. Results show that the method can effectively eliminate or reduce the intercomponent interferences in the simultaneous determination of all components. The method was successfully used to study the condensation reaction dynamics of 1-phenyl-2-(1,2-dithioethylene)methylene-1,3-dibutandione and m-nitrophenyl aldehyde.

summary_bullets.methodology: 本文采用卡尔曼滤波-分光光度法研究有机反应动力学。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 该方法能有效消除或减少组分间干扰，并成功应用于特定缩合反应动力学研究。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新点在于将卡尔曼滤波-分光光度法应用于有机反应动力学研究，有效解决组分间干扰问题。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该方法为复杂有机反应动力学研究提供了一种有效且能减少干扰的分析工具。

works.title: A dynamic input-output price model
works.abstract: With matrix analysis method,we work out that the equilibrium price vector may not exist if every department increase the profit rates when the rates are different.The Markov is used as stochastic process to prove that the probability of the infinite collapse time is zero,that is,the equilibrium price vector for this model does not exist.
works.venue: Journal of Changchun University of Technology

works.translated_title: 动态投入产出价格模型

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨在部门利润率不同且增长时，动态投入产出模型中均衡价格向量是否存在。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用矩阵分析方法和马尔可夫随机过程来分析动态投入产出模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 当各部门利润率不同且增长时，均衡价格向量可能不存在，且无限崩溃时间的概率为零。
summary_bullets.innovation: 引入动态投入产出模型并结合马尔可夫过程，证明了特定条件下均衡价格向量的不存在性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 对研究经济系统稳定性、价格形成机制及投入产出的动态行为的学者有价值。

summary_bullets.methodology: 可能采用经济学模型或博弈论分析两种策略的优劣。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 揭示了在特定市场和技术条件下，专利池和垂直整合策略各自的适用性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出了比较专利池与垂直整合策略选择的理论框架或分析视角。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为企业知识产权战略选择及科技管理政策制定提供理论指导。

works.title: Research and Development of Multi-Metal Mold Automatic Opening and Clamping Machine
works.abstract: A new method for mould opening and clamping has been proposed after deeply analyzing the traditional casting equipment,and the automatic opening and clamping machine is designed according to this new method,which solved the problems of the traditional casting equipment,such as difficult opening,complicated structure of pouring device,high labor intensity and low work efficiency,joint flash and burrs,big deformation and short service life of the metal mold and so on.This paper elaborated the mechanism of chain opening and clamping,as well as the structure,characteristics and hydraulic control system of the automatic opening and clamping machine.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 多金属模具自动开合模机的研制

summary_bullets.research_question: This paper addresses traditional casting equipment problems including difficult mold opening, low efficiency, high labor intensity, and mold defects like flash and deformation.
summary_bullets.methodology: The authors propose a new mold opening/clamping method, design an automatic machine based on it, and detail its chain mechanism, structure, and hydraulic control system.
summary_bullets.key_findings: The designed automatic opening and clamping machine, based on a new method, effectively solves traditional casting issues, improving efficiency and mold quality.
summary_bullets.innovation: The innovation lies in proposing a novel chain-based method for automatic mold opening and clamping, and designing a machine that integrates this mechanism and hydraulic control.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This study is valuable for researchers and practitioners aiming to automate casting processes, enhance operational efficiency, reduce labor, and improve product quality.

works.title: The evolution of technology market theory in China——from the commercialization of research findings to technology transfer
works.abstract: The theory of scientific and technological achievements transforming which Formed in the era of Planned Economy played an important role in guiding the technology market activity at that time.With the improving of mercerization degree and the growing of the scale of technology market,the instruction position of the theory of scientific and technological achievements transforming replaced by technology transfer theory which has good advantages in connotation research contents Scope of the study researching systematic.Through the carding process of the theory of scientific and technological achievements transforming and technology transfer theory,Reveal the essence of these theories and contrastive analysis,it is helpful to provide the basis for the change of the technical market theory,and then establish the guidance status of the technology transfer theory.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 中国技术市场理论的演进——从科研成果商业化到技术转移

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨了中国技术市场理论从科研成果转化到技术转移的演变过程及其指导地位的变迁。
summary_bullets.methodology: 本文通过梳理和对比分析科研成果转化理论与技术转移理论，揭示其本质。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 随着市场化程度提高，技术转移理论因其在内涵、研究内容和系统性方面的优势取代了科研成果转化理论的指导地位。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文通过对比分析揭示了技术市场理论演变的本质，为技术市场理论的变革和技术转移理论指导地位的建立提供了依据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为理解中国技术市场理论的演变提供了理论基础，有助于确立技术转移理论的指导地位。

works.title: Isolation and characterization microsatellite markers from Hypomesus nipponensis
works.abstract: Fourteen polymorphic microsatellite loci were isolated from the Japanese smelt(Hypomesus nipponensis).These microsatellite markers were tested in a sample of 24 individuals.The number of alleles ranged from 3 to 25,with an average of 8.4 alleles per locus.The observed and expected heterozygosity of these loci varied from 0.266 7 to 1.000 0 and 0.282 5 to 0.932 2,respectively.Locus HN-075 and HN-250 deviated significantly from Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium(P0.05).No genotypic disequilibrium among loci was found(P0.05).These microsatellite markers could be useful in studing population structure of the Japanese smelt,or introduction routes of this fish to China.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: Hypomesus nipponensis 微卫星标记的分离与鉴定

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在分离并鉴定日本公鱼（Hypomesus nipponensis）的微卫星标记。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究从24个日本公鱼个体中分离并测试了14个多态性微卫星位点。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现了14个多态性微卫星位点，等位基因数3-25，杂合度各异，其中两个位点偏离哈迪-温伯格平衡。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文首次分离并鉴定了日本公鱼（Hypomesus nipponensis）的14个新型微卫星标记。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这些新开发的微卫星标记对研究日本公鱼的种群结构及其引入中国的路径具有重要价值。

works.title: Study on the Effect of Notch Signaling Pathway on Angiogenesis
works.abstract: Notch signaling pathway involved in almost all biological processes in multicellular organism,including cell proliferation,apoptosis,invasion,metastasis and angiogenesis.In recent years,the role of Notch signaling in angiogenesis has gradually been recognized widely.Notch signaling has a key role in angiogenesis of embryonic and retina vascular diseases,arteriovenous malformation,ischemic diseases and tumor,but the specific mechanism of Notch signaling are relatively complex and not clear by now.Therefore,further understanding of the effect and mechanism of Notch signaling will provide a theoretical basis for many clinical diseases.

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探讨Notch信号通路在血管生成中的作用及其复杂且不明确的具体机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 摘要未明确提及具体实验方法，但表明是对Notch信号通路在血管生成中作用的分析研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Notch信号通路在胚胎、视网膜血管疾病、动静脉畸形、缺血性疾病和肿瘤的血管生成中发挥关键作用。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文的创新在于强调Notch信号通路在血管生成中机制的复杂性和不明确性，并致力于深入理解。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 深入理解Notch信号通路的作用和机制，将为多种临床疾病的治疗提供重要的理论基础。

works.title: Several variations of Newton iteration method
works.abstract: Based on Newton iterative method,three new kinds of iterative methods are constructed in this paper.The first iterative formula(I) is a one-step iterative formula.It has second order convergence rate at single root,and needn't evaluate derivative of function.The second iterative formula(II) is also one-step iterative formula and has three order convergence at single root.The third iterative formula(III) is a two-step iterative formula.There is at least three order convergence rate.Although iterative formula(III) is complex,it has advantage of free-computing derivative of function.Moreover,the convergence of three kinds of methods is proved.Finally,some numerical experiments are given,and numerical results are satisfied.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 牛顿迭代法的几种变体

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在构建基于牛顿迭代法的新型迭代方法，以提高收敛速度或避免导数计算。
summary_bullets.methodology: 作者构造了三种新的迭代公式，并对它们的收敛性进行了理论证明和数值实验验证。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 论文构建了三种新的迭代方法：公式(I)二阶无导数，公式(II)三阶，公式(III)两步三阶无导数，并证明了它们的收敛性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新点在于构建了三种基于牛顿迭代法的新型迭代公式，其中一些实现了高阶收敛或无需计算函数导数。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为数值分析领域提供了新的高效迭代方法，特别是在求解非线性方程时，对相关研究者具有实用价值。

works.title: DESCRIPTION OF A NEW SPECIES OF FRONTOPSYLLA FROM CHINA (SIPHONAPTERA: LEPTOPSYLLIDAE)
works.abstract: Frontopsylla (Orfrontia) postprojicia sp. nov.Separable from other members of Frontopsylla (Orfrontia) by (1) the posterior margin of the ♂ movable process being convex near middle (so the new species is named ) instead of straight or slightly concave at middle as in other species and subspecies; (2) fixed process rectangular, its apes truncate (fig. 2); (3) St. Ⅷ with a sinus at the dorso-apical corner (fig. 4); (4) posterior margin of St. Ⅶ of ♀ with a narrow triangular sinus (fig. 6) somewhat resembling that of F, (O.) lapponica (Nordberg, 1935), but St. Ⅶ and T. Ⅷ of the latter far more bristly.Holotype, ♂, 3.1 mm; allotype, ♀, 3.3 mm; paratypes 9 ♂♂ 6 ♀♀, collected from Ih Ju League (Otog Front Banner, 38.5°N, 107.2°E), Nei Mongol Autonomous Region in May and November, 1983; all off Scaptochirus moschatus Milne-Edwards. The Mo-type, allotype and 1 ♂ 1♀ paratypes are deposited in the Insect Collection of the Academy of Military Medical Sciences, Beijing, the remaining paratypes, 8 ♂♂ 5 ♀♀, in the Prevention and Control Station of the Endemic Disease of Ih Ju League, Nei Mongol Aut. Region, Dongsheng.

summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过详细的形态学比较和标本采集，对新物种的鉴别特征进行了描述。

summary_bullets.innovation: 本文首次描述并命名了Frontopsylla属的一个新物种，丰富了该属的物种多样性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为蚤类分类学、生物多样性研究以及中国区域物种分布提供了重要的新数据。

works.title: Application of the buccal fat pad as a pedicled graft to repair soft tissue defects after the resetion of oral sub- mucous fibrosis
works.abstract: Objective:To study the clinical application of the buccal fat pad as a pedicled graft to repair soft tissue defects after the resection of oral submucous fibrosis.Method:Sum up the effects to the buccal fat pad as a pedicled graft to repair soft tissue defects in 10 patients with limitation of mouth opening.Result:All the patients but one,whose mouthopening degree exceeded 3 cm,had favorable wound healing.The buccal fat pad became edematous and there was a layer of pseudomembrane in the surface of buccal fat pad in first week after operation.The pseudomembrane disappeared gradually one week after operation and disappeared completely after two weeks.Edematous disappeared gradually and the surface of the buccal fat pad had epithelial metaplasia and new epithelium formed two to three weeks after operation.It was pink and similar to normal mucosa six to eight weeks after operation.Conclusion:Buccal fat pad provides a good method to repair soft tissue defects after the resection of oral submucous fibrosis and improve limititation of mouth opening,which is suitable for clinical application.

works.title: Comparative Analysis of Clinical Efficacy between Kunbao Pill and Western Medicine in the Treatment of Menopausal Syndrome
works.abstract: Objective: To compare the clinical efficacy of Kunbao pill with western medicine in the treatment of menopausal syndrome and hormone levels. Methods: 98 cases of women were randomly divided into a treatment group and a control group according to random number table. There were 49 cases in each group. The observation group was received 50 Kunbao pills twice a day for a month. The control group was received estrogen therapy of 2. 5mg Livial one time every day for one month. The clinical symptoms,adverse reactions and hormone levels were observed between two groups. Results: The total effective rate was 91. 8% in the treatment group. The total efficiency rate was 89. 7% in the control group. There was no significant difference between two groups( χ2= 0. 12,P 0. 05). Compared with the control group,the magnitude of change in FSH and LH in the treatment group and the change in the control group had no significant difference( t = 0. 11,P 0. 05). Conclusion: The clinical efficacy of Kunbao pill has no significant difference with the efficacy of western medicine in the treatment of menopausal syndrome. Livial has no significant difference with Kunbao pill for the improvement of the change of FSH and LH. Kunbao pill has less adverse reaction and shows certain clinical feasibility.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 坤宝丸与西药治疗更年期综合征临床疗效的比较分析

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在比较坤宝丸与西药（利维爱）治疗围绝经期综合征的临床疗效及对激素水平的影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用随机对照试验，将98名女性分为坤宝丸治疗组和利维爱对照组，观察临床症状、不良反应和激素水平（FSH、LH）。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 坤宝丸与利维爱在总有效率（91.8% vs 89.7%）和FSH、LH变化方面无显著差异，但坤宝丸不良反应较少。
summary_bullets.innovation: 直接比较了中药坤宝丸与特定西药（利维爱）治疗围绝经期综合征的疗效，并特别关注了不良反应的差异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为围绝经期综合征提供了一种疗效相似且不良反应更少的中药替代方案，对临床实践和未来研究具有指导价值。

works.title: [Study on the arylaminothiourea compounds by IR spectroscopy].
works.abstract: In this paper, eleven new thiourea compounds were prepared and studied by IR spectroscopy. The fundamental vibrations have been assigned. The band near 1540cm(-1) was identified as thiourea I band, which mainly originated from the N-H deformation vibration coupling with a little C-N stretching vibration. Thiourea I band near 1280cm(-1) mainly originated from C-N stretching vibration. C=S stretching vibration frequency was at near 110cm(-1) and it was identified as thiourea III band.

summary_bullets.key_findings: 确定了硫脲化合物的关键红外吸收带归属，包括1540cm⁻¹（硫脲I，N-H变形/C-N伸缩）、1280cm⁻¹（硫脲I，C-N伸缩）和110cm⁻¹（硫脲III，C=S伸缩）。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新点在于制备了十一种新型硫脲化合物，并首次对其红外光谱进行了详细的振动归属。

works.title: Theoretical studies on meta-discourse: A review
works.abstract: There are many kinds of tools for human communication, but language is the most common, direct and effective one. In any form of language communication, there are primary discourse and meta-discourse involved in. Nowadays, more and more research scholars have paid their attention to it, and it has become one of the focuses of discourse analysis. In this paper, it gives an overview of the origin, definitions, functions and classifications of meta-discourse, and also the prospects of the future research are put forward.

works.title: A comparative analysis on the use of the metadiscourse in English academic writings by native and non-native speakers of English
works.abstract: There are many kinds of tools for human communication,but language is the most direct and effective one. In any form of language communication,discourse will be involved and each discourse consists of primary discourse which can express the propositional meaning,and metadiscourse which can express any meaning except the propositional one. This paper discusses the similarities and differences and finds out the possible causes for similarities and differences in meadiscourse use through the comparative study on the use of the metadiscourse in English academic writings by native and non-native speakers of English.

works.title: [Application of argon-nitrogen mixed gas inductively coupled plasma in elements and isotopes analysis].
works.abstract: To improve the precision and accuracy of elements and isotopes analysis in traditional Ar-ICP, the addition of nitrogen in ICP has been widely used. The present review focused on the discussions of the basic physical and chemical properties of the Ar-N2 mixed gas inductively coupled plasma and the mechanisms of the special nature of Ar-N2 mixed gas plasma. The applications of Ar-N2 inductively coupled plasma in spectral analysis and mass spectrometry analysis in the past 40 years were summarized. The authors also give an overall outlook on the application of this technology.

works.title: Effect of high-flux hemodialysis on the soluble intercellular adhesion molecule-1 and inflammatory factors in maintenance hemodialysis patients
works.abstract: Objective: To study the effect of high-flux hemodialysis on the soluble intercellular adhesion molecule-1 and inflammatory factors in maintenance hemohemodialysis patients.Methods: Forty MHD patients were selected and divided into two groups,conventional hemodialysis group(HD group) and high flux hemodialysis group(HFHD group),the observation time was twelve weeks.The concentrations of sICAM-1,TNF-α,CRP,β 2 MG were measured at the beginning,pre-dialysis and post-dialysis of the end of experiment.The value of KT/ V at the beginning and the end of experiment was calculated.Results: In HFHD group,the concentrations of CRP,TNF-α,β 2 MG,sICAM-1 decreased at the end of experiment,it had significant difference at post-hemodialysis compared to pre-hemodialysis(P0.05).The concentrations of TNF-α,β 2 MG,sICAM-1 at pre-hemodialysis of the end of experiment had statistically difference compared to the beginning of the experiment(P0.05),and at the end of experiment,the concentrations of β 2 MG,sICAM-1 had significant difference compared to the HD group(P0.05).In HD group,the concentrations of CRP,TNF-α,β 2 MG,sICAM-1 all increased at the end of experiment.Conclusion: Compared to the conventional hemodialysis,high-flux hemodialysis can decrease the concentration of sICAM-1 and TNF-α.

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在研究高通量血液透析对维持性血液透析患者可溶性细胞间粘附分子-1和炎症因子的影响。

summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究结果为临床选择血液透析方式以改善维持性血液透析患者的炎症状态和预后提供了重要依据。

works.title: Determination of Glucose withβ-Cyclodextrin/Methylene Blue as Fluorescent Probe
works.abstract: In a PBS medium of pH 9.0,fluorescence of methylene blue was quenched by reaction with glucose and intensity of fluorescence quenching of methylene blue was enhanced obviously by usingβ-cyclodextrin/Methylene blue as fluorescent probe.Linear relationship between values of intensity of fluorescence quenching and mass concentration of glucose was kept in the range of 0.02-26mg·L-1,with detection limit(3S/N)of 0.002mg· L-1.Based on these facts,a fluorospectrophotometric method for the determination of glucose withβ-cyclodextrin/ methylene blue as fluorescent probe was proposed.Its maximum excitation wavelength was 660nm,and the maximum emission wavelength was 678nm.Values of recovery found by standard addition method were in the range of 97.4%-101%,and values of RSD′s(n=5)less than 2.5%.

works.title: Mechanism Research of Chinese Herbal Pair of Pseudobulbus Cremastrae seu Pleiones and Nidus Polistis Mandarini in Inhibiting In-vitro Invasion and Metastasis of Human Breast Cancer MDA-MB-231 Cells
works.abstract: Objective To explore the inhibitive effects and mechanism of Chinese herbal pair of Pseudobulbus Cremastrae seu Pleiones(Shancigu)and Nidus Polistis Mandarini(Lufengfang)on in-vitro invasion and metastasis of human breast cancer MDA-MB-231 cells. Methods The effect of serum containing Shancigu-Lufengfang on MDA-MB-231 cell viability was determined by methyl thiazolyl tetrazolium(MTT)assay. The invasion ability of the cells was measured by Transwell chamber. Real-time fluorescence polymerase chain reaction(RT-PCR)technique was used to evaluate the expression of matrix metalloproteinase-9(MMP-9) and tissue inhibitor of metalloproteinases-1(TIMP-1)in MDA-MB-231 cells. Results Chinese herbal pair of Shancigu-Lufengfang showed an in-vitro killing rate of 35.86 % on MDA-MB-231 cells,and could obviously inhibit the invasion ability of MDA-MB-231 cells(P 0.01),the inhibition ratio being 34.8 %. MMP-9 mRNA expression was significantly decreased(P 0.05), while TIMP-1 mRNA expression was obviously increased(P 0.05),therefore the ratio of MMP-9 mRNA/TIMP-1 mRNA was reduced dramatically(P 0.05,P 0.01). Conclusion Chinese herbal pair of Shancigu-Lufengfang could inhibitthe invasion ability of MDA-MB-231 cells,and the inhibitive mechanism may be correlated with the down-regulation of MMP-9 mRNA and the UP-regulation of TIMP-1 mRNA, thus decreasing the ratio of MMP-9mRNA/ TIMP-1mRNA.
works.venue: Traditional Chinese Drug Research and Clinical Pharmacology

works.translated_title: 中药对 Pseudobulbus Cremastrae seu Pleiones 和 Nidus Polistis Mandarini 抑制人乳腺癌 MDA-MB-231 细胞体外侵袭和转移的机制研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨中药对山慈菇-露蜂房对人乳腺癌MDA-MB-231细胞体外侵袭和转移的抑制作用及机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用MTT法检测细胞活力，Transwell小室法评估侵袭能力，RT-PCR检测MMP-9和TIMP-1 mRNA表达。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 山慈菇-露蜂房能抑制MDA-MB-231细胞侵袭，降低MMP-9 mRNA表达并升高TIMP-1 mRNA表达，从而降低MMP-9/TIMP-1比值。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究首次揭示了山慈菇-露蜂房对乳腺癌细胞侵袭的抑制作用及其MMP-9/TIMP-1分子机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为乳腺癌的潜在中药治疗提供了新的思路和作用机制，具有重要的临床转化价值。

works.title: Effect of Baizhu Fuzi Decoction on Survival Time of Nude Mice and Osteoclast of Breast Cancer Bone Metastases
works.abstract: Objective To investigate the inhibitory mechanism of Baizhu Fuzi Decoction(BFD)on bone damage of nude mice model with bone metastases of breast cancer. Methods The nude mice model with bone metastases of breast cancer was established, and then the modeled mice were treated with BFD and drug pair of Radix Aconite Preparata(Fuzi)and Rhizoma Atractylodis Macrocephalae(Baizhu),respectively. After treatment,the survival time of nude mice was observed, the count of osteoclast was detected after tartrate- resistant acid phosphatase(TRACP)staining,the gene expression of macrophage colony stimulating facto(rM- CSF)and parathyroid hormone related peptide(PTHrP)in the bone metastases of breast cancer was examined by the RT- PCR and their protein expression was detected by Western blot method. Results Compared with the model group,the survival time was obviously prolonged(P0.01),the amount of TRACP positive cells in the bone metastases of breast cancer was reduced(P 0.01),M- CSF and PTHrP mRNA relative expression levels as well as their protein relative expression levels were decreased obviously(P 0.01) in B FD group and Fuzi-Baizhu drug pair group. And BFD group showed better effect on decreasing M- CSF and PTHrP protein expression levels than Fuzi-Baizhu drug pair group,but the difference was not statistically significan(tP 0.05). Conclusion BFD shows certain effect on relieving bone damage in nude mice model with bone metastases of breast cancer,and its mechanism is probably related with the down- regulation of gene and protein expression of osteoclasia factors of M- CSF and PTHrP in the bone metastases of breast cancer. The therapeutic effect of Fuzi-Baizhu drug pair is similar to that of BFD,indicating that Fuzi-Baizhu drug pair is the core drug of BFD.

works.translated_title: 白术附子汤对乳腺癌骨转移裸鼠生存时间及破骨细胞的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探讨白术附子汤对乳腺癌骨转移裸鼠骨损伤的抑制机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 建立乳腺癌骨转移裸鼠模型，观察生存期，检测破骨细胞计数、M-CSF和PTHrP基因及蛋白表达。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 白术附子汤和附子-白术药对均能延长生存期，减少破骨细胞，下调M-CSF和PTHrP表达。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次探讨白术附子汤通过下调M-CSF和PTHrP表达缓解乳腺癌骨转移骨损伤的机制，并确认核心药对。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为乳腺癌骨转移的治疗提供了潜在中药方案及其作用机制，并揭示了核心药对的价值。

works.title: GROUP ACTIVITIES OF THE CERVUS ALBIROSTRIS IN THE MATING SEASON
works.abstract:
Like other deers, the male and female of White-lipped deer (cervus albirostris) groups are separated except during rutting season. Before mating, both sexes shuffle from the warm season habitats to overwinter place and gather immediately to form mating herds.
There is a distinct boundary of home range among the mating herds, and the master of one herd is hostile to his counterparts in other herds.The mating period is about 81 days, which can be divided into primary and secondary of mating stage, and the latter is no significance in the deer's propagation.
If the weather varies suddenly such as heavy snow can disturb the deer's normal activities, change their sitting or lying sites, stop feeding and postpone ment the other activities.

works.translated_title: 白唇鹿繁殖季节的群体活动

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文研究白唇鹿在繁殖季节的群体活动模式、行为特征及其影响因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 本文通过对白唇鹿繁殖季节的群体动态和行为进行实地观察和描述。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 白唇鹿在繁殖期形成有领地边界的交配群，交配期约81天，且恶劣天气会显著干扰其活动。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文详细揭示了白唇鹿繁殖季节的群体组织、领地行为、交配阶段及环境影响，填补了特定物种行为学空白。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为白唇鹿的繁殖生态学、行为学和物种保护提供了重要的基础数据和科学依据。

works.title: Analysis on situation of ecological security in Wuyishan Scenery District
works.abstract: This paper is aimed at presenting a quantitative analysis on the ecoenvironmental security situation at Wuyishan Scenery District based on the net primeval productivity model of natural vegetation.It has given an analysis and assessment over the eco-environmental features and capacities as well as the landscape patterns and bio-diversities of the District.As is well known,the Wuyishan Scenery District is the world-class natural and cultural heritage.Therefore, it is of historical and realistic significance to fulfill the responsibility for effective preservation and protection of the natural and humanistic resources to guarantee its eco-environmental security and sustainable development.The results of our investigation and analysis indicate the truthfulness of the following statistical data and quantitative facts:(1) Its net primeval productivity of natural vegetation is 15.609 9(T/(hm~2·a),) which implies that the District remains in a comparatively higher stable balanced state;(2) Its natural system has higher typical productive capacity of subtropical features in a range of more advanced productive grades;(3) The capacity of eco-environment of the whole year is D_y=(4 947 000) people/a,which has larger environmental capacity space favorable for the protection of the natural resources and beauties in the District and also helps to maintain the available infrastructure and facilities with lower landscape fragmentation index;(4) The overall current scenery prospects remain satisfactory with pleasant eco-environmental looks;(5) Its abundant bio-diversify of vegetation keeps well-preserved,indicating it has been under proper protection. Thus,it can be said that the overall eco-environmental safety and security of the District is under good order.However,more attention is still to be paid to the control of the interference of the busy tourist and business activities of human beings while timely allergy of the fragile sustainable nature of the flora and fauna diversity is to be kept in mind.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 武夷山风景区生态安全态势分析

summary_bullets.research_question: This paper aims to quantitatively analyze the eco-environmental security situation of Wuyishan Scenery District, a world-class natural and cultural heritage site.
summary_bullets.methodology: It employs a quantitative analysis based on the net primeval productivity model of natural vegetation, assessing eco-environmental features, capacities, landscape patterns, and biodiversity.
summary_bullets.key_findings: The district exhibits high net primeval productivity, stable ecological balance, large environmental capacity, satisfactory scenery, and well-preserved biodiversity, indicating good overall eco-environmental safety.
summary_bullets.innovation: The innovation lies in providing a quantitative analysis of ecological security for a world heritage site using the net primeval productivity model and detailed statistical data.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This study provides crucial quantitative data and insights for the effective preservation, protection, and sustainable development of world-class natural and cultural heritage sites.

works.title: ESTABLISHMENT OF TWO CELL LINES FROM PUPA OF ECTROPIS OBLIQUA WARREN (LEPIDOPTERA.GEOMETRIDAE)
works.abstract: Two cell lines from pupal ovaries of Ectropis obliqua (SIE-EO-801, SIE-EO-803) have been established since 1980.They have been transfered for more than 73 passages and maintaned for about one and a half year up to now. They mainly consist of three cell types: epithelial-like, spindle-shaped and round cells.The SIE-EO-801 line grows as monolayer culture SIE-EO-803 line as both monolayer and suspension cultures. The type of chromosomes reveals that it belongs to the karyotype of Le-pidoptera.The size of them are ra-ther small and short, and the number varies greatly from less than 30 to more than 200.Thus, it is impossible to count accurately the number. In studying their characteristics, we found that some differences exist be-tween these two cell lines with respect to growth behavior, morphology and enzyme activities. Ectropis obliqua is a major pest of tea trees.The cell lines established from their ovary may thus be used in the study of the biology of this insect.

works.translated_title: 斜纹尺蛾蛹两种细胞系的建立 (鳞翅目.尺蛾科)

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在建立并初步表征茶尺蠖（Ectropis obliqua）的稳定细胞系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过从茶尺蠖蛹期卵巢中分离细胞，并进行长期传代培养、形态学、生长行为、染色体和酶活性分析来建立和表征细胞系。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成功建立了两种茶尺蠖卵巢细胞系（SIE-EO-801, SIE-EO-803），它们由三种细胞类型组成，表现出不同的生长行为，且染色体数量差异大。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次成功建立了茶树主要害虫茶尺蠖的稳定细胞系，为后续生物学研究提供了新的工具。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这些细胞系可作为研究茶尺蠖生物学的重要工具，有助于深入了解这种茶树害虫。

works.abstract: The SSH cDNA library of half-blood male Dermacentor silvarum is constructed. The differential expressed genes are related to blood sucking and digestion.

works.title: [Chemical constituents of Aralia fargesii Franch].
works.abstract: From the EtOH extract of Aralia fargesii, 8 compounds were isolated and identified as umbelliferone, esculetin, scopoletin, scoparone, oleanic acid, falcarindiol, mellissic acid and beta-sitosterol.

summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用乙醇提取、分离和鉴定技术从重齿楤木中获取化合物。

summary_bullets.relevance_note: 鉴定植物化学成分有助于深入了解其药理活性，为药物开发提供潜在基础。

works.title: [The theoretical study of Raman imaging for pendent drop adsorbed by uniaxial orientated molecules].
works.abstract: In this paper, Raman imaging method used to determine molecular orientation of LB film on pendent drop is proposed. For the molecules which is of uniaxial orientation, all of Raman activity matrix elements have been calculated. The intensity distribution of Raman imaging for pendent drop and the ratio distribution of polarized Raman intensity used to determining molecular orientation have also been calculated and drawn out.

summary_bullets.methodology: 采用拉曼成像方法，计算了单轴取向分子的拉曼活性矩阵元素，并模拟了强度和偏振拉曼强度比的分布。

summary_bullets.innovation: 本文创新性地提出了利用拉曼成像方法理论研究悬滴上LB薄膜分子取向的确定方法。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为利用拉曼成像技术表征LB薄膜的分子取向提供了理论基础，对材料科学和纳米技术领域具有重要价值。

works.title: CDKN2 (MTS1) tumor suppressor gene mutations in human tumor cell lines.
works.abstract: Tumor suppressor gene CDKN2 (also called MTS1, CDK4I and p16INK4) is located in 9p21 and deleted homozygously in a high percentage of tumor cell lines. We have examined the sequence of CDKN2 in 154 tumor cell lines that are not homozygously deleted for CDKN2. Overall, 18% (27/154) of the cell lines carried mutations in CDKN2. These mutations were found in cell lines derived from melanoma, bladder, lung and prostate cancers, as well as sarcomas of various origin. The spectrum of the CDKN2 mutations found in melanoma cell lines indicated a major role for ultraviolet light in generating the mutations, suggesting the mutations occurred in vivo. The frequency of loss of heterozygosity in 9p21 in this set of lines is only slightly higher than the background rate of aneuploidy, suggesting that a second 9p21 tumor suppressor gene, if it exists, must lie near CDKN2.

works.translated_title: CDKN2 (MTS1) 肿瘤抑制基因在人肿瘤细胞系中的突变

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探究未发生CDKN2纯合缺失的肿瘤细胞系中CDKN2基因的突变情况。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过对154个未发生CDKN2纯合缺失的肿瘤细胞系进行CDKN2基因测序来分析其突变。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 18%的细胞系携带CDKN2突变，主要见于黑色素瘤、膀胱癌等，黑色素瘤突变谱提示紫外线作用，且9p21杂合性缺失频率较低。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究首次在未纯合缺失CDKN2的肿瘤细胞系中发现广泛突变，并揭示紫外线在黑色素瘤突变中的作用，提示9p21可能存在第二个抑癌基因。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究揭示了CDKN2在多种肿瘤中的突变机制和频率，为肿瘤发生发展及潜在的治疗靶点提供了重要线索。

works.title: N-butanol fraction of Entada phaseoloides ethanol extract inhibits hepatocellular carcinoma HepG2 cell proliferation by inducing apoptosis.
works.abstract: Entada phaseoloides n-butanol extract inhibits HepG2 cell proliferation by inducing cell apoptosis likely through mitochondrial apoptotic pathway. This extract is therefore a potential natural source towards the discovery for a new drug-candidate for the treatment of HCC.

works.translated_title: 榼藤子乙醇提取物的正丁醇组分通过诱导细胞凋亡抑制肝细胞癌HepG2细胞增殖

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探究Entada phaseoloides正丁醇提取物对肝细胞癌HepG2细胞增殖的影响及其机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用Entada phaseoloides正丁醇提取物处理肝细胞癌HepG2细胞，观察其对细胞增殖和凋亡的影响及潜在机制。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Entada phaseoloides正丁醇提取物通过诱导细胞凋亡，可能经由线粒体凋亡途径，抑制了HepG2细胞增殖。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究首次揭示了Entada phaseoloides正丁醇提取物作为肝细胞癌潜在新药候选的天然来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为肝细胞癌治疗新药的发现提供了潜在的天然来源，对相关药物研发领域具有重要价值。

works.title: [Analysis on genetic polymorphism of 13 STR loci on chromosomes 11 and 19 in Chinese Hans].
works.abstract: The distribution of allele frequencies of 8 STR loci on chromosome 11 and 5 STR loci on chromosome 19 was consistent with the Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium and the highly genetic polymorphism was observed in Chinese Han population.

summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过分析中国汉族人群中13个STR位点的等位基因频率分布及其与Hardy-Weinberg平衡的一致性。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现中国汉族人群中13个STR位点的等位基因频率分布符合Hardy-Weinberg平衡，并表现出高度遗传多态性。

works.title: [Effect of nerve growth factor on mitochondrion dysfunction of motor neuron induced by 2,5-hexanedione].
works.abstract: The improvement of the mitochondrion dysfunction induced by 2,5-HD could be associated the mitochondrion membrane potential (Delta psi m) increased by NGF.

summary_bullets.research_question: Does nerve growth factor (NGF) mitigate 2,5-hexanedione (2,5-HD) induced motor neuron mitochondrial dysfunction?
summary_bullets.methodology: The study experimentally investigated the effect of NGF on mitochondrial function and membrane potential in motor neurons.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Nerve growth factor (NGF) improves 2,5-HD-induced mitochondrial dysfunction in motor neurons by increasing mitochondrial membrane potential (Delta psi m).
summary_bullets.innovation: The study identifies an association between NGF's neuroprotective effect and its ability to increase mitochondrial membrane potential (Delta psi m).
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research offers insights into neuroprotective mechanisms and potential therapeutic strategies for neurodegenerative conditions involving mitochondrial dysfunction.

works.title: [Preparation of liposomes entrapping plasmid DNA and linear DNA].
works.abstract: Liposomes entrapping plasmids pSV2-neo DNA, pUC18-ras DNA, pSV2-neo-ras DNA and linear DNA were prepared. The liposomes were composed of DOPC/Chol/OA (4:4:3) and pH-sensitive DOPE/Chol/OA (4:4:3), respectively. The efficiency of DNA entrapment was about 50%. Gel electrophoresis analysis showed: Liposome-entrapped DNA was not digested by DNase; The entrapped DNA molecules were intact and stable for at least 5-6 months at 4 degrees C. During preparation of pH-sensitive liposome, the pH must be kept at 8.0.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 质粒DNA和线性DNA包载脂质体的制备

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在制备并表征用于有效包封质粒DNA和线性DNA的脂质体。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用DOPC/Chol/OA和pH敏感DOPE/Chol/OA (4:4:3)制备脂质体，并通过凝胶电泳分析DNA的包封效率、完整性和稳定性。
summary_bullets.key_findings: DNA包封效率约50%；包封的DNA未被DNase消化，保持完整，并在4°C下稳定至少5-6个月。
summary_bullets.innovation: 成功制备了标准和pH敏感脂质体，实现了多种DNA的稳定高效包封，并证明了其长期稳定性和DNase保护能力。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为制备稳定、受保护的DNA包封脂质体提供了可靠方法，对基因治疗和核酸递送应用具有重要价值。

works.title: Epstein-Barr virus-encoded LMP1 increases miR-155 expression, which promotes radioresistance of nasopharyngeal carcinoma via suppressing UBQLN1.
works.abstract: This study found that aberrant miR-155 expression driven by LMP1 can modulate radio-sensitivity of the NPC cell at least partly through targeting UBQLN1.

Point mutation occurred in 5 of 9 samples of PC and manifested two types of mutation, CCA-->CGA in 4 and CCA-->CAA in 1. The changes of amino acid included changes of glycine to alanine and glycine to valine. The causes of mutation frequency and the content differed from that of foreign reports were analysed in addition to the significance of determining point mutation of K-ras gene at codon 12.

summary_bullets.key_findings: 9例胰腺癌样本中5例发现K-ras第12密码子点突变，主要为CCA-->CGA和CCA-->CAA，导致甘氨酸变为丙氨酸或缬氨酸。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立了Taq酶直接测序法来检测胰腺癌K-ras基因第12密码子点突变。

works.title: Effect of FUT3 gene silencing with miRNA on proliferation, invasion and migration abilities of human KATO-III gastric cancer cell line.
works.abstract: This study investigated the effects of FUT3 gene expression inhibition with miRNA on the proliferation, invasion and migration abilities of KATO-III cells. KATO-III cells were transfected with plasmid pcDNA™6.2-GW/EmGFP-FUT3-miR(FUT3-miRNA) and negative control plasmid in mediation of liposome, respectively, using untransfected cells as blank controls. Forty-eight hours after transfection, FUT3 mRNA levels were tested by RT-PCR. Levels of sLeA proteins were assayed by Western blot. The effects of FUT3-miRNA on the proliferation, invasion and migration of KATO-III cells were determined by CCK8 testing and Transwell assays, respectively. Results indicate that the transfection of FUT3-miRNA may down-regulate sLeA protein expression on the surface of KATO-III cells, and significantly inhibit cell proliferation (p<0.05). As compared to the negative and blank control groups, the number of invasion and migration cells in the FUT3-miRNA group decreased significantly (each p<0.05). Experimental results indicate that the miRNA expression vector which targets the FUT3 gene can effectively inhibit the proliferation, migration and invasion abilities of KATO-III cells.

works.abstract: 近年来，随着市场经济的发展，我们越来越深刻地体会到人才对企业发展的重要作用，特别是建筑设计这种技术知识密集型行业。市场竞争说到底就是人才竞争，因此，我们越来越自觉地把“人才强院”作为实现我院“创建国内一流强院”目标的根本战略来抓。对照国内一流强院人才队伍现状，以及市场对各类人才的要求，经院党委认真分析研究，认为我院人才建设工作还存在人力资源配置仍需优化；高端技术人才匮乏、年龄老化；

works.title: Aberrant expression of miR-16, B12 and CD272 in peripheral blood mononuclear cells from patients with active tuberculosis.
works.abstract: Tuberculosis (TB) immunity is affected by complex immune regulation processes, which involve various immune cells, immune molecules, and cytokines. Here, we evaluated the expression of B12, CD272 and miR-16 in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMC) of patients with active pulmonary tuberculosis. The results showed that monocytes expressing CD272 or B12 were down-regulated in patients with tuberculosis. The expression of B12 and CD272 in T cells and monocytes is related to tuberculosis. In TB patients, the up-regulation of miR-16 was negatively correlated with B12 mRNA expression, miR-16 was mainly expressed in CD14<sup>+</sup> monocytes, and CD272 mRNA was mainly expressed in CD19<sup>+</sup> B cells. It is worth noting that the overexpression of miR-16 inhibits the expression of CD272 and B12 in monocytes of TB patients. After BCG stimulation, miR-16 expression of CD14<sup>+</sup> monocytes was up-regulated and B12 mRNA and CD272 mRNA expressions were down-regulated in TB patients. Finally, we found that miR-16 may participate in the TB immunization process through targeted regulation of B12 expression. These studies indicate that the expression of B12, CD272 and miR-16 in PBMC may be related to tuberculosis.

summary_bullets.research_question: Investigated the aberrant expression of miR-16, B12, and CD272 in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) from patients with active pulmonary tuberculosis.
summary_bullets.methodology: Evaluated the expression levels of miR-16, B12, and CD272 in PBMCs from active TB patients, including analysis in specific cell types and after BCG stimulation.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Monocytes expressing CD272 or B12 were down-regulated in TB patients; miR-16 was up-regulated and negatively correlated with B12 mRNA, inhibiting CD272 and B12 expression.
summary_bullets.innovation: Identified a novel regulatory mechanism where miR-16 overexpression inhibits CD272 and B12 expression in monocytes, suggesting its participation in TB immunity via B12 regulation.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This study provides insights into the complex immune regulation in TB, potentially identifying new biomarkers or therapeutic targets related to miR-16, B12, and CD272 expression.

works.title: Regulatory Networks of LncRNA MALAT-1 in Cancer
works.abstract: Shijian Fu,1 Yanhong Wang,2 Hang Li,1 Leilei Chen,3 Quanzhong Liu4 1The First Affiliated Hospital of Harbin Medical University, Harbin 150081, People’s Republic of China; 2Department of Laboratory Medicine, Yuebei People’s Hospital of Shaoguan, The Affiliated Hospital of Shantou University, Shaoguan 512025, People’s Republic of China; 3Department of Cardiology, Beijing Anzhen Hospital, Beijing Institute of Heart Lung and Blood Vessel Disease, Capital Medical University, Beijing 100029, People’s Republic of China; 4Department of Medical Genetics, Harbin Medical University, Harbin 150081, People’s Republic of ChinaCorrespondence: Quanzhong Liu Email JaneHeather@outlook.comAbstract: Long noncoding (lnc)RNAs are a group of RNAs with a length greater than 200 nt that do not encode a protein but play an essential role in regulating the expression of target genes in normal biological contexts as well as pathologic processes including tumorigenesis. The lncRNA metastasis-associated lung adenocarcinoma transcript (MALAT)-1 has been widely studied in cancer. In this review, we describe the known functions of MALAT-1; its mechanisms of action; and associated signaling pathways and their clinical significance in different cancers. In most malignancies, including lung, colorectal, thyroid, and other cancers, MALAT-1 functions as an oncogene and is upregulated in tumors and tumor cell lines. MALAT-1 has a distinct mechanism of action in each cancer type and is thus at the center of large gene regulatory networks. Dysregulation of MALAT-1 affects cellular processes such as alternative splicing, epithelial–mesenchymal transition, apoptosis, and autophagy, which ultimately results in the abnormal cell proliferation, invasion, and migration that characterize cancers. In other malignancies, such as glioma and endometrial carcinoma, MALAT-1 functions as a tumor suppressor and thus forms additional regulatory networks. The current evidence indicates that MALAT-1 and its associated signaling pathways can serve as diagnostic or prognostic biomarker or therapeutic target in the treatment of many cancers.Keywords: long noncoding RNA, tumorigenesis, metastasis-associated lung adenocarcinoma transcript 1, regulatory cascade, oncogene, tumor suppressor
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: LncRNA MALAT-1 在癌症中的调控网络

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐述长非编码RNA MALAT-1在不同癌症中的功能、作用机制、相关信号通路及其临床意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 本文采用综述方法，总结并描述了现有关于MALAT-1在癌症中的研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: MALAT-1在多数癌症中作为致癌基因，但在某些癌症中作为抑癌基因，通过调控多种细胞过程影响肿瘤进展。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文系统性地总结了MALAT-1在不同癌症中作为致癌基因或抑癌基因的复杂调控网络和独特作用机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为MALAT-1作为癌症诊断、预后生物标志物或治疗靶点的开发提供了重要理论依据。

works.title: miR-762 can negatively regulate menin in ovarian cancer
works.abstract: Rui Hou,1 Zhuo Yang,1 ShiZhuo Wang,1 DaMing Chu,1 Qifang Liu,1 Jia Liu,1 Luo Jiang2 1Department of Obstetrics and Gynecology, 2Department of Ultrasound, Shengjing Hospital Affiliated to China Medical University, Shenyang, People&amp;rsquo;s Republic of China Abstract: Ovarian cancer accounts for the major part of the mortality attributable to female reproductive system malignant tumors worldwide. Recently, the incidence of ovarian cancer has been increasing annually, and there remains a lack of suitable treatment methods that can significantly improve the 5-year survival rates of patients. Therefore, it is necessary to identify more effective treatments for ovarian cancer. It is established that microRNAs (miRNAs) have important roles in the diagnosis and treatment of ovarian cancer and a specific miRNA, miR-762, can promote the development of a variety of tumors. Menin is encoded by MEN1, a tumor suppressor gene, that is usually downregulated in ovarian cancer. In this study, we evaluated the expression levels of miR-762 and menin in ovarian cancer tissues and demonstrated that they were correlated. In addition, we found that miR-762 can downregulate the expression of menin through a binding site in its 3&amp;#39;-UTR and consequently upregulate the Wnt cell signaling pathway to promote the development of ovarian cancer. These results indicate that miR-762 is a promising potential target for the treatment of ovarian cancer. Keywords: miR-762, menin, ovarian cancer&amp;nbsp;

works.translated_title: miR-762在卵巢癌中可负调控menin

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨miR-762和menin在卵巢癌中的作用及其作为治疗靶点的潜力。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过评估卵巢癌组织中miR-762和menin的表达水平，并研究miR-762对menin的调控及其对Wnt信号通路的影响。
summary_bullets.key_findings: miR-762和menin在卵巢癌组织中表达相关，miR-762通过结合menin的3'-UTR下调其表达，从而上调Wnt信号通路促进卵巢癌发展。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了miR-762通过直接靶向menin并激活Wnt信号通路来促进卵巢癌发展的新型调控机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 研究结果表明miR-762有望成为卵巢癌治疗的一个有前景的潜在靶点。

works.title: The impact of the lymph node density on overall survival in patients with Wilms’ tumor: A SEER analysis
works.abstract: Haisheng You,1,* Jin Yang,2,3,* Qingqing Liu,2,3 Lina Tang,1 Qingting Bu,4 Zhenyu Pan,5 Jun Lyu2,3 1Department of Pharmacy, The First Affiliated Hospital of Xi’an Jiaotong University, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China; 2Clinical Research Center, The First Affiliated Hospital of Xi’an Jiaotong University, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China; 3School of Public Health, Xi’an Jiaotong University Health Science Center, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China; 4Department of Genetics, Northwest Women’s and Children’s Hospital, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China; 5Department of Pharmacy, The Affiliated Children Hospital of Xi’an Jiaotong University, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China *These authors contributed equally to this work Objective: The objective of this study was to determine the impact of the lymph node density (LND) on overall survival of patients with Wilms’ tumor (WT) using the Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results (SEER) database.Methods: Data from the SEER database were extracted from patients with WT in whom the LND could be obtained. Patients were divided into a low LND group and high LND group. Survival curves based on the LND stratification were plotted using the Kaplan–Meier method and compared with the log-rank test. The impact of prognostic factors on overall survival was analyzed using Cox regression models.Results: A total of 1,924 patients were identified from the database. Overall survival for the low LND group at 5, 10, and 20 years was significantly better than the high LND group (5-year survival: 94.1% vs 81.4%; 10-year survival: 92.6% vs 80.8%; 20-year survival: 90.6% vs 79.1%; P<0.001). In multivariate analysis, LND was a significant predictor of overall survival, regardless of whether it was a categorical variable or a continuous variable. Other significant predictors included age, race, SEER stage, and tumor laterality.Conclusion: LND was a significant risk factor for overall survival of patients with WT. LND may provide a better prediction of the prognosis of WT patients and may be helpful for designing better treatments. Keywords: Wilms’ tumor, lymph node density, overall survival

works.translated_title: Wilms瘤患者淋巴结密度对总生存期的影响：一项SEER分析

summary_bullets.research_question: 本研究旨在利用SEER数据库确定淋巴结密度（LND）对Wilms瘤（WT）患者总生存期的影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究从SEER数据库提取数据，将患者分为低LND和高LND组，采用Kaplan-Meier法和Cox回归模型分析LND对总生存期的影响。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 结果显示，低LND组患者的总生存期显著优于高LND组，且LND是Wilms瘤患者总生存期的独立预测因子。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究提出淋巴结密度（LND）作为Wilms瘤患者预后的新预测指标，可能比传统方法提供更准确的预后评估。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为Wilms瘤患者的预后评估提供了新的风险因子，并有助于指导未来更精准的治疗方案设计。

works.title: Codelivery of doxorubicin and MDR1-siRNA by mesoporous silica nanoparticles-polymerpolyethylenimine to improve oral squamous carcinoma treatment
works.abstract: Dandan Wang,1,* Xiaowei Xu,2,* Kai Zhang,3 Bin Sun,4 Lu Wang,1 Lin Meng,1 Qilin Liu,4 Changyu Zheng,5 Bai Yang,3 Hongchen Sun1,3,6 1Department of Pathology, School and Hospital of Stomatology, Jilin University, Changchun, People’s Republic of China; 2Department of Periodontology, School and Hospital of Stomatology, Jilin University, Changchun, People’s Republic of China; 3State Key Laboratory of Supramolecular Structure and Materials, College of Chemistry, Jilin University, Changchun, People’s Republic of China; 4Department of Oral and Maxilloficial Syrgery, School and Hospital of Stomatology, Jilin University, Changchun, People’s Republic of China; 5Molecular Physiology and Therapeutics Branch, National Institute of Dental and Craniofacial Research, National Institutes of Health, Bethesda, MD, USA; 6Key Laboratory of Science and Technology for Stomatology Nanoengineering, The Education Department of Jilin Province, Changchun, People’s Republic of China *These authors contributed equally to this work Abstract: Oral cancer is a type of head and neck cancer that is the seventh most frequent cancer and the ninth most frequent cause of death globally. About 90% of oral cancer is of squamous cell carcinoma type. Surgery and radiation with and without chemotherapy are the major treatments for oral cancer. Better advanced treatment is still needed. Multidrug resistance plays an important role in failure of oral cancer chemotherapy. In this study, we tried to fabricate a novel nanoparticle that could carry both MDR1-siRNA to block MDR1 expression and doxorubicin (DOX), a chemotherapy drug, into cancer cells in order to directly kill the cells with little or no effect of multidrug resistance. Results showed that mesoporous silica nanoparticles (MSNP) can be modified by cationic polymerpolyethylenimine (PEI) to obtain positive charges on the surface, which could enable the MSNP to carry MDR1-siRNA and DOX. The transfection efficiency assays demonstrated that the MSNP-PEI-DOX/MDR1-siRNA was efficiently transfected into KBV cells in vitro. KBV cells transfected with MSNP-PEI-DOX/MDR1-siRNA could effectively decrease gene expression of MDR1 (~70% increase after 72 hours posttreatment) and induce the apoptosis of KBV cells (24.27% after 48 hours posttreatment) in vitro. Importantly, MSNP-PEI-DOX/MDR1-siRNA dramatically reduced the tumor size (81.64% decrease after 28 days posttreatment) and slowed down tumor growth rate compared to the control group in vivo (P<0.05). In the aggregate, newly synthesized MSNP-PEI-DOX/MDR1-siRNA improves cancer chemotherapy effect in terms of treating multidrug-resistant cancer compared to DOX only, clearly demonstrating that MSNP-PEI-DOX/MDR1-siRNA has potential therapeutic application for multidrug-resistant cancer in the future. Keywords: oral squamous carcinoma, doxorubicin, MDR1, mesoporous silica nanoparticles, polymerpolyethylenimine

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在通过开发一种新型纳米颗粒共递送系统，解决口腔鳞状细胞癌化疗中多药耐药性的问题。

works.title: Mutation p.R156H of KRT10 responsible for severe phenotype of epidermolytic ichthyosis in a Chinese family
works.abstract: Zhiliang Li,1,* Qiao Liu,2,* Aimin Wang,2 Hongsheng Wang,1 Chengrang Li1 1Department of Dermatology, Institute of Dermatology, Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences and Peking Union Medical College, Nanjing, People&amp;#39;s Republic of China; 2Hainan Provincial Hospital of Skin Disease, Hainan, People&amp;#39;s Republic of China&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;*These authors contributed equally to this workEpidermolytic ichthyosis is a rare genetic disorder characterized by diffuse erythroderma from the time of birth with subsequent appearance of thick, brown scales and occasional blister formation. Mutation has been found in keratin 1 (K1) and keratin 10 (K10) genes.1 Epidermolytic hyperkeratosis (EHK) is mostly inherited in a dominant mode. We report a Chinese family of EHK sufferers and their mutation findings.&amp;nbsp;

works.title: Tyrphostin AG1296, a platelet-derived growth factor receptor inhibitor, induces apoptosis, and&nbsp;reduces viability and migration of PLX4032-resistant melanoma cells
works.abstract: Yanling Li, Yuping Li, Qiang Liu, Aixue Wang Department of Dermatology, the Second Hospital of Hebei Medical University, Shijiazhuang, Hebei, People&rsquo;s Republic of China Abstract: Melanoma is the deadliest form of skin cancer, and BRAFV600E is a driver mutation that promotes melanoma growth and survival. PLX4032 is the first effective compound in clinical use for the treatment of patients with mutant BRAFV600. However, resistance to PLX4032 develops quickly within months. Activation of a series of receptor tyrosine kinases, including the platelet-derived growth factor receptor (PDGFR), has been identified to be the underlying mechanism for development of resistance to PLX4032. In this work, we investigated the anticancer activity of tyrphostin AG1296, a PDGFR inhibitor, in melanoma, especially PLX4032-resistant melanoma. We found that tyrphostin AG1296 could effectively reduce the viability of both PLX4032-sensitive and PLX4032-resistant melanoma cells. There is an additive effect between tyrphostin AG1296 and PLX4032 in reducing cell viability. Tyrphostin AG1296 induced dramatic apoptosis in PLX4032-resistant cells, and also dramatically inhibited migration of PLX4032-resistant cells. Importantly, tyrphostin AG1296 significantly suppressed A375R tumor growth in vivo. This is the first report on the anticancer activity of tyrphostin AG1296 in melanoma. Tyrphostin AG1296 is a promising compound in the treatment of melanoma, especially for those who have developed resistance towards BRAF inhibitors, and might shed new light on melanoma therapy. Keywords: melanoma, PLX4032, resistance, viability, apoptosis, migration

summary_bullets.key_findings: Tyrphostin AG1296能有效降低PLX4032敏感和耐药黑色素瘤细胞活力，诱导耐药细胞凋亡，抑制其迁移，并显著抑制体内肿瘤生长。
summary_bullets.innovation: 这是首次报道Tyrphostin AG1296在黑色素瘤中的抗癌活性，尤其针对PLX4032耐药性黑色素瘤。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为PLX4032耐药黑色素瘤患者提供了潜在的新治疗策略，并为黑色素瘤治疗开辟了新方向。

works.title: Repression of the miR-93-enhanced sensitivity of bladder carcinoma to chemotherapy involves the regulation of LASS2
works.abstract: Jingyu Liu,* Haifeng Wang,* Yan Wang, Zhenkun Li, Yi Pan, Qiying Liu, Mingying Yang, Jiansong Wang Department of Urology, The Second Affiliated Hospital of Kunming Medical University, Yunnan Institute of Urology, Yunnan Province, People&amp;rsquo;s Republic of China *These authors contributed equally to&amp;nbsp;this work Abstract: The aberrant expression of miRNA has an important function in bladder cancer (BC). Previous studies indicate that LASS2 is involved in the development of sensitivity to chemotherapy in cancer cells. In the present study, the miRNAs related to LASS2 were selected by using miRNA profiling to distinguish chemo-resistant and chemo-sensitive tumor specimens from patients. Higher levels of miR-93 were observed in the cisplatin-resistant BC cell line RT4, compared to the cell line T24. The role of miR-93 in chemo-sensitivity was demonstrated both in cell culture and mouse tumor xenograft models. We found that inhibiting miR-93 promoted cisplatin-induced apoptosis due to the accumulation of DNA damage. A reporter gene assay was performed, and the results showed miR-93 was not a target of the 3&amp;#39; untranslated region of LASS2, but had an altered protein expression level. Inhibitors of miR-93 could also enhance the chemo-sensitivity of tumor cells transfected with si-LASS2, but the effect was very slight. These findings suggest that miR-93 plays an important role in the chemo-sensitivity of BC, and may be involved in regulating the LASS2 gene. Keywords: miRNA, inhibition, chemo-sensitivity, bladder cancer
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 抑制miR-93增强的膀胱癌对化疗的敏感性涉及LASS2的调控

summary_bullets.research_question: This study investigates the role of miR-93 in bladder cancer chemotherapy sensitivity and its relationship with LASS2.
summary_bullets.methodology: Researchers used miRNA profiling, cell culture, mouse xenograft models, apoptosis assays, DNA damage assessment, and reporter gene assays.
summary_bullets.key_findings: miR-93 is elevated in cisplatin-resistant bladder cancer cells, and its inhibition enhances chemo-sensitivity by promoting apoptosis and DNA damage, possibly regulating LASS2.
summary_bullets.innovation: The study identifies miR-93 as a key regulator of bladder cancer chemo-sensitivity and clarifies its indirect regulatory link with LASS2.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research offers potential therapeutic targets for overcoming chemotherapy resistance in bladder cancer by inhibiting miR-93.

works.title: LXY6090 &ndash;&nbsp;a novel manassantin A derivative&nbsp;&ndash;&nbsp;limits breast cancer growth through hypoxia-inducible factor-1 inhibition
works.abstract: Fangfang Lai,1 Qian Liu,2 Xiaoyu Liu,3 Ming Ji,1 Ping Xie,3 Xiaoguang Chen1 1Department of Pharmacology, State Key Laboratory of Bioactive Substances and Functions of Natural Medicines, Institute of Materia Medica, Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences and Peking Union Medical College, 2Department of Pharmacology, National Institutes for Food and Drug Control, 3Department of Pharmacochemistry, Institute of Materia Medica, Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences and Peking Union Medical College, Beijing, People&rsquo;s Republic of China Abstract: Hypoxia-inducible factor-1 (HIF-1) represents a novel antitumor target owing to its involvement in vital processes considered hallmarks of cancer phenotypes. Manassantin A (MA) derived from Saururus cernuus has been reported as a selective HIF-1 inhibitor. Herein, the structure of MA was optimized to achieve new derivatives with simple chemical properties while retaining its activity. LXY6090 was designed to replace the central tetrahydrofuran moiety of MA with a cyclopentane ring and was identified as a potent HIF-1 inhibitor with an IC50 value of 4.11&nbsp;nM. It not only inhibited the activity of HIF-1 in breast cancer cells but also downregulated the protein level of HIF-1&alpha;, which depended on von Hippel&ndash;Lindau for proteasome degradation. The related biological evaluation showed that the activity of HIF-1 target genes, VEGF and IGF-2, was decreased by LXY6090 in breast cancer cell lines. LXY6090 presented potent antitumor activity in vitro. Furthermore, LXY6090 showed in vivo anticancer efficacy by decreasing the HIF-1&alpha; expression in nude mice bearing MX-1 tumor xenografts. In conclusion, our data provide a basis for the future development of the novel compound LXY6090 as a potential therapeutic agent for breast cancer. Keywords: hypoxia-inducible factor-1, manassantin A derivative, antitumor, breast cancer, LXY6090
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: LXY6090——一种新型 manassantin A 衍生物——通过抑制缺氧诱导因子-1限制乳腺癌生长

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在开发一种新型、更有效的缺氧诱导因子-1 (HIF-1) 抑制剂，以治疗乳腺癌。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过结构优化设计了LXY6090，并采用体外细胞实验和体内裸鼠异种移植模型评估其对HIF-1的抑制作用及抗肿瘤活性。
summary_bullets.key_findings: LXY6090被鉴定为一种强效HIF-1抑制剂，通过下调HIF-1α蛋白水平及其靶基因，在体外和体内均显示出显著的乳腺癌抗肿瘤活性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文的创新点在于设计并合成了LXY6090，一种新型且化学性质更简化的Manassantin A衍生物，并证实其作为强效HIF-1抑制剂的潜力。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为开发新型乳腺癌治疗药物提供了有前景的化合物LXY6090，对癌症药物研发领域具有重要价值。

works.title: A new target ligand Ser–Glu for PEPT1-overexpressing cancer imaging
works.abstract: Tongcheng Dai,1 Na Li,1 Lingzhi Zhang,1 Yuanxing Zhang,1,2 Qin Liu1,2 1State Key Laboratory of Bioreactor Engineering, East China University of Science and Technology, 2Shanghai Collaborative Innovation Center for Biomanufacturing Technology, Shanghai, People’s Republic of China Abstract: Nanoparticles functionalized with active target ligands have been widely used for tumor-specific diagnosis and therapy. The target ligands include antibodies, peptides, proteins, small molecules, and nucleic acid aptamers. Here, we utilize dipeptide Ser–Glu (DIP) as a new ligand to functionalize polymer-based fluorescent nanoparticles (NPs) for pancreatic cancer target imaging. We demonstrate that in the first step, Ser–Glu-conjugated NPs (NPs-DIP) efficiently bind to AsPC-1 and in the following NPs-DIP are internalized into AsPC-1 in vitro. The peptide transporter 1 inhibition experiment reveals that the targeting effects mainly depend on the specific binding of DIP to peptide transporter 1, which is remarkably upregulated in pancreatic cancer cells compared with varied normal cells. Furthermore, NPs-DIP specifically accumulate in the site of pancreatic tumor xenograft and are further internalized into the tumor cells in vivo after intravenous administration, indicating that DIP successfully enhanced nanoparticles internalization efficacy into tumor cells in vivo. This work establishes Ser–Glu to be a new tumor-targeting ligand and provides a promising tool for future tumor diagnostic or therapeutic applications. Keywords: imaging, pancreatic cancer, PEPT1 transporter, Ser–Glu, target ligand

works.title: An efficient calcium phosphate nanoparticle-based nonviral vector for gene delivery
works.abstract: Yachun Liu1,2,*, Tao Wang1,*, Fangli He1,*, Qian Liu1,*, Dexi Zhang2, Shuanglin Xiang1, Shengpei Su2, Jian Zhang11Key Laboratory of Protein Chemistry and Developmental Biology, Ministry of Education of China, College of Life Sciences; 2Key Laboratory of Chemical Biology and Traditional Chinese Medicine Research and Key Laboratory of Sustainable Resources Processing and Advanced Materials of Hunan Province, Ministry of Education of China, College of Chemistry and Chemical Engineering, Hunan Normal University, Changsha, Hunan, China*These authors contributed equally to this workBackground: Smaller nanoparticles facilitate the delivery of DNA into cells through endocytosis and improve transfection efficiency. The aim of this study was to determine whether protamine sulfate-coated calcium phosphate (PS-CaP) could stabilize particle size and enhance transfection efficiency.Methods: pEGFP-C1 green fluorescence protein was employed as an indicator of transfection efficiency. Atomic force microscopy was used to evaluate the morphology and the size of the particles, and an MTT assay was introduced to detect cell viability and inhibition. The classical calcium phosphate method was used as the control.Results: Atomic force microscopy images showed that the PS-CaP were much smaller than classical calcium phosphate particles. In 293 FT, HEK 293, and NIH 3T3 cells, the transfection efficiency of PS-CaP was higher than for the classical calcium phosphate particles. The difference in efficiencies implies that the smaller nanoparticles may promote the delivery of DNA into cells through endocytosis and could improve transfection efficiency. In addition, PS-CaP could be used to transfect HEK 293 cells after one week of storage at 4&deg;C with a lesser extent of efficiency loss compared with classical calcium phosphate, indicating that protamine sulfate may increase the stability of calcium phosphate nanoparticles. The cell viability inhibition assay indicated that both nanoparticles show similar low cell toxicity.Conclusion: PS-CaP can be used as a better nonviral transfection vector compared with classical calcium phosphate.Keywords: transfection efficiency, particle size, protamine sulfate, stability

summary_bullets.methodology: 采用pEGFP-C1指示转染效率，原子力显微镜评估颗粒形态和尺寸，MTT法检测细胞活力，并以经典磷酸钙法作为对照。
summary_bullets.key_findings: PS-CaP颗粒更小，在多种细胞中转染效率更高，储存稳定性更好，且与经典磷酸钙具有相似的低细胞毒性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文提出并验证了鱼精蛋白硫酸盐包被的磷酸钙作为一种新型非病毒载体，其在尺寸、转染效率和稳定性方面优于传统方法。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为基因递送领域提供了一种更高效、更稳定的非病毒转染载体，对开发新型基因治疗工具具有重要价值。

works.title: Determining the optimal cutoff point for lymph node density and its impact on overall survival in children with Wilms’ tumor
works.abstract: Zhenyu Pan,1–3,* Qingting Bu,4,* Haisheng You,5 Jin Yang,1,2 Qingqing Liu,1,2 Jun Lyu1,2 1Clinical Research Center, The First Affiliated Hospital of Xi’an Jiaotong University, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China; 2School of Public Health, Xi’an Jiaotong University Health Science Center, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China; 3Department of Pharmacy, The Affiliated Children Hospital of Xi’an Jiaotong University, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China; 4Department of Genetics, Northwest Women’s and Children’s Hospital, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China; 5Department of Pharmacy, The First Affiliated Hospital of Xi’an Jiaotong University, Xi’an, Shaanxi, People’s Republic of China *These authors contributed equally to this work Objective: Previous studies showed that the lymph node density (LND) was a predictor of survival in Wilms’ tumor (WT). However, the optimal LND cutoff point is controversial due to methodological shortcomings of previous studies, and no studies have shown the effect of LND on survival in children with WT. The purpose of this study was to remedy this situation.Methods: We identified 376 children with WT. LND cutoff point was determined using the median value, the X-tile program, the survival-tree algorithm, and the time-dependent ROC curve analysis. Survival functions were estimated by the Kaplan–Meier method. We used Cox regression analysis to determine the impact of LND on survival. Smooth curve fitting between relative mortality risk and LND was performed.Results: The LND cutoff point was 0.44, 0.65, 0.65, and 0.64 according to the median value, the X-tile program, the survival-tree algorithm, and the time-dependent ROC curve analysis, respectively. The 5-, 10-, and 20-year overall survival rates were 86.9%, 86.9%, and 84.7%, respectively, in the <0.44 group and 81.3%, 80.3%, and 80.3%, respectively, in the ≥0.44 group. Survival did not differ significantly between the two groups (P=0.185). The 5-, 10-, and 20-year overall survival rates were 87.8%, 87.8%, and 86.0%, respectively, in the < 0.65 or < 0.64 group and 76.5%, 75.1%, and 75.1%, respectively, in the ≥ 0.65 or ≥ 0.64 group. Children with the high LND had a significantly worse survival (P=0.011) if 0.64 or 0.65 was used for the stratification. LND was a significant predictor for overall survival in the multivariate Cox regression analysis (HR =1.797; 95% CI, 1.043–3.097; P=0.035). Smooth curve fitting suggested that the risk of mortality tended to be ascending with the increase in LND in general.Conclusion: The three methods including the X-tile program, the survival-tree algorithm, and the time-dependent receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve analysis are equivalent in their ability to stratify patients and clearly better than the median method. The results showed that the optimal LND cutoff point was around 0.65 and the LND was a reliable predictor of overall survival in children with WT. Keywords: Wilms’ tumor, lymph node density, cutoff point, survival

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在确定Wilms肿瘤患儿淋巴结密度(LND)的最佳临界点及其对总生存期的影响，以弥补现有研究的不足。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过中位数、X-tile程序、生存树算法和时间依赖性ROC曲线分析确定LND临界点，并使用Kaplan-Meier和Cox回归分析生存函数。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 最佳LND临界点约为0.65，高LND显著降低Wilms肿瘤患儿的生存率，LND是总生存期的可靠预测因子。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究首次系统比较多种方法确定Wilms肿瘤患儿LND最佳临界点，并证实LND对生存期的预测作用，且优于中位数法。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为Wilms肿瘤患儿的风险分层和预后评估提供了更准确的LND临界点和可靠的预测指标，具有重要的临床价值。

works.title: Coupling technique of random amplified polymorphic DNA and nanoelectrochemical sensor for mapping pancreatic cancer genetic fingerprint
works.abstract: Qicai Liu1,2, Ailin Liu3,4, Feng Gao5, Shaohuang Weng3,4, Guangxian Zhong3,4, Jingfeng Liu6, Xinhua Lin3,4, Jian-hua Lin7, Xuhai Chen81Department of Laboratory Medicine, Fujian Medical University, Fuzhou, 2Department of Gene Diagnosis, Fujian Medical University, Fuzhou, 3Department of Nano-Biomedical Research Center, Fujian Medical University, Fuzhou, 4Department of Pharmaceutical Analysis, Fujian Medical University, Fuzhou, 5Department of Pathology, Fujian Medical University, Fuzhou, 6Department of Surgery, Fujian Medical University, Fuzhou, 7Department of Bone Oncology, First Affiliated Hospital, Fujian Medical University, Fuzhou, 8College of Electrical Engineering and Automation, Fuzhou University, Fuzhou, People&amp;#39;s Republic of ChinaObjective: To review the feasibility of coupling the techniques of random amplified polymorphic DNA (RAPD) with carbon nanotube-based modified electrode for guanine/deoxy-guanine triphosphate (dGTP) electrochemical sensing for mapping of the pancreatic cancer genetic fingerprint and screening of genetic alterations.Methods: We developed a new method to study the electrochemical behavior of dGTP utilizing carbon multiwalled nanotube (MWNT)-modified glassy carbon electrodes (GCEs). RAPD was applied for amplification of DNA samples from healthy controls and patients with pancreatic cancer under the same conditions to determine the different surplus quantity of dGTP in the polymerase chain reaction (PCR), thereby determining the difference/quantity of PCR products or template strands. Using this method we generated a genetic fingerprint map of pancreatic cancer through the combination of electrochemical sensors and gel electrophoresis to screen for genetic alterations. Cloning and sequencing were then performed to verify these gene alterations.Results: dGTP showed favorable electrochemical behavior on the MWNTs/GCE. The results indicated that the electrical signal and dGTP had a satisfactory linear relationship with the dGTP concentration within the conventional PCR concentration range. The MWNTs/GCE could distinguish between different products of RAPD. This experiment successfully identified a new pancreatic cancer-associated mutant gene fragment, consisting of a cyclin-dependent kinase 4 gene 3&amp;#39; terminal mutation.Conclusion: The coupling of RAPD and nanoelectrochemical sensors was successfully applied to the screening of genetic alterations in pancreatic cancer and for mapping of DNA fingerprints.Keywords: nanoelectrochemical sensor, random amplified polymorphic DNA, genetic fingerprint, pancreatic cancer, genetic predisposition, carbon nanotube
